chapters.text: Ephraim miho thinglhang gamsunga Ramatha’imzo’phim khoa mi khat anachengin, ama chu Ephraim mi Zuph chapa, Tohu chapa, Elihu chapa, chule Jeroham chapa ahin, amin Elka’nah akiti.
Elka’nah hin ji ni akop’in, ajinu khat chu amin Hannah ahin, khatjo nu min chu Penin’nah ahi. Penin’nah kitinu hin cha ahing nan, Hannah vang hi cha hing louvin achingtai.

Elka’nah kitipa hi achenna khopia konin kumseh leh Shiloh khopia chun Pakai henga kilhaina gantha bol ding le chibai boh din achetou jin ahi; Shiloh a hi Eli chapa teni Hophni le Phin’ehas chu Pakai thempua pang akilhone.
Elka’nah kitipa hin kilhaina gantha abolni ni leh asa chu ajinu Penin’nah le Penin’nah kitinu chapate chengse toh, achanute toh sachen ahop peh dim dem jin ahi;
ahin Hannah chu alungset lheh jeng vangin Pakaiyin anaobu asinpeh a achin jeh chun sachan chan khat seh seh bou apejitan ahi.
Chuma leh agolnun jong Hannah chu Pakaiyin anaobu asinpeh a achin jeh in alunghan hanna dingin melse sen aphin lung hangjin ahi.
Akumsim seh le hiti chun anaumjin, Penin’nah kitinu hi Pakai houina achetou tih tih Hannah chu aphin lung hang bepjie. Hichejeh chun Hannah jong akap jah jengin an nelouvin aumlo tai.

Hichun ajipa Elka’nah jong chun ajah a, “Hannah, ibola kap jah jeng nahiya, chujongle ipi dinga an nelouva naum ham? I pi dia hibang tah a lung nom moa naum jeng hi tam? Chapa som khat nahin sanga jong kei hi thupijo kahi lou ham?” ati.
Shiloh a chu an aneh a twi adonsoh phat in Hannah jong akipatdoh pai paitai. Hichea hin Eli thempupa jong Pakai houin kotpi khomphung koma touna chunga chun anatouve.
Ahin Hannah chu alhase behseh jengin, Pakai henga ataovin, laina tah in akap jengin ahi.

Hichea hin Hannah hin kitepna khat aneiyin, “Vo tha neipen tah Pakai, nasohnu lainatna hi hinve tei teiyin lang, neihin geldoh teiyin, hiti chun nasohnu hi neisumil loujenin; nangman chapa khat neihinsah pou pouva ahileh, keiman ama chu ahinkho lhum keiyin asam voutollou helin koiying ting, Pakai henga katodoh jeng ding ahi,” ati.
Pakai angsunga Hannah atao tao jeng pet chun Eli thempupan amanu nephu chaloh chu ave ven ahi.
Hannah chun alungthim sunga thu nasa tah a asei ahin, anephu teni mai mai akilingin achat nan, athusei gin akijadoh deh poi; hijeh chun Elin jong Hannah chu numei jukham danin angaito tan ahi.
Eli’n Hannah jah a aseiyin, “Itih chan pi hitia hi jukhama naum um jeng ding ham? Najukhampi chu pailhan lang hung chingdoh tan,” ati.

Ahinla Hannah chun adonbut’in aseitai, “Ahipoi kapu, kei hi numei genthei chung nung kahibouve; keiman ju jong kadon khapon, khamna theilom jong kadonpoi, Pakai angsunga hi kahinkho pumpia thuseijoh kahi.
Nasohnu hi numei chavaiyin gel hih helin, ajeh chu hitih chan pi hi kahesoh kagentheina jeh a thusei sei jenga umjoh kahibouve,” ati.
Chuphat’in Eli’n jong adonbut’in aseitai, “Chuti ahileh lung mongin chetan, Israel Pathenin ahenga nathum chu napeh ding ahitai,” atipeh-e.
Hannah jong chun, “Nasohnu hi nangma mitmun jong hamphatna neichansah tei teiyin,” atipaiye. Chutah chun Hannah jong achedoh in an anen amaiso jong alhaisel jeng tan ahi.

Amaho jingpi tah in ajing thouvun, Pakai angsunga chibai aboh jou phat’uvin Ramah khoa ainlam’uva ahung kite kit tauve; chuin Elka’nah chun ajinu Hannah akitimat pin ahileh, Pakaiyin jong amanu chu ahin geldoh tai.
Hijeh chun Hannah kitinun jong aphat chan nao ahinvop tan, chapa khat ahingin chule amin jong Samuel asah-e; ijehinem itileh Hannah hin anaseiyin, “Ken ama hi Pakai henga kathumdohsa ahi,” ati.
Phat khat’in Elka’nah kiti mipa chuleh ama insung mite abonchan kumseh a kilhaina gantha thilto atodolu toh ding le akitepna thilpeh pe din Pakai henga hitiho bol dingin achetou tauve.

Hichea hin Hannah kitinu hi achetapoi, ijeh-inem itileh amanu hin ajipa jah a aseiyin, “Naosen hi hung akikhan lhit dom teng leh ken ama hi hinpui touving ting, amatah Pakai angsunga kilah lut theiya auma, hikoma chu achenden jing jeng theina dingin ngaito jonge,” ati ahi.

Hichun ajipa Elka’nah in jong Hannah jah a aseiyin, “Nangman aphapen dinga nagel gel chu bol jengin, ama hi navah khang kahsen ngah in lang, Pakaiyin jong aseisa chu phutdetjo hen,” atipeh-e. Hijeh chun Hannah jong ina aumdentan, achapa chu akhandoh kahsen avah jingin ajenjo tai.

Chuin anao chu avah khangdom phat’in Hannah jong ahinpuiyin, kumthum lhingsa bongchal khat akaiyin, changbong neldisel Ephah dim khat toh apon, lengpitwi pengthei khat dimset toh akidop’in naosen chapang chu Shiloh khoa Pakai houina ahinpui lut tai; naosen chu chapang chabou ahinalaiye.
Mihon bongchal chu athat uvin, naosen chu Eli thempu henga ahinpui lut tauve;
chujongle Hannah chun aseiyin, “Vo kapu, nangma nadam jing nalaiye, kei hi hepu, khatvei hikom nangma angsunga dinga Pakai henga anatao numeinu chu kahiye.
Hiche naosen kaneina dinga hi anatao kahin, Pakaiyin ama henga kathum kataona thil hiche naosen hi eipetai;
hichejeh a chu keiman ama hi Pakai henga katodoh ahitai, ahinlaisea hiche naosen hi Pakai dinga kitohdohsa ahitan ahi,” ati. Hikom muna chun amahon Pakai chibai aboh tauve.
@@Hannah ataovin anoiya la hi asai “Pakaiya kalungthim akipah tan, Pakaiya katha ahat tai; Kakamsung hin kamelmate katot chavaitai, Ijeh-inem itile neihuhhingna a kipah kahiye.
“Pakai tobanga atheng dang aumpoi, Nang tailou khatcha jong aumpon, Eiho Pathen banga Songpi son a sonthei khatcha aumpoi.
Kiletsah tah a thu nasei kit louhel diu, Nakamsunga kona hoithona thu pot lou ding ahi; Ajeh chu Pakai hi ima jouse jasoh kei Pathen ahin, Thil kibol jouse hi aman alep tohji ahi.
Gal-hatte thalpi chang akiheh bongsoh tan, Mi thalhom chu athahat doh tai.
Oiva va an neten neh ding akilothu tauvin, Agilkelte la avasoh tauve! Chabeiya achingin jong cha sagijen ahingtan, Cha tamtah hingnu joh don louvin aume.
Pakaiyin mi athisah a chojong achohingji ahin, Noimi gam geiya apuisuhjia, thojong athodohji ahi.
Pakaiyin mi avaichatsah thei ahin ahaosah thei ahi; Aman suhjong asuhnemjia, choijong achoisangji ahi.

Aman tahlel chu tola kona aphoh doh a, Vutvam lah a kona aneiloute achoisang ahi; Hitia hi amaho chu lengle lal chate toh atoukhomsah a, Migun ja umtah tah toumun alosah ji ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh leiset bulpi khomho geiya Pakaiya ahin, Hiche khomho chunga vannoi jong hi atun ahibouve.
Pakaiyin mi kitahte kholhahna avetpeh jing ding, Migiloute vang muthima kisat lumsoh diu ahi; Ipijeh-inem itileh Thahatsana mihemin gal ajo lou ding ahi.

Pakai dougalte vang chu kichilgoi soh diu, Amaho douna Pakaiyin vana kona van akinimsah ding ahi. Pakaiyin leiset mong geiya thu atan ding, Alengpa chu tha apeh a, Leng chang dia thao anusa chu Athahat abelap peh ding ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin Elka’nah jong ainlam Ramah khoa achetai. Naosen Samuel vang chu Eli thempupa angsunga Pakai kinbol din apang dentan ahi.
Eli chapa teni chu pannabei gel ahilhonin, Pakai ginna jong anei lhonpoi.

Chuche laiya mipi dinga thempuho chonna ngaidan ahileh: mihem khat touvin kilhaina gantha abol teng, thempupa sohpa chu hunga, gancha kithat chu asa akihonsou pet tah a akhut’a thihkhe kathuma kika, asao jen jun khat akichoi ding,

hiche thih-khe chu khangbel sunga asolut’a, twibel hihen lang khangbel lentah hijongle, bubel hijong leh asunga asolut jeng ding ahin; khea asodoh pen pen chu thempupan ama chan dinga akilah ding, ti ahin; hitobanga hi Shiloh a hung Israelte jousen hitia hi abol peh soh keiyu ahi.

Hiche tailouva jong sathaose se chu akahvam masanga thempupa sohpa chu hunga kilhaina gan thatpa jah a ahung sei ding, “Thempupa kigo ding sahing neipen, ajeh chu aman nangma hon minsa chu akilah louhel ding ahi, sahing bou adei ahiye,” tia ahungsei ding ahi.

Ijemtia ganthatpa chun ajah a, “Athao lai hi gouvam ta diuvin tin, chujou teng nangman nadeijat jat kilah nan nate,” atia ahileh, thempupa sohpan jong, “Ahipoi, nangman tuma ma neipeh doh ding ahi; achutilouva ahileh keiman pumhat’a kalahpeh ding nahi,” tia asei teiji ahi.
Hitobanga hi gollhang teni chonsetna hi Pakai mitmua nasa behseh jeng ahitai; ijeh-inem itileh mihon Pakai dinga thilto jeng jong chu kimit thipna changin aneitauve.
Samuel chu chapang cha ahinalaiyin, ahivangin thempu kivonna tupat ponnem khat hin akong akigah jin Pakai angsunga lhachan apangjingin ahi.
Chule anun jong sangkhol chol neocha atoh bep khat akhuipeh jin kumseh le kilhaina gantha bol dinga ahung phat’a ajipa toh ahung kilhon teng, hiche sangkhol chol jong chu Samuel din ahinpo jie.

Ahung lhun teng lhon leh Eli’n jong Elka’nah le ajinu chu phatthei aboh jin hitin aseijie, “Pakaiyin hiche najinun achapa atodoh jeng jeh hin amanua konin cha le nao tam pi nahinsah hen,” tin aseijie. Chujou teng amani jong ainlam lhona hung kilekitji ahilhontai.
Hitobang hin Pakaiyin Hannah kitinu chu ahung vilkit’in, hijeh chun amanu jong ahung gaiji jin chapa thum le chanu ni ahinbe kit’e. Chapang Samuel vang chu Pakai angsunga hung khangdoh ahitai.
Eli thempupa chu atehse behsehjeng tan, chuma le achapa te nin Israel mi tamtah abolna lhon thu kithang, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phunga lhacha pang numeiho aluppi lhon jong ajatai.

Hijeh chun Eli’n jong amani jah a “Ipi dinga nangnin hibang thilse pi hi nabol lhon hiya, nahiti chon jeng lhon hitam? Ajeh chu keiman Israel chatea konin nangni thilse bol jouse abonchan kajasoh keitai.
Ahipoi kacha teni, Pakai miten gam tina aseithang jengu nangni chung chang thu kithangpi hi thupha ahi hih hel jenge.

Mihem khat chu mihem dang khat douna achonset’a ahileh Pathenin asuh cham thei ahin; amavang mihem khat chu Pakai douna achonset’a ahileh, koipenin ama dinga aseicham peh ding hi tam?” ati. Ahinla achapa te nin apa thusei chu ngaisah in aneideh lhon tapoi; ajeh chu amani thadoh ding joh chu Pakai lunglam anahijoi.
Chapangpa Samuel vang chu tahsa le Pakai dei, mihem deiyin ahung khangtou toutan ahi.

Hichun Eli thempupa henga Pathen mi khat ahungin, Elijah a aseitai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseitai, ‘Kei hi Egypt gamsung Pharaoh insunga soh changa aum laiyuva napa insung mite henga kei le kei kiphongdohsa kahitai.

Ken ama chu kathempua pang dinga, kamaicham phunga kaltou ding, gimnamtui halnam ding, ka angsunga thempuvon kivon jing dinga Israel phung jouse lah a kalhendohsa anahi; chujongle Israel chatea kona kimudoh kei dinga thilto jouse chu napa insung mite kapehsa ahitai.

Chuti ahileh ipi dinga nang hon keima dinga kilhaina gantha jouse le kei dinga thilto jouse, keiman thu kapehsa chu mitvet lel tah a navet jiuva, kei sanga nachate nachoi sangjoh a, kamite Israel thilto aphalai laiya chu nang ho kivah thao chet nahiu hitam?’ ati.

Hijeh chun Pakai Israel Pathen chun aphongdoh- e, ‘Nangma insung mite le napa insung mite chu keima angsunga vaikona vailhung diu ahi,’ ati. Ahinla Pakai chun tun aseidoh tai, “Hichu hithei naisai louhel ding ahitai; mi keima eijabol jouse chu kajabol ding, eikhohsah lou jouse chu khohsah a kanei lou ding ahi.
Vetan, keiman natha neina kasuh beiya napa insung tha neina kasuh beina ding nikho ahung naitul tule; hiteng chuleh na-insunga pasal tehse khat beh jong hung um lou ding ahiye.

Chutengle nangman Israel kipe ding haona jouse chu ngaicha geova namit lhi lha lha a nahin vet vet ding ahi; chujongle nang insung lhah a chu pasal khat’a khat cha jong ateh thia hung umdoh lou ding ahitai.

Nangma mi keima maicham phunga kona kahinghoi auma ahijongle kap’a amit lhi long long ding leh alungthima lung hesoh thoh bep dia um ding ahin, hitobanga hi na-insung peng mite aboncha mihem chemjama lousoh kei diu ahiye.
Chule hiche nachapa teni Hophni le Phin’ehas chunga hung lhung ding hi nang dia melchihna hung hi ding ahi: anilhona hi nikhat sunga hung thi ding ahilhone.

Keiman vang kathempua pang ding thempu kitah tah khat katun ding ahin, ama hin keima lungdei bang le ka ngaito bang banga na atoh ding ahi! chujongle ken in det tah kasah peh ding, atonsot geiya ama hi keima thaonu lengpa angsunga vaikona vailhung ding ahi.

Nangma insunga ahingdoh akidalha aum nah laiya ahijongleh ama chun dangka halsi khat le changlhah lhon khat jengjong akithum thole le ding, hitia hi asei ding, “Nahenga katao ahi, anneh them khat beh kakimuna din thempu panmun khat beh a neipansah tei teiyin,” ati ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chapangpa Samuel chun Eli thempupa noiya Pakai din lhacha natoh atong jinge. Hiche lai hin Pakai thusei ahung kiphong hahsa lheh jin, themgao mu neiya jong aumvah vah tapon ahi.
Hichelai ma hin Eli jong amit athimtan, kho amu thei tapon, hijeh chun jalkhuna alum lum tai;
Pathen thaomei kide jong chu amit hih laiyin, Samuel chu Pathen thingkong kikoina Pakai houin sunga alume.
Hichun Pakaiyin Samuel ahinkouvin, “Vo Samuel,” atileh, aman jong, “Hoiyo,” tin ahouvin,
Eli henga alhailut jel jengin, “Neikou hilou ham, hikoma kaum nai,” agati. Ahinla Eli’n, “Keiman nang kakoupoi, galum kit tan,” tin anadonbut’in ahi. Hijeh chun Samuel jong anung chen alum tai.

Chuin Pakaiyin ahinkou kit’in, “Vo Samuel,” atia ahileh, Samuel jong athoudoh kit’in Eli henga agache phan, “Neikou hilou ham, hikoma kaum nai,” agati pha kit’in ahi. Ahivangin Eli’n “Kacha, keiman nang kakoupoi, galum kit tan,” ati kit tan ahi.
Saumel hin Pakai jong ahet khah loulai anahi, ajeh chu ama henga Pakai thusei jong hung kiphongdoh kha loulai anahi.

Thumvei lhin nan Pakaiyin Samuel ahinkou kit leuvin, hijeh chun ama jong athouvin Eli henga achen, “Nangin neikou mong mong bouve, keima kaum jing nai,” agatia ahiphat’in, chapang Samuel hi Pakaiyin anakou kou ahitai, tin Eli thempupan jong ageldoh tai.

Hichejeh chun Eli thempupan jong Samuel jah a aseiyin, “Chen lang galumin, ijemtia nahin kou kit’a ahileh nangman, ‘Hinsei tan Pakai, nasohpan ka ngai nai,’ tin seiyin,” tin ahiltan ahi. Hijeh chun Samuel jong achen ajalkhuna agalum tai.
Pakai chu ahungin ading jangin amasa a akou bang bangin, “Samuel, Samuel,” tia ahinkou kit phat’in Samuel jong chun, “Hinsei tan, nasohpan ka ngai nai,” tin adonbut’e.
Chuphat’in Pakai chun Samuel jah a aseiyin, “Ven, keiman Israel lah a thil khat kahinbol ding ahin, hiche kathilbol ding ajadoh chan ajahna anakhang teni poh keh deh jeng ding ahi.
Hiche kabolni ding hileh keiman Eli le ainsung douna kasei jouse chu apatna pat achaina geiya kaguilhun sah soh kei ding ahi.
Ama insung hi keiman aitih chan geiya dia talen kapeh ding ahi, ajeh chu aman achapa te nin Pathen ataitom lhom khu ahenan achonset lhon suh tangna din aphoh tang tapon ahi.
Hijeh a chu keima Eli insung chung changa kihahsel kahi, hiche Eli insung themmona hi itih chan hijongle kilhaina gantha a jong thilto danga jong kisucham thei louhel ding ahitai,” ati.
Samuel chu jingkah khovah geiyin alumin, khovah phat’in Pakai houin kotpi jouse chu ahongdoh soh keiyin ahi. Hichea hin themgao thujah ajah a mu anei chu Eli koma seidoh ding akicha lheh jengin ahi.
Ahivangin Eli chun Samuel akouvin, “Vo kachapa Samuel,” atia ahileh, Samuel jong chun, “Hoiyo,” atin adonbut tai.

Eli’n adongin, “Pakaiyin ipi naseipeh ham, kei jah din imhih hel’in; nangman najah a asei jouse chu im naneiya ahileh Pakaiyin hitobang chun nang din thil na impeh hen lang, akalvala melsen jong nabol jeng hen,” a tin agihsal masai.
Hijeh chun Samuel’in jong ijakai aseipeh soh keiyin, imacha im beihel’in aseidoh peh soh keitai. Chuphat’in Eli’n jong, “Ama chu Pakai hiya chume, pha asah lam lam bol le ahijenge,” ati.
Samuel chu ahung khangtou touvin, Pakaiyin jong ama chu aumpi jingjengin, chujongle aseisa chu khat’a khat jeng cha jong tola alhapoi.
Israel jousen jong Dan gamsunga pat Beersheba gamsung geiya cheng jouse chun Samuel kitipa chu Pakai themgaova pang dia kitungdet ahitai, ti ahesoh hel tauve.
Chuin Shiloh khoa hin Pakai ahung kilah kit’e; ijehinem itileh Shiloh khoa hi Pakai thusah a Pakai amatah Samuel henga hung kiphong dohsa anahi.

Hiche nung hin Samuel’in Israel pumpi henga thu alhut tan ahi. Chule Israelte jong Philistine mite toh kisat din gal akon’uvin, Ebene’zer kiti laiya hin ngahmun asemun, Philistine miten jong Aphek kiti laiya ngahmun akisem’uve.

Philistine mite chu Israel sat dingin galmuna ahung kigol’uvin akisat’uva ahileh, galmun jeng jenga hin Philistine mihon Israel mite mihem sang som li tobang asat lih den tauvin, hijeh chun Israelte ajou tauve.

Hiche ni hin angahmun’uva sepaiten ahinlonvuh jeng phat’uvin Israel upate jong akihouvun, “lti mong monga tunia hi Pakaiyin Philistine te masanga eidel cheh jengu ‘hiya hi tam? Shiloh khoa Pakai kitepna thingkong chu hikoma hin gapolut leu hen, Pakai chu ihenguva hung lut’in tin imelmateu khut’a kona eihuhdoh diu ahi,” akitiuve.

Hijeh chun Israel miten Shiloh lama mi asol’uvin, Pakai tha nei chung nungpen Cherubim chunga laltouna toupa kitepna thingkong chu agaput sah uvin, Eli chapa teni jong Hophni le Phin’ehas kiti teni chu Shiloh a Pathen thingkong chutoh anaum khom ahilhone.
Pakai kitepna thingkong chu ngahmun lailunga ahinpoh lut phat’uvin Israel pumpin ogin kithong hel’in asam cheh uvin ahileh leiset akithong leuve.

Philistine miten ogin kithongpi chu ajah phat’uvin akihouvun, “Hebrew mite ngahmun lailunga khubang tah a ogin thonga kholhang kisampi khu ipi kitina hi ding hitam?” atiuvin ahi. Ahin Pakai thingkong chu Israelte ngahmun lailunga ahung kitollut tai, tia ahetdoh phat’uvin

Philistine te jong vang akicha lheh jeng tauve; ijeh-inem itileh Philistine miten aseiyuvin, “Ngahmun lailunga khu Pathen hung lut ahitai,” atiuve. Chujongle amahon aseiyun, “Ohe, ada ihiu ahitai! Masangin hitobang thil hi anasoh kha hih laime.
O koipen tah hin hitobang Pathen hat tah ho thahat’a kona hi eihuhdoh jou diu hi tam? Gamthip laiya gamna hise jat chom chom manga Egypt mite anasugam jong chu hitobang Pathen ho hi anahi.

Vo Philistine mite, nang ho le nang ho pasal tah in kigel’uvin, hang tah in panguvin, achutilouva ahileh nang hon amaho soh a nanei banguva Hebrew miten nang ho soh a nanei diu ahi; nang ho le nang ho pasal tah in ki ngaitouvin lang galsat din pangun,” atiuve.

Hitobanga hi Philistine ten kitil khoutah a Israelte anasat jeh uva anajou ahin, Israelte ajammang uvin, ama ama inlam cheh akidelsoh tauve; ijeh-inem itileh Israel mi hathan athat’uvin, mihem akenga kijot sepai jeng jeng sang somthum athat gamhel’uvin ahi.
Pathen thingkong jong amatdoh peh uvin, Eli thempupa chapa teni Hophni le Phin’ehas jong athat tauve.
Gal kisat chai nin Benjamin phunga mi khat gal kisatna muna konin Shiloh kho langa ahung lhai lut’in, aponsil jouse jong ateldeh duh jengin, alujang jong leivui ahung natleu lou jenge.

Ama hi ahung lhun phat’in Eli jong lamlen panga atouna chunga atou jingin, Pathen thingkong analung gimpin, athu hetnomin ana ngah jing jenge. Hiche Benjamin mipa hi khopi sunga ahung lhai lut phat’in athilsoh um chan thudol jouse aseipeh in ahileh khopi sunga miho chu abonchan hakan akap jah jenguvin ahi.
Eli’n jong mipi othongje jua aka jeng chu ajah phat’in, “Hibang tah a thong jejua mi akajeng khu ipijeh hi tam?” atileh; mipa chu kinloi tah in ahung lhaijel’in Eli jong aseipeh tai.
Hichea hi Eli jong kum somko jen lhing ahitan, amit teni jong athimtan, hijeh chun amipa chu amuchen theipoi.
Chuphat’in mipan jong Eli jah a aseiyin, “Kei hi galmuna kona hung kahin, tunia gal kisatna galmuna kona hung jamdoh kahi,” ati. Hichun Eli’n jong, “Itobang banga iti nam chapa?” tia adoh a ahileh;

thupoa hungpa chun adonbut’in, “Israelte chu Philistine te masanga ajamcheh kahiu ahitai, mipi jong hathan ithat gam’uvin, nachapa teni Hophni le Phin’ehas jong chu athi lhon tan ahi; chujongle Pathen thingkong jong aman’uvin akilah tauve,” atitai.

Pathen thingkong ahinphah poh phat’in Eli jong atouna chunga konin anunglam kelkot phung koma chun ahung kileh lhan ahileh angong akitaboh-in athiden tai; ijeh-inem itileh Eli chu tehse behseh ta a, achung gih a chutia ahitai. Ama hin kum som li sungin Israelte chunga vai anahome.

Hichepet a hi amou nu Phin’ehas jinu jong chu agaiya asoh ding koncha ahitan, hiche nu jong hin Pathen thingkong min amanin, atehpu le ajipa jong athi lhontai, ti thu kisei chu ajah doh phat’in abungin anavah pai pai jenge; ijeh-inem itileh naoso nat chun ahinphah pai pai ahi.
Anavah na a athiden ding phat’in anaodoma pang numeinu chun ajah a, “Tija hih beh’in, ajeh chu naosen pasal khat nahing nai,” ativangin, aman la donjong adonbut tapon, jah jong ajah peh tapoi.

Naodom nu chun naosen chu “Israel lah a konin Pathen loupina akitolmang tai,” tin amin Ich’abod asah’e. Ipijeh-inem itileh acha hingnu chu atehpu le ajipa athin, Pathen thingkong ma min akilah tan ahi.
Hijeh a chu anao doma pang nun, “Pathen thingkong min akilah jeh hin Israelte lah a konin Pathen loupina akitolmang tai,” tia asei ahiye.
Philistine miten Pathen thingkong amat’uva alah phat’uvin Ebene’zer kiti laiya konin Ashdod geiyin apolut tauve.
Chuin Philistine mihon Pathen thingkong chu adom lhauvin Dragon kiti milimdoi kisemthu kikoina insunga apolut’uvin, Dragon koma chun atungdoh uvin ahi.

Ahin ajing jingkah jingpi tah-in Ashdoh kho mite athouvun ahileh, vetan, Dragon chu analhun, Pakai thingkong maiya chun alu tol lam ngan anakijam jengin ahi. Chuphat’in amahon jong Dragon chu aphongdoh loiyun akitunna ngaiya atungdoh kit tauvin ahi.

Ahivangin ajing kitnin jingpi tah a athouva ahileh, vetan Dragon chu angai ngaiyin ana lhu kit jengin, Pakai thingkong maiya chun alu tol lam nga ma man, Dragon luchang le akhut teni tanbohsan anaumin, tola alu asulut’in, lhong laiya anakijam kit tai; Dragon chu atahsa along keoseh apumin anaumin ahi.
Chuti ahijeh a tuni geiya jong Ashdod khoa Dragon thempu jouse leh Dragon insunga hung vah lut jousen Dragon kijamna lhong lai khu akenga achotpha ngai louhelu ahi.
Ashdod kho mite chunga Pakai huhamin ahung langin, mipi akichatsah-in, abonchan Ashdod khoa mite ahin agamsunga mite ahiuvin tijat umtah tah-in abol genthei lheh jengin ahi.

Thilsoh umchan thudol chu amudoh phat’uvin Ashdod kho miten aseiyun, “Hiche Israel Pathen thingkong kiti hi eiho koma um thei louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu hiche um hin eiho chungle i-pathen lim semthu u Dragon chunga Pathen thahat huham tah-in ahung lange,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuti ahijeh-in amahon mi asol’uvin Philistine te lah a alen alal jouse akoukhomsoh keiyuvin aseitauve, “Hiche Israel Pathen thingkong hi keihon i-kalo diu ham?” atiuva ahileh, amahon jong adonbut’uvin, “Chuti ahileh Israel Pathen thingkong hi Gath khovel dunga hinpo lut tauvin,” tin aseipeh tauve. Chuphat’in amahon jong Israel Pathen thingkong chu asei nau muna chun apolut tauvin ahi.

Hichea ahinpoh lut kit phat’uvin jong akhopi chunga Pakai ban thahat ahung lang pai kit’in, hahsatna nasa tah alha lut’in, khopi sunga miho chu gollhang hihen lang upa hijongleh genthei tah-in abol kit’in michunga uilut alansah tai.

Chuphat’in amahon jong Pathen thingkong chu Ekron kho lama athah doh kit tauve. Ahin Pathen thingkong chu Ekron khoa ahinthah lut phat’uvin, Ekron khoa mite chu akap jenguvin, “Hiche miho hin Israel Pathen thingkong hi eiho le imiteu thagam sah dinga eiho vel dunga jong ahinpoh lut kit’u ahitai,” tin a-eojahjenguve.

Hichejeh chun amahon mi asol’uvin Philistine milen milalte agakoukhom soh keiyuvin, “Hiche Israel Pathen thingkong hi thah manguvin lang aumna ma ma a gakoidoh jenguvin, keiho le kamiteu neitha gamsah hih beh uvin,” tin aseitauve. Ijeh-inem itileh hichea jong chu khopi sunga thi na khop hel a boina hung lut ahitai. Khopi chunga chun Pathen thahat nasa tah-in ahung lhungin,
mihem athi louse se jong chu uilut’in atu’uvin, akhopi mite pen gin kithong chu van gama akitungdoh peh tai.
Pakai thingkong chu Philistine mite gamsunga lha sagi agatham in ahi.
Philistine mihon thempuho leh gaothemho akoukhom’uvin, “Hiche Pakai thingkong hi i-kalo diu ham? Neihil’uvin aumna ngai amuna chu ipipen toh kasol tha diu ham?” tin adonguvin ahi.

Hichun amahon jong aseipeh uvin, “Israel Pathen thingkong chu thah doh ding nagot’uva ahileh akeova nathah doh louhel diu ahi; chonset thilto khat toh nasoldoh thauva nathah doh diu ahibouve. Chutengle nang hon dam na nanei diu, ipi dinga nachunguva lang Pathen ban thahat hi anakitoldoh thei louhel uham, ti jong nahetdoh dingu ahi,” atiuve.

Chuphat’in amahon jong adonguvin, “Thingkong dinga kabolpeh diu hiche chonset thilto natiu chu itobang hiya ong?” atiuva ahileh, amahonjong adonbut’uvin, “Sana tum nga le naichim lima kisem sana nga ma Philistine milen milal ho jat dunga nadondoh diu ahi; ajeh chu hitobang lima natna hi nang ho le namilen namilalteu chunga hung lhung ahi.

Hijeh a chu nang hon nagamsunguva lang uilut lim le naichim lim nasem diu, Israel Pathen chu loupi tah a nabol dingu ahi. Chuti hen lang hileh Israel Pathen chun nang ho chunga akhut lhakang domin tin, nang ho nagamsunguva pathen lim nasemthu chengseu dia nanop sah dom theiyu ahi.

Ipi dinga Pharaoh chun Egypt mite alungthim alouchalsah banga nang hon jong louchal lung naput diu ham? Ahivanga Pathenin amaho chu kichepna anei nunga Egypt miten Israel mite chu asoldoh tei teiyuva, hijeh a chu amaho hi hung doh jeng hilou hiuvam?

Hijeh chun tun jong bongkang thah leh khat sem’uvin lang, namkoljon pokha loulai hel bongpi anou noichep lai cheh ni gakaiyun, hiche bongpi teni chu bongkang thah chu pohsah-uvin, anou teni vang chu akom lhona konin inlama hin nung kailut tauvin.

Chule Pakai thingkong chu hindom’uvin hiche bongkang chunga chun tunguvin, chujongle athingkong chu apang dunga sana kijem pah leh thingkong khat sungma a khumson kit’un, hiche jeng jong chu chonset thilto dinga Pakai henga napehdoh tha diu ahi. Hiti chun thingkong chu thah dohuvin lang solmang tauvin.

Chutengle athingkong chu alampia kitolpai peh a agamsung lama Beth-shemesh geiya kitol lut mong mong nam, ve lhiu jinguvin, akitol lut jel a ahivang leh eiho hibang tah a eibol genthei uva hi Pakai ama hintin, akitol louva ahile vang eiho bol gentheiya pang hi Pakai ama khut lhah jeh ahipoi, acham chama hung sohdoh joh ahibouve, ti ihet doh thei diu ahi,” atiuve.
Miho chun hitobang hin asemuvin, chuin bongpi noitwi neipet ni agakaiyun, anigel lhonin bongkang chu akaisah uvin, anou teni lhon vang chu ina kulsunga ahen dentauvin ahi.
Chutengle Pakai thingkong chu bongkang chunga akhangdoh pai paiyun, chule thingkong len sana a naichim lim kisemna le uilut lim tampi kisemna chu alan akhumna tauve.

Bongpi teni chu jangkeiya Bethshemesh jotna lhang lamlen khatseh a chun achepeh lhonin, ache lhonin akijot suh peh peh lhon tan ahi; bongpi teni chu lamjet lamvei chajong kiheidoh louvin aum lhonin ache che jeng lhonin ahileh Philistine te milen milal jousen jong anung agajuipeh uvin, Beth-shemesh gamgi chan geiyin ajuipeh uve.
Hichepet hin Bethshemesh kho miten phaichama phailei dunga chun suhlou chang ana-at’uve; amaho chu akho dauva agah vet uleh Pathen thingkong chu amu’uvin, amuphat’in akipah thanom lheh jeng uvin ahi.

Bongkang chu Beth-shemesh khoa mi Joshua kitipa lou laiya ahung kitol lut’in, hikoma chun aki nga den tai. Hikoma hi song len tah ana um ahin, amahon jong bongkang chu aphe lhauvin thing din amang pai paiyun bongpi teni ma chu Pakai henga pumgo thilton atoh uvin ago nan bongkang thing chu amang tauve.

Chuin Levi mihon Pakai thingkong le akoma thingkong khat jong chu adom lhauvin ahileh, thingkong khatjoh sunga chun sana milim kisem ho jong chu anaume; chuin hicheho gei gei chun song lentah chunga chun akoisoh tauve. Hiche nikho hin Beth-shemesh kho miten Pakai henga pumgo thilto atoh uvin, kilhaina gantha tampi jong abol’uvin ahi.
Philistine te milen milal mi nga hon akitol lut jel chu amu phat’uvin hiche nikhoma man Ekron kho lama ahung kile kit tauve.

Philistine miten themmo jala thil to dia ahintou Pakai henga apehdoh sau sana tum chengse chu hicheng hi ahiye: tum khat chu Ashdod khopi thilto ahin, tum khat chu Gaza khopi thilto ding ahin, tum khatma chu Ashkelon khopi thilto ahin, tum khat jong Gath khopi thilto ahi, chule tum khat chu Ekron khopi thilto ahi.

Chujongle naichim lima kisem sana jong chu Philistine milen milal ho mi nga khopi jat dungjui le akho neo jat dungjuiya, khopi kulpi kikai khum hihen lang pal kikaikhum lou kho neo ho hijongle akitoh a atou ahi. Pakai thingkong tunna anei nau koma songtum lenpi chu Beth-shemesh khoa mi Joshua loulaiya khun tuni geiyin jong ahet toh nan aum jing nalaiye.

Pakai thingkong sung avet jehuvin Pakaiyin Beth-shemesh kho mite phabep jong a that tai; hiche Pakaiyin mi atha chu mihem som sagi alhinguvin, mipi lah a mihem chujat jen Pakaiyin athajengjeh-in mipin athiho pul adouvun aop ‘uve.
Chuin Beth-shemesh kho miten aseiyun, “Hitobang Pathen Theng, Pakai kitipa angsunga hi koipen pang jou ding hiya, koipen heng ajot touva eiho eidalhah diu hitam ?” atiuvin ahi.

Chujouvin amahon Kir’iathje’arim khoa chengte henga sottolle mi asol’uvin hitin agasei sah tauve, “Philistine ten Pakai thingkong chu ahinle kit tauvin ahi; hungleng lhauvin hung kipoh tou tauvin,” atiuve.

Hijeh chun Kir’iath-je’arim kho mite jong ahungun Pakai thingkong chu apotouvun, thinglhang vuma cheng Ahin’adab insunga apolut tauve; chuin Ahin’adab chapa Eleazarchu Pakai thingve tup dingin athensouvin ahi.
Masang Pakai thingkong Kir’iathje’arim khoa ahung kipoh lut kal kum som ni sung tobanga chu Israel insung pumpin Pakai holna ananei jingu ahi.

Samuel chun Israel insung pumpi jah a aseipeh in, hitin ati, “Nang ho nalungthim pumpiuva Pakai henga dinga hung kile kit mong mong nahiu ahitah leh nalah uva nakoiyu gamdang mite pathen lim semthu ho chengse chu paidoh uvin lang Ash’taroth jeng jong paimang un, Pakai lamjeng nalungthim in gel’uvin, ama kin jeng bou bol jouvin, chuti leh aman Philistine te khut’a kona nahuhdoh thei diu ahi,” atipeh-e.
Hijeh chun Israelten Ba al doiho le Ash’taroth chu apaimanguvin Pakai seh seh bou ahoutauve.
Samuel chun, “Israel pumpi Mizpah khoa gakou khomsoh keiyin, keiman Pakai henga nataopeh uving kate,” atin ahileh,

mihon jong Mizpah khoa chun akikhomsoh keiyun, twi agathal’uvin Pakai angsunga ahung lhauvin, hiche nikho chun an angol’un aseitauve, “Keiho Pakai douna chonse kahitauve,” atiuvin ahi. Mizpah khoa hin Samuel’in Israel chate thu anatanpeh jin ahi.

Mizpah khoa Israel chate akikhomtauve, ti thu ajah phat’uvin Philistine te milen milalte chu Israel sat din achetouvun ahi. Israel chaten amaho hung kitoltou thu ajah doh phat’uvin Philistine te chu akicha lheh jenguvin ahi.
Hijeh chun Israel miten Samuel jah a aseiyuvin, “Philistine te khut’a kona eihuhdoh thei tei teina diuvin Pakai i-Pathenu henga tao tao jengin lang tang louhel’in taovin,” atiuve.

Samuel jong chun kelngoinou noichep lai pet khat hi agamanin apumpi chun Pakai henga pumgo thilto din atohdoh tai; hitia hi Samuel chu Pakai henga Israel ataopeh a ahileh Pakaiyin jong ataona anop peh tai.

Samuel chun pumgo thilto atopet tah chun Philistine te jong Israelte del khum din ahung naitul tul jenguvin ahi; ahinla hiche nikho chun Pakaiyin Philistine te dounan van gin thumje jun agin sah in ahileh hiche van kithin gin nasa tah jeh hin Philistinte chu akisuh lung dong sah gamtan ahi; hijeh chun Philistine te abonchan Israel masanga akithe cheh soh hel tauve.
Chuin Israel mite jong Mizpah khopia konin apotdoh uvin Philistinte chu adelpeh uvin, Beth-car kiti noilam geiyin agasat chap jeng jung jenguvin ahi.
Samuel’in songtum khat alan Mizpah le Jesh’anah kikah a aphutdoh-in, a min jong Ebene’zer asah tai; ajeh chu ‘“Hikoma hi Pakaiyin eikithopiu ahi,” tina ahiye.
Hiti hin Philistine te chu anasu nem ‘uvin Israel gamgi sunga ahung vah lut kit tapouve. Samuel hinlaisen Pakaiyin Philistin te dou nan aban thahat aje jing jengin ahi.

Ekron khoa pat Gath chan geiyin Philistine ten Israel khopi alah jouseu jong anung lahsoh keiyun, hiti hin Israel miten Philistine te khut’a konin agamjouse akinung chudoh soh keitauve; chujongle Israel le Amor mite kah a jong cham analenge.
Samuel hin ahinlaisen Israel chung chang thu anatanpeh jing jengin ahi.
Kumseh le Samuel chu Bethelle Gilgal chule Mizpah khopi dunga avel vel’in akholjinin, hiche khopi mun dunga hi Israelte thu atanpeh jie.
Chule Ramah khoa chun ain aumjeh-in ahung kinungle jin, hikoma jong chun Israelte thudih tah in anavaihom peh in ahi; Ramah khoa hin Samuel chun Pakai dingin maicham khat asemdoh-e.
Samuel atehset behseh phat’in achapate chu Israel chunga thutan vaihom din apansah-e.
Samuel chapa apeng masapa chu amin Joel akitin, achapa ni lhinna pa min chu Abi’jah akiti; amani hi Beer-sheba khopia thutan vaihomin apang lhone.
Ahivangin achapa teni chu ama chon bangin achon lhon pon, pannabei thil ngai chat lama akihei mangin, nehguh pou akilah ji lhonin thu adih a tanlouvin akaleh lam chengin atanji lhonin ahi.
Israel mi upa chengse akikou khomsoh keiyuvin Ramah khoa Samuel henga ahungun,

chule Samuel jah a aseiyun, “Vetan, nangla nateh tan, nachapa teni mala nangma chon bangin achon lhon pon, hijeh chun tun nangman keiho din leng khat neilhendoh peh jenguvin lang ama chun namdang dang kibolna khun kachunguva lengvai po leh phante,” ahung tiuve.
Upahon ajah a, “Kachunguva lengvaipo ding leng khat neipeuvin,” tia aseiyu chu Samuel alung himon, chujeh chun Samuel jong Pakai henga atao tai.
Hichun Pakaiyin jong Samuel jah a ahinseiyin, “Mipin najah a asei jouseu khu abonchan ngai temin; amaho hin nangma napaiyu ahipon, achunguva leng chang keijoh eipaiyu ahitai.
Egypt gama amaho kahin puidoh nia pat tuni geiya keima eidon dauva pathen lim kisemthu achom chom ahouvuva keima eibolna bang banguva nang jong nabolu ahitai.
Hijeh chun tuhin athuseiyu nop peh jengin lang, amavang amaho hi nagihsal masah dim dema achunguva hung lengvaipo ding pan abolna ding chonchan lampi chu navetsah tei tei ding ahi,” ati.
Samuel jong chun ahenga leng khat neidoh ding thanoma hung kikhomho jah a Pakai thusei jouse chu abonchan aseipeh soh keiyin ahi.

Samuel’in aseitai, “Nachunguva lengvai hinpo dingpa hung chonchan ding alampi chu hitobang bang hi hi ding ahi: lengpa chun nachapa jouseu khomin tin ama kangtalai tol ding le sakol touva galsat a pang ding, ama kangtalai jouse masanga lamkai dinga apansah ding ahi.

Chujongle lengpa chun ama cham tah a sepai lamkai asang sang lamkai ding le som nga cheng lamkai ding geiya akilhen ding; mi abang bang aloubola apansah a, abang achang at dia apansah ding, chujongle abang bang jong gal manchah sema apansah a abang bang akangtalai manchah ding sempha dia apansah ding ahi.
Lengpa hin nachanu jouseu a bang bang thao namtui sem ding le anhon dinga akipui ding, changlhah kang dia jong akipui ding ahitai.
Chujongle lengpa chun naloumun phalai laijouseu akilah a, nalengpilei phalai jouseu leh olive hon phalai jouse alah ding asohte apeh ding ahi.
Na changu hopsoma khat le nalengpilei gau hopsoma hop khatjong alah a ama dinga vaibola pang ho le asohte vahna anei ding ahiye.
Chujongle nasohteu pasal phalai jouse le numei phalai jouseu jong akipuiya, nagollhang jouseu le nasangan jouseu aphalai lai alhendoh a aboncha chu ama ding na atohsah a agoi ding ahi.
Nakelngoi hon lah uva som a khat jong akilah ding ahitan, nangho hi ama soh a napan diu ahitai.

Hitobanga ahung umdoh ni ni chuleh nangho hi nang ho ma man nalhendoh u hiche nalengpau jeh a chu nahungka diu ahi; hijongle Pakai chun hitobang nikho chu ahung phat jongleh nataonau najah phah peh lou diu ahitai,” tin aseipeh tan ahi.
Asei vang chun mipin Samuel thuhi a ngaipeh tapouve; mipin aseiyun, “Ahipoi, keihon kachunguva vaihom ding leng khat kanei tei tei diu ahibouve,
chutile keiho jong namdangte tobana bang kahi diu, chutengle kalengpau chun kachunguva lengvai apoh a, kamasanguva lamkaiya kagal jouseu eisatpeh diu ahi,” atiuve.
Chuin Samuel jong chun mipi thusei chu abonchan a ngaisoh keiyin, asei jouseu chu Pakai nabeng sunga abang bangin aseipeh soh keitai.

Chutah chun Pakaiyin Samuel jah a ahinsei paiyin, “Amaho sei sei hi nomin lang, leng khat lhenpeh tan,” atipeh-e. Chujouvin Samuel jong chun Israel mite jah a aseiyin, “Mi koi koi hileh ama ama khopi cheh a kiche cheh tauvin,” tin asoltai.
Hiche lai chun Benjamin chilhah mihao tah khat anaumin, ama chu Aphi’ah chapa, Beco’rath chapa, Zeror chapa, Abiel chapa ahin, Banjamin phunga mi amin jong Kish kiti ahiye.

Kish hin chapa khat aneiyin amin Saul akitin, gollhang mel-hoi tah ahi. Israelte lah a ama sanga mel-hoi jo ana umpoi; mipi lah a chun alengkouva lhah chung lamse sen mi akhokhel soh keiyin, asangpene.
Phat khat hin Saul hingpa Kish kitipa sangante avah manguvin; hijeh chun Kish jong chun achapa Saul jah a aseiyin, “Soh ho khatpen pen hi kipuiyin, kipatdoh-in lang chen sangante chu gahol tan,” ati.

Hijeh chun Saul jong achen, Ephraim thinglhang gamsung ajotpeh-in, Shal’isha gamsung ajotpai peh vangin sangante chu amudoh lhon tapoi. Chuin Sha’alim gamsung agachon soh kit lhonin ahileh sangante chu anaum kit deh poi. Chujouvin Benjamin gamsung achot lhon vangin sangante chu amudoh deh lhon tapon ahi.

Zuph gamsung ahung lhun lhon phat’in Saul jong chun akilhonpi asohpa jah a aseiyin, “Hungo, kinungle kit ta hite, ikinungle loi louva ahileh kapa hin sangante joh khohsah tapon tin eini dinga analung kham behseh ding ahi,” ati.

Ahivangin sohpa chun ajah a aseiyin, “Ven, hiche khopia khun Pathen mi khat aumin, hiche mipa khu minthang tah ahi; aman asei tapou chu guilhung jeng jengji ahi. Eini ama heng ngap’a khun che hite, ijem itileh ama khun eihung kipatdoh lhona ikholjin lo na pen hi eiseidoh peh thei mai lhon ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Saul chun asohpa jah a, “Ama henga chu che ding gojong le hen ama chu ipipen ichoipeh thei ding ham? Idip sunga changlhah jouse la abeisoh tan, hiche Pathen mipa choipeh ding thilpeh thei khat’a khat cha jong aumpoi. Ipipen inei yam?” tia adoh a ahileh;
sohpa chun Saul chu adonbut kit’in, “Ven, ken dangka shekel khat hoplia hop khat kakoi nalaiye, keiman hiche hi Pathen mipa chu peleng, aman ijotna ding lampi eihil lhon tante,” ati.

Masang laiya chu Israel mite lah a mihem khat Pathen henga thudoh neinom auma ahileh, “Hunguvo, mitva neipa henga cheu hite,” kiti ahiuve; ijeh-inem itileh tulaiya themgao kitipa hi masang laiya chu mitva neipa kiti ahi.
Hichun Saul in jong asohpa jah a, “Nasei chu apha lheh jenge, hungo hungo, gache hite,” a tin; hiti chun Pathen mipa chenna khopi sunga chun agache lhon tai.

Khopi lam ajot tou lhonin lhang langa akaltou lhona ahileh khopi sung lama kona twithal dinga hung potdoh nu-ngah ho toh akitoh lhonin, amaho chu adong lhonin, “Mitva neipa chu um nai mo?” ati lhon leh;

amahon jong adonbut’uvin, “Umna chu; vetang, namasang lhona khu ama ahi; cheloi loi lhon ta, tubep’a hi khopi sunga hung lut hiya khu; achuti loule tunia hi mipin munsang dunga kilhaina gantha abolni diu hiya hi, nalap lhon lou thei ahi.

Akhopia khun galut lhonle chun ama namupai jeng lhon ding, munsanga an nea achetou kah a nagalap tei lhon ding ahi; ajeh chu ama ahung lhun kah sea mipin an aneh thei lou diu ahi, aman kilhaina sa chu phatthei aboh tei tei ding ahiye; chujou teng leh akikou mihon an aneh thei bep dingu ahibouve. Tutah hin chetou loi jeng lhonin, chutile ama nakitopi pai jong lhon ding ahi,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun amani jong khopi langa chun achetou lhon tai. Khopi sung agalut lut lhon chun Samuel jong munsang lama che dia amani heng lam jona ahung agah mupai jeng lhone.
Saul hung lhun masang ni masa nia chu Pakaiyin Samuel henga anaphondoh masah a hitia anaseisa ahi:

“Jing teng tuphat dontah hileh keiman nahenga Benjamin gamsunga kona hung mi khat kahinsol ding ahin, nangin ama chu kamite Israel chunga leng chang dinga thao nanu ding ahi. Amahin kamite Philistine mite khut’a kona ahuhhing ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh keiman kamite genthei hesohna kamudoh tan, chujongle ataonau kaheng ahung lhung tai,” ati.
Samuel in Saul chu agahmu mun Pakaiyin ahinhil paiyin, “Keiman najah a kaseipehsa mipa chu hikoma ahunge, kamite chunga vaihom ding chu ama hi ahi,” atipeh-e.
Chujongle Saul chun kelkot phunga chun Samuel heng lam ahinjon pai paiyin aseitai, “Lungset tah-in mitva neipa in chu hoilai ham neiseipeh temin,” atileh;

Samuel in jong Saul chu ahouvin, “Kei hi mitva neipa chu kahi; masan masan munsang lama chetou hite, tunia nangin keitoh an naneh khom ding ahi, jingkah tengleh navai konsah ing ting nangma lungthima um jouse abonchan naseipeh nange.
Nithum masanga na sangan avahmang ho chu gelkhoh hih hel’in, ajeh chu aboncha musa ahibouvui. Israel sunga koipen tah hi dei umpena nabol ham? Nang le napa insung mite ding bou hilou ham?” ati.

Saul injong adonbut’in, “Keima Benjamin chilhah kahin, Israel phung jouse lah a aneopen kahilou ham? Benjamin phunga jong keima insung hi alhasam pentah hilou ham? Achutile iti dola nangin hitobang pia hi kajah a thu nasei jeng hi tam?” ati.
Samuel chun Saul le Saul sohpa chu apuiyin kikhopna insunga migun ja umdola kikou loi upate lah a chun atousah-in, loi upa cheng jong chu somthum jen tobang ahiuve.
Chuin Samuel chun anhonpa jah a, “Sachan achomin anakoijo, tia kaseipeh a kapehsa chu tun hinchoi tan,” atileh;

anhonpa chun sakeng le ating chu agaladoh-in Saul angsunga aluipeh tai; hichun Samuel in jong aseiyin, “Vetan, sa anakikhen khen chu na-angsunga akiluiye; hiche nen, aphat kitep ahung lhin kah a dia nang dinga anakikoi jing ahin, nangman jin ho hitoh naneh khom ding kidei ahi,” atipeh-e. Hiti chun Saul in jong hiche ni hin Samuel toh an anekhomtai.
Chuin munsang lama kona khopi sung langa ahung lenlhah-uva ahileh, inchung khat’a hin Saul lupna din jalkhun dosan anaumin, hikoma chun Saul jong aihmu din akijam tai.

Jingkah khovah lhah phatin Samuel in jong inchunga lum Saul chu akouvin, “Hung thou tan, keiman nalam jotna lang dinga nasol tange,” ati. Hijeh chun Saul jong athouvin, ama jong Samuel jong kholaiya apotdoh lhon tai.

Achesuh suh lhona khopam aphah lhon phat in Samuel chun Saul jah a aseiyin, “Sohpa khu eini masanga ana masa din seipeh-in lang, ama achepai teng leh nangma chom khat hikoma hin ding ta din, keiman Pathen thusei chu kaseipeh a kahetsah ding nahi,” ati.

Samuel chun thaohai khat aladohin Saul lujanga asun khumin, chuin abeng achop’in aseitai, “Pakaiyin nang hi Israel chate chunga leng chang dinga thao nanusa hilou ham? Hijeh a chu nangman Pakai mite chunga lengvai napoh a chujongle akimvela amelmateu khut’ a kona amaho hi nahuhhing ding ahi. Pakaiyin nanghi agoulo amite chunga leng chang din thao nanu tai, ti melchihna chu hitia hi hung um ding ahi:

Tunia hi nangman kei neidalhah a nache mang teng Benjamin gamsung Zelzah khoa Rachel lhankhuh a chu mini natopa ding, amani chun najah a, “Aholgun dia navaikonlo sangante chu akimutai; vetan, napan sangante agelpha tapon nang ni nalung khampeh lheh jeng lhonin hitin aeeiye, “Kachapa hi hoilam kahol ding hi tam?” tin aseiye,’ ana tin te.

Chule hichea kon chun che gamla jepkit le chun Tabor a gangpi phung gageiyin natin, Bethel khoa Pathen henga che ding mi thum namu kit ding, mi khat chun kelngoi nou thum hinpon tin, mi khatma chun changlhah lhon thum ahinpoh ding chule mi khat kitma chun lengpitwi pengthei dimset khatma ahinpoh ding ahi.
Hiche mi thum ho hin nangma salam nabol’uvin tin changlhah lhon ni napeh diu ahin, nangin jong akhut’uva kona nakilah jeng ding ahi.

Hiche jou teng hileh Gib’eathelohim kiti lai chu nahinphah ding ahitan, hikoma hi Philistine te sepai hon khat umah ahiuve; hikoma hi khopi sunga nahung lut teng munsang lama kona hung kitolsuh themgao hon khat natopa ding, amaho hin selangdah asaiyuva, khutbeh abeh diu, kuli amut’uva amasanguva semjang asaipeh diu, gaothu ahinsei sei jeng dingu ahi.
Chutah le Pakai lhagao nachunga thahat tahin hung pansan tin, nangin jong themgao ho chutoh gaothu nasei khom’uva, michomhela nakikheldoh ding ahi.
Hijeh chun hitobang melchihna ho hi natokhah tengleh nakhut te nia namai khah chan bol jengin, ajeh chu Pathenin napanpi jinge.

Chule keima masanga Gilgal langa nachesuh masah ding ahin, ven, kei jong nang heng lama chu pumgo thilto toh ding le kilhaina gantha thilto toh dinga kahung ding ahi. Nahenga kahung kahsea ni sagi sunga neina nga ding, keima kahunga nangma bol ding thil kahung vetsah ding nahi,” ati.
Samuel dalha dinga Saul chu agah kile heiya ahileh Pathenin lungthim chombeh khat apetai; chujongle melchihna hijatpi chu chuche nikhoma man ahung alhung soh hel’in ahi.

Gib’eah ahung lhung lhonin ahileh, vetan, themgao hon khat hin Saul analam touve; chutah chun Saul chunga Pathen Lhagao tha neitah-in ahung pansan, hijeh chun aman jong themgao ho lah a chun gaothu aseipai pai tai.

Hichun masanga Saul anahesa jousen themgaoho toh gaothu aseikhomu amudoh phat’uvin miho chu khat le khat akihou lhiuvin, “Kish chapa chunga khu ipi hung chua hi tam? Saul kitipa jong hi themgaoho lah a pang ngap ngap hitam ?” akitiuve.

Chujongle hiche muna mi khat chun agah houvin, “Hiche ho hi apa ahingpau koipen hi nga na ?” atin ahileh, hijeh chun hiche hi thuchih khat’in akiseilo tan, “Saul kitipa jong hi thamgao ho lah a pang ngap ngap hi tam?” akitilo tai.
Saul chun gaothu asei chai chaiyin munsang laiya ahung tan ahi.

Saul chu agang pan ama jong asohpa jong anadongin, “Hoilam bep’a gache nahilhon hitam ?” anati. Saul in jong, “Sangante hoi lea kache lhon ahin; akimudoh lou ding kahet phat lhona Samuel henga gachepai kahilhone,” ati.
Hichun Saul gangpa chun aseiyin, “Samuel chun ipi naseipeh lhon am, lungset tah-in neiseipeh temin,” tin adong kit’e.

Hijeh chun Saul in jong agangpa jah a chun, “Samuel chun sangante akimudoh soh tai, tin kichen vel vul’in eiseipeh lhone,” ati. Amavang lenggam thudol vang Samuel seiho chu Saul in imacha cha agangpa jah a aseidoh poi.
Samuel chun Mizpah khoa Pakai henga hung kikhom din mipi akoukhom soh keiyin,

chule Israel chate jah a chun aseitai, “Pakai Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye; ‘Egypt gama konin keiman Israel kahin puidoh-in, Egypt mite khut’a kon le nang ho bol gentheiya pang lenggam jouse tha neina konin kahin puidoh tauve,’ atin ahi.

Ahinla tuni geiyin jong nang hon hamsetna tin tang le gim gentheina jousea kona nahuhhing jiuva na-Pathenu chu napaitauve; hichan gei jeng jong chun, ‘Ahipoi, keiho chunga vaihom ding leng khat neipeuvin,’ natiuvin ahi. Hijeh chun tun nang ho le nang ho Pakai angsung laitah a naphung phungin, namijat jat’in asang sangin hung kitindoh temuvin,” atin ahi.
Hiti chun Samuel’in jong Israel phung abonchan ahinpui lut soh keiyin ahileh Benjamin phung chu vang kisan na ahung pang khai.

Samuel jong chun Benjamin phunga mite chu ainko kon ahinpui lut soh keiyin ahileh Matri insung chu vangin akisandoh tai; ajona keiyin Samuel’in jong Matri insung mite chu amichang cheh a akoulut a ahileh Kish chapa Saul kitipa chu vangin akisandohin ahi. Hichun mihon Saul ahol’uva ahileh amudohjou tapouve.

Chuphat’in mihon Pakai adong kit’uvin, “Hiche phun phatna mipa hi hikoma hungsa hi tam?” atiuva ahileh, Pakaiyin jong, “Ven, thilkeo lah a khun hiche phun phatna pa hi ama le ama agakisel bouve,” ati.
Hijeh chun miho alhaijel’uvin Saul chu akiselna a konin agakaidoh tauve; Saul chu mipi lah a ahung din phat’in mipi lah a chun alengkouva lhah chung lam chu midang jouse sangin asang joi.

Hichun Samuel’in mipi abonchauva jah a aseiyin, “Pakaiyin alhendoh pa hi namu u hitam? Mipi hijat lah a hin ama tobang koima aumpoi,” atln avetsah-e. Chutah chun mipi abonchan a-aosot jenguvin, “Lengpa hingsot hen!” atiuve.

Samuel in leng thaneina kona lengpa thunei dol leh atoh ding akin jouse chu mipi aseipeh soh keiyin, chujongle aseise se chu lekhabua ajih doh-in abonchan Pakai angsunga akoiden tan ahi. Chujouvin Samuel chun mipi abonchan ama ama inlam cheh a asoltai.
Saul jong chu Gib’e-ah khoa ainlama achen, Pathenin alungsung asuh halsa cheh pasal galhang mihon akilhon piuve.

Hichea hin mihem pannabei phabep khat’in vang, “Hiche Saul hin eiho iti eihuhhing jou diu ham?” tin aseiyuve. Chujongle Saul chu donlou dailouvin akoiyun, kipaman thilpeh imacha jong ahinchoipeh pouve. Hijongle Saul chu lung damselin a um nai.

Hiche lai hin Ammon mi Nahash kitipa chu ahung kontouvin Ja’besh-gilead kho ahung umtai; hijeh chun Jabesh kho miten Nahash jah a aseiyuvin, “Keiho koma kitepna khat neiyin lang keihon jong nangma na tong uving ting nalhachan pang tau vinge,” atiuvin ahi.

Ahivangin Ammon mi Nahash chun ajah uva aseiyin, “Nang ho toh kitepna kasem theina ding chu hiti ding ahi: namit changu jetlamse se kaldoh ing ting, Israel pumpi chunga vetdana kaphondoh a chutengle kasem thei ding bou ahi,” tin aseitai.

Chuphat’in Jabesh kho upa hon Nahash jah a aseiyun, “Chuti ahileh ni sagi sungin neikho ngaiyun nei ngah ta diuvin, keihon jong Israel gamsung pumpia mi sol’uving ting, koimacha keiho huhhing jou aum louva ahileh keiho le keiho kacham’uvin nahenga kipedoh nau vinge,” atiuve.
Mi asolu, sottolle ho chu Saul chenna Gib’eah kho ahung lhun phat’uvin amahon jong athu umchan dol abonchan mipi jah din aseipeh tauve; hijeh chun mipi jong abonchan hakan akap jenguvin ahi.

Saul chu loulama konin ahung vailhungin bongchal te nunga ahunge; hichun Saul injong, “Ipipen tah athoh lel’u hiya mipi hi kap jen jun hiuvam?” tin adonge. Chuphat’in mihon jong Jabesh kho mite thupoh kisei chu Saul jah a aseipeh tauve.
Chutah chun Saul’ in hiche thu kiseiho hi jah jah chun achunga Pathen Lhagao thanei tah in ahung pang pai jengin, hijeh chun Saul jong alung asoujah jeng tai.

Bongchal tokhat amanin, athat’in sachen phatah’in ahomin, abonchan Israel gamsung pumpia hiche sottolle ho chu agahomsah pai paiyin hitin thu athot’e, “Koi koi hijongle Saul le Samuel nungjuiya gal hung konlou tapou chu abongchal hitobanga hi kibolpeh ding ahi!” ati. Chujongle Israel mipi chunga Pakai ginna ahung chun hijeh chun mipi chu kitoh tah in mihem khatseh bangin kilompel’in akitol jenguve.
Saul chun Bezek kiti laiya chun mipi asimtoh’in ahileh Israel chate chu sang jathum alhinguvin, Judah mijeng jeng jong sang somthum alhinguve.

Sottolle ho chu ahung kile kit phat’uvin mihon ajah uva aseiyun, “Ja’besh-gil’ead kho mite jah a chun hi tin gaseipeh tauvin: ‘Jing teng tuphat don nisa sat-ham laitah a hi nang ho nakihuhdoh diu ahi,’ gatiuvin,” atiuve. Chuin sottolle ho jong chu acheuvin Ja’beshgil’ead kho mite agaseipeh uva ahileh amaho jong akipah lheh jenguvin ahi.
Hichejeh chun Jabesh mihon aseiyun, “Jing teng vang leh keiho le keiho kacham chamin hung kipedoh jengu ving ting, nang hon pha nasah lam lama neibol diu ahitai,” tin Ammon mite chu aseipeh tauve.

Ajing nikhon Saul in jong mipi chu loithumin ahom khenin, jingpi phelvah donin ngahmun lailunga ahung kitollut jengun, Ammon mite chu nisa sat-ham geiyin asat chap deh duh tauve; ahingdoh chasun jong chu akithecheh soh hel’uvin mihem ni jeng jong mun khat a kidalha khoma aumtapoi.

Chutah chun mipin jong Samuel jah a, “Koipen tah ham, ‘Keiho chunga Saul kitipa hi lengvaipoa pang thei hina ong?’ tia seiya chu? Hitobang miho chu keihon that jeng uving kate, hinkaidoh uvin,” atiuve.
Ahinla Saul chun ajadan, “Tunia mihem koimacha jong kithat thei louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu tunia hi Pakaiyin Israelte lah a huhhingna ahinpoh lut ni ahibouve,” tin aphal tapoi.
Chuin Samuel jong chun mipi jah a aseiyin, “Hunguvin Gilgal langa cheu hitin, lenggam um ding dol chu gasei phau hite,” ati.

Hijeh chun mipi abonchan Gilgal lam jonin akitol’uvin, Gilgal khopia Saul chu Pakai angsunga lengin asemdoh tah beh tauve. Hiti chun Pakai angsunga chamna kilhaina thilto gantha abol’uvin, Saul jong Israel mite jong hapan akipah soh keiyuve.
Samuel chun Israel pumpi jah a thu aseiyin, “Ven, keiman nang ho sei jouse abonchan kanop peh-in, nachunguva vaihom din jong lengvaipo ding leng khat kasempeh tauve.

Hijeh chun tun vetau, namasanguva lengpa lamkaiya panga hita khu; keivang kateh tan kasam jong akang tai, hijongle veuvin kachapa teni hi nang ho koma aum lhon nai; kei hi kaneo laiya pat tuni geiya nang ho lamkaiya anapang jing jeng kahi.

Keima hikoma hi Pakai le ama thaonusa alengpa angsunga kei le kei kihonga thusei kahi : Keiman koipen bongchal kalahpeh khah a, koipen sangan kalah khah am? Mi koipen kajoubol genthei khah am? Ahilou jongle ima kimumo sahna dinga mihem koipen khut a kona nehguh kalah khah um tam? Ahea auma ahileh neiseipeh uvin, keiman lesah kit nange nang ho din,” ati.
Mihon aseiyuvin, “Nangman keiho jouvin jong neibol khapouvin, boljong neibol genthei pouve, chujongle mihem koima khut’a konin jong nehguh nakilah khapoi,” tin aseipeh tauve.

Chuphat’in aman jong ajah uva aseiyin, “Kei chunga nang ho adihlou thil imacha namudoh pouve, ti hi tunia ahettoh a pang Pakai jong ahin, athaonusa alengpa jong ahitai,” atileh; mihon jong adonbut’uvin, “Ahinai, ama chu ahetoh a pang ahi,” atiuve.
Chuphat’in Samuel jeng jong chun aseiyin, mipi jah a, “Mose le Aaron ama lhacha anapansah a napu napateu Egypt gama kona hinpuidoh pa Pakai ama chu hettohsah a pang ahiye.
Hichejeh chun tun pang det chet’uvin, keiman Pakai angsunga hi nang ho thalhenga hiche Pakai hin nang ho le napu napateu huhhingna abolpeh jouse chung chang thudola kataopeh ding nahiuve.

Jacob jong Egypt gama achelut chun Egypt miten ama jong achate jong abol gentheiyun, hijeh a chu napu napateu jong Pakai henga ataovuva ahileh Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron asolpeh in, amani chun Egypt gama konin napu napateu ahinpuidoh lhonin hikoma hin anachensah lhon tai.

Ahinla Israel miten a-Pathenu asumil tauvin hijeh chun Pathenin amaho chu Hazor lengpa Jabin sepai lamkaiya pang Sisera kitipa khut ‘a anajoh mangin, Philistine mite khut’a jong ajohdoh jengin, Moab lengpa khut’a jong anapedoh tai; apehdohna mihon Israelte chu anasat satjiuve.

Ahin Israelte chu Pakai henga ataovuva, “Keiho kachonseuvin, Pakai kadalhauvin, Ba al doi kisemho pou Ash’taroth doi kisempou kahoutauve; hijongre tun neihuhdoh tei teiyun, hiche kagal mite khut’a kon hin, keihon nangma hou nau vinge,’ atiphat’uvin;
Pakaiyin jong Jerubba’al le Barak toh, Jephthah le Samuel ahinsolpeh in, amaho hin jet le veiya namelmateu khut’a konin nahuhdoh tauve; hijeh chun nang ho jong lung mongin nachengtauve.

Chuin Ammon mite lengpa Nahash kitipa chu nang ho dou dia ahung namu phat’uvin nang hon kajah a naseiyuvin, ‘Ahipoi, keiho chunga jong leng khat vaihomle aphai,’ natiuvin, Pakai na-Pathenu nalengpau ahilam nageldoh pouve.
Hijeh chun tun vetan, nang hon nakilhensau lengpa, nathum thumu lengpa hi; ven, Pakaiyin nachunguva vaihom ding leng khat atun ahitai.

Chuti ahin, nang hon Pakai nagin’uva, ama nahouvuva, athusei nanit’uva, Pakai thupeh nadou dauva chule nang ho nahiuva nang ho chunga vaihom nalengpau hijongle Pakai naPathenu nung nung najuiyuva ahileh nang ho dinga thilpha hi ding ahi.
Pakai thusei na ngaidauva, Pakai thupeh douna thil nabol vangu leh nang ho le nalengpau douna Pakai hung panga abangol ahinlhah ding ahi.
Tun pang det chet’uvin lang namit’uva Pakaiyin thil nasa tah ahinbol hiche hi vetem’uvin.

Tulai hi suhlou chang at lai hilou ham? Keiman Pakai henga tao leng aman van akithin sah a go ajuhsah jeng ding ahi; hiche teng chuleh nang hon nacham cham’uva leng nadei chat’uva nakithum jengu hi Pakai mitmua itobang tah a thilse naboldoh mong mongu hitam, ti namudoh diu nakihetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Samuel jong Pakai henga ataovin ahileh Pakaiyin hiche nikhoma man van akithinsah pai paiyin go ahinjuh sah-e; chutah chun mipin jong Pakai le Samuel chu gin’a tin aging soh keitauve.

Mipin abonchauvin Samuel henga aseiyun, “Kathi louna diuvin nasohte dingin Pakai henga neitaopeh tei teiyuvin; ijeh-inem itileh keihon kachonsetnau hijatpi chunga leng khat ka-ngeh uva hitobang thilse tah hi kabolbe kit’u ahitai,” atiuve.

Chuphat’in Samuel’in jong mipi henga aseiyin, “Hiche thilse hi boldoh jeng tajong leu chun kichat datauvin; amavang Pakai nung najui nauva konin kihei mang dauvin lang, Pakai chu nalungthim pumpiuva nahou diu akinbola napan diu ahi;
nakihei manguva nang ho naphat chompi thei louvu, huhjong nahuhhing thei louvu pannabei hel thil hi nadel joh louhel diu ahi, hiche ho hi pannabei ahibouvui.
Ijehinem itileh Pakai hi minthang tah ahin, ama min khohsahna jala amite chu apai mang hel lou ding ahiye; ajeh chu nang ho hi ama mite hisah ding hi Pakai lungdei lam anahi.
Kei dinga vang chu nang ho taopeh louva kauma Pakai douna thil kabola kachonset louhel ding ahi; nang ho thilpha lam le lamdih jeng hil ding hi keima kin mong mong ahi.
Nang hon Pakai chu nagin’uva chule nalungthim pumpiuva ama kin jeng nabol’uva kitah tah a ama nahou diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nang ho khohsahna a aman itobang tah a thil nasa abol hitam vetem uvin.
Amavang nang hon thilse naboltei teiyuva, melse tah a nachon’uva ahivang leh nang ho jong nalengpau jong leivui theh ngim banga nakitheh ngim hel diu ahi,” tin aseitai.
Saul ahung lengchan chun akum lhingset kikhan lhitset ahitan, Israel chunga kum ni sungin lengvai anapoi.

Saul in Israel lah a konin pasal sang thum alhengdoh in, mi sang ni chu Saul toh akivop’uvin Michmash kiti lai leh Bethel thinglhang gamsunga aumuvin, mi sang khat vang chu Jonathan toh akiloiyuvin Benjamin gamsunga Gib’e-ah khoa aumuve; midang amoh chengse vang chu Saul in ainlama anung solsoh keiyin, ama ama ponbuh cheh akijotsah tai.

Jonathan hin Geba khoa touvah Philistine te sepai hon khat chu akisat pin ajoutai; hiche thu hi Philistine miten jong ajasoh tauve. Chuin Saul jong chun gamsung pumpia saki pengkul mut’in agamut len hitin aseiye, “Hebrew mite ngaisoh keiyuvin,” ati.

Israel mite jousen ajah doh phat’uvin, Saul chun Philistine te ajou mong mong tan, asepaiteu asu-lha tai, chujongle Israel kiti hi Philistine mite din vetda aum lheh tai, ti ahedoh tauve. Hijeh chun Israel mipi chu Saul panpi din akikou khom’uvin, Gilgal a chun akikhomtauve.

Philistine te chu Israelte toh kisat din mijat akisim’uvin ahileh kangtalai jeng jong sang somthum ahin, sakol touthem mihem sang gup alhingin, chule sepaite la atam behseh jenguvin twikhanglen panga neldi jat mong mong bangin aumtauve. Philistine te chu ahung kontouvun, Beth-a’ven niso lama Michmash kiti laiya chun ngahmun asemuvin a pang tauve.

Philistine ten ahinneh chintou amudoh phat’uvin Israelte chu acham chamuvin songko dung pou, thinghom dung pou, songpi noi dung, lhankhuh dung pou chule twinah hom dung pouva akisel tauve; ijeh-inem itileh mipi chu mihon nasa tah a aneh chinto jengu ahi.
Abang bangjong Jordan vadung palmun dunga ajam galkaiyun Gad le Gilead gamsung lama achetauve. Saul vang chu Gilgal a aum nalaiyin, mipi tamtah in jong ama nung chu kitihot pum pumin ajui nauve.
Samuel in phat atep peh dungjuiyin ni sagi sunga anga vangin Samuel la Gilgal langa ahung tapon, chuphat’in mipin jong Saul chu adalhauvin akithe cheh cheh tauve.
Hijeh chun Saul in jong aseiyin, “Pumgo thilto dingle chamna thilto ding chu kei henga hinchoi jenguvin,” a tin; hiti chun Saul amatah akipanin pumgo thilto atoh tai.
Saul in pumgo thilto aboljou jouvin vetan, Samuel jong ahung lhung tai; chuphat in Samuel kimuto pi din Saul jong apotdoh pai paiyin salam agabole.

Ahin Samuel chun, “Ipi dinga nahiti chon hita ong?” atileh; Saul in jong, “Nangma nakitepna phat dungjuiya nahung da a, mipima kakoma kona akithe cheh cheh jenguva, chujongle Michmash muna ma Philistine te galbol dinga kisimtohsa kamudoh phat’a,

ken jong kaseiya, ‘Tua hi Philistine ten la Gilgal muna eihin nosuh jeng diu ahitan, keiman Pakai lung lhaina taona kabol hih laiye,’ tia kei le kei kaki engbola pumgo thilto hi kanatodoh jeng ahitai,” ati.

Chuphat’in Samuel’in jong Saul jah a chun, “Nangman ngol hoi tah in thil naboltai; Pakai na-Pathenin nathupeh hiche Pakai thupeh jeng jong chu nanit tapoi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Israelte chunga nangma lenggam aphudet ding atonsot geiya aumsah ding ahitan;

tuvanga nangma lengvaipohna lenggam hi chejom jing lou ding ahitai; Pakaiyin ama lungput hethem mi khat akiholdohsa ahitan ama chu Pakaiyin amite chunga leng chang dia alhensa ahitai; ajeh chu nangman Pakaiyin nathupeh chu nanit tapoi,” ati.
Samuel jong akipatdoh pai paiyin Gilgala konin Benjamin gamsunga Gib’e-ah kho langa achetou tai. Saul chun ama panpi mipi chu asimtoh- in ahileh pasal jagup tobang bep ahiuve.
Saul le achapa Jonathan toh chule apanpi lhon mipi chu Benjamin gamsunga Geba khoa aumden tauve; Philistine te vang chu Michmash kiti laiya chun ngahmun asem ‘uvin a pang nauve.
Chuin michom din Philistine te ngahmuna kon chun mihem loithum jen ahung kijot doh-uvin; loi khat’in Ophrah lam ajon’uvin, Shu’al gam langa acheuve;
Loi khatma chu Beth-boron lama acheuvin, chule loi khat kit chu gamthip langa Zebo’im phaicham gah kisuh vetna gamgi langa chun akiheiyun achetauve.

Israel gamsung pumpia chu thihkheng them mihem khat’ a khat cha jong kimudoh loulai hel ahi; ajeh chu Philistine ten, “Hebrew mite hin acham cham’uvin chemjam le tengcha kikhen get’uvinte,” tia anakha ahi.

Hijeh a jong chu Israel mi kiti tapou chu abong tupeh kinol hem ding jenga jong, atupeh kheng ding hihen, aheicha kheng ding hijongleh, akoite kheng ding hijongle Philistine te henga gachesuh peh ji ahiuve.
Thih khen man chu bongtupeh le tupeh khat khat man dia shekel khat hop thuma hopni ahin, heicha nol-hem man le hamchem jetjang man dinga shekel khat hop thuma hop khat ahiye.

Hitobanga kigahna jeh hin galpi kisat nin Saul le Jonathan toh pang khom mipi chu khatcha beh jong akhut’a chemjam ham tengcha ham kichoiya akimudoh hih hel’e. Saul le achapa Jonathan vangin akichoi lhonin anei lhon nai.
Hichun Philistine sepai khat Michmash lampi langa ahung potdoh-in ahi.

Nikhat hi Saul chapa Jonathan chun agalvonpoa pang gollhangpa jah a chun aseiyin, “Hungin galkai hitin gal lang khat’a Philistine sepaite lah a khun gache hite,” tin atemtai. Ahivangin Jonathan in ache ding chu apa jah a aseipoi.
Hichepet a hi Saul chu Gib’e-ah khopam chin, Migron kiti laiya kolbuthei phung noiya aumpet ahi; Saul to pangkhoma mipi chu pasal jagup tobang bep ahiuve;

chule Ahijah kitipa, Ahitub chapa chun, Ahitub hi Shiloh khoa Pakai thempupa Eli chapa Phin’ehas chapa Ich’abod kitipa sopipa ahi, thempuvon anakivonin ahi. Mipin Jonathan potdoh lam chu anahepha pouve.
Jonathan in Philistinte sepai lah a chelut ding agotna lampia chun lamjet lamveiya songpi kochet chut khat gel anaumin ahi; songpi khat chu amin Bozez akitin, songpi khatjoh chu amin Seneh akiti.
Songko khat chun Michmash maiya sahlam angan, songko khatma chun Geba kho mai lam lhang lam sang angai.

Chuin Jonathan injong agalvonpoa pang gollhangpa jah a chun aseiyin, “Hungin hiche cheptanlou mite sepaite henga khun gache tem hite; Pakaiyin eipanpi tei lhonin tin, mihem tampi hihen lang lhomcha hijongle Pakaiyin mi ahuhhingna hi imachan asuhmo deh louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Jonathan galvonpoa pang pan ajah a aseiyin, “Nalunga nagel gel chu boljengin; ven, keiman kalhonpi jinge, nalung gel bang bang chu kenjong kagel ahiye,” atipeh-e.
Chuphat’in Jonathan chun aseitai, “Ven, eini miho henga khu igal kai ding, eini le eini amaho khu igakimusah ding ahi.
Amahon eini jah a, ‘Nakom kahinphah kahseuvin anapang lhonin,’ tia aseiyuva ahileh, eini jong idin dinna ipandet ding, amaho chu ideltou lou ding ahi.

Amavang amahon, ‘Eihin jon tou tau,’ tia aseiyuva ahijongle ijot tou jeng ding ahi; ajeh chu Pakaiyin amaho khu eini khut’a apeh dohsa ahitauve. Hijeh a chu hiche hi amelchihna hi ding ahi, eini dinga,” ati.

Hiti hin Jonathan le asohpa chu anigel lhonin Philistine te sepaiho agakimusah lhonin ahileh, Philistine ten aseiyuvin, “Ven, ven Hebrew mite khu akiselnau songko sung dunga konin ahung potdoh tauve,” atiuvin ahi.

Chutah chun Philistine sepaiten jong Jonathan le agalvonpo pa chu achouvun aseitauve, “Hung kontouvun keiho henga hin, keihon kabol chah ding nahi lhone,” atiuvin ahileh; Jonathan in agalvonpopa jah a aseiyin, “Kanung hinjui touvin, ajeh chu Pakaiyin amaho khu Israel mite khut’a apeh dohsa ahitauve,” ati.

Hiti hin Jonathan chun akhut teni le akeng tenia pan akaltouvin, ahileh, agalvonpopan jong anung ajui touve. Philistine te chu Jonathan masanga apang jou tapouvin, Jonathan thamoh cheng jong chu anunga agalvonpopan ahinthat toupeh kit tai.
Hichea Jonathan le agalvonpopan agatha masah lhon mihem jat mong mong chu pasal som ni tobang alhingin, athana lhon jong gam leiset neocha sung bongtupeh lam khat sung tobang bou ahi.

Chutah chun Philistine te ngahmun sung ahin, loujao dung ahin mipi lah geiyin jong tijatna nasa tah ahung lut tan, sepaite leh michom gama pang ho geiyin jong akitihot lhul gamtauvin ahi. Leiset jeng jong akihot nem leu jengin a hileh, tijatna lentah ahung soh doh tan ahi.
Benjamin gamsung Gib’e-ah khoa Saul dia kho ngah a pang mihon agah veuvin ahileh vetan, mihonpi chu lang khat lang khat’a akihonlul akihonlul jenguvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Saul in jong apanpi mipi jah a aseiyin, “Kisimtoh loiyun lang kivetem’uvin eiho lah a kona koipen apotdoh um am?” atileh; mihon jong asim loi tauve; hichea vetan, Jonathan le agalvonpoa pang pa chu anaum lhon tapoi.
Hichun Saul in jong Ahijah henga aseiyin, “Pathen thingkong chu hilama hinpo lut loiyin,” ati. Ijeh-inem itileh hichepet’a hi Pathen thingkong chu Israel chate toh kilhon khom jing ahinai.

Saul in chuta thu aseiya thempupa toh akihoupet jeng jong chun Philistine te ngahmun lailunga boina akhangtul tulin, mipi kinon lei lui chu akhoh cheh cheh jenge; hijeh chun Saul in jong thempupa jah a aseiyin, “Nakhut ladoh tan,” ati.

Chutah chun Saul le apanpi mipi abonchan akigol toh soh keiyuvin galmuna adellut tauve; hichun vetan, Philistine te chu khat le khat chemjamin akituto jenguvin, alah uva noh phahna nasa tah aumdoh tan, akisudong lheh jeng tauve.

Chujongle Hebrew mite masanga Philistine mite ngahmuna anauma anatonguva anapang jouse jong chu ahung kile hei kit’uvin Saul le Jonathan to pang khom Israelte joh chu ajop’uvin gal asat hujo tauvin ahi.

Hitobangma hin Ephraim thinglhang gamsunga amaho le amaho acham chama kiselgua Israel chaten Philistine te chu ajampan tauve, ti ajah phat’uvin amahon jong hangtah-in anungu ahindel kit’uvin galmuna ahung lut tauve.
Hijeh chun hiche nikho hin Pakaiyin Israelte anahuhdoh tan, gal kisat jong chu Beth-a’ven kalpeh a akitoldoh peh tai.

Hiche nikho jong hin Israelte chu agim lheh uvin ahi; ajeh chu Saul hin mipi chunga kitepna khat aseiyin, hitin ati; “Keiman kamelmate chunga phu kalah tokah sen, nilhah geiyin koiman an netheiponte, anea auma ahileh gaosap chang jeng hen,” anati. Hijeh chun mipi lah a koimachan jong an aneh hih hel’uvin tep jong atep pouve.
Mipi abonchauva gammang lah a ahunguva ahileh tollah a chun khoilhah anakaiye.

Hitia mipi chu gammang ahung lut’uva ahileh vetan, khoiju chu avachet chut jenge; ahivangin mihem khat’a khat chan jong akhut jungin akhoiyin alehsam pouve; ipijeh-inem itileh kitepna kigahna chu mipin agin cheh-u ahiye.

Ahin Jonathan chun apa thusei mipi agihna chu anajapon, hijeh chun aman jong akhut’a akichoi tenggol mong hem chun khoiphang agah sunin adekot phat’in akhut jungin aleh tai; hichun Jonathan jong amit ahung hahsal dom e.

Hichun mipi lah ami khat chun, “Napan mipi hi nasa tah a agihsala ahahsel ahin hitia aseisa ahi, ‘Tunia an nepen pen chu gaosap chang jeng hen,’ ati ahiye,” atipeh-e. Mipi vang alel lheh jenguvin alhasam gamtauve.
Chuphat’in Jonathan chun, “Kapa hin gamsung mi abolgen thei bep ahitai; veuvin keiman hiche khoiju hi them khat kagah tekhah a ahileh kamit teni ahung hahsal dom jenge.

Mipi jong hin amelmateu thilkeo gal thila achomdoh jouseu hi tunin aning anop’in nejeng leu iti phat’a pha ding hi tam; ijeh-inem itileh Philistine mite lah a akithat jat mong jong hi atam behseh hih laiye,” ati.
Hiche nikho hin Israelten Michmash kiti laiya pat Ai’jalon geiyin Philistine te asat chap jeng jung jenguvin ahi. Ahinla mipi vang achol lheh uvin ahi.
Mipin gala kithe thang thilkeo chu akichom’uvin, kelngoi jouse le bongchal jouse chule bongnou jouse jong akilah uvin, tollhang dunga asatlih lih jenguvin, mipin gancha ho chu athisan pumin aneuve.

Chuin mi phabep’in Saul henga aseiyuvin, hitin atiuve, “Ven, mipi hin sa thisan pumin aneuvin Pakai dou nan achonsetauve,” atiuve. Saul in jong aseiyin, “Nanghon keima joule nal a neibolu ahitai; hikoma hin songtum lentah khat kahenga hintang lut’uvin,” ati.

Chujongle Saul chun aseiyin, “Nang ho nacham chamin mipi lah khun kihomjah uvin, chule mipi jah a chun, ‘Mi koi koi hijongle ama ama bongchal cheh akelngoi cheh hin kaihen lang hikoma hung kithau hen asa neu hen; koiman sa athisan pumin neh da hen lang chule Pakai dou nan chonset da hen,’ gatiuvin,” ati. Hijeh chun agaseiyun ahileh mipin hiche nilhah jan chun ama ama bongchal akoma akihen cheh ahinkai uvin hikoma chun akitha cheh tauve.
Saul in jong Pakai dingin maicham khat asem e; hiche maicham asem hi Pakai henga maicham asem amasapen anahi.

Saul chun aseiyin, “Jan teng leh eihon Philistine mite nung juisuh uhitin, jingkah khovah lhah kahsen abonchan gachom uhite; alah uva mihem khat’ a khat cha jong khenpou hite,” ati. Mipin jong ajah a, “Nangin pha nasah sah chu boljengin,” atiuve. Ahivangin thempupan aseiyin, “Ahipoi Pathen henga chelut masa tadiute,” ati.
Hijeh chun Saul’ in jong Pathen adongin, “Keiman Philistine te nung kadelsuh ding ham? Nangin amaho khu Israelte khut’a napehdoh ding hinam?” atileh; Pathenin hiche nikho hin Saul adonbut poi.
Chuphat’in Saul jong chun aseiyin, “Nang ho mipi lamkai chengse nabonchan hilama hunglut tem ‘uvin; chujongle itobanga hiche chonset hi tunia hung umdoh hitam hung veuvin lang hechen tem uvin.

Israelte huhhingpa Pakai chu hing jing ahi, ijemtin hiche chonsetna hi kachapa Jonathan hin abol khah hijeng jong leh ama jeng jong thitei tei ding ahi,” ati. Ahin mipi lah a chun mihem khat cha jong adonbut’a aumpoi.

Chuin Saul in jong Israel mipi jah a aseiyin, “Nang ho lang khat’a panguvin lang keile kachapa Jonathan lang khat’a pang lhon nange,” ati kit’ a ahileh; mipin jong Saul jah a, “Nangin pha nasah sah chun boltan,” atiuve.

Hijeh chun Saul jong ataovin, “Vo Pakai Israel Pathen, ipi dia nangin tunia nalhacha keima neidonbut lou hitam? O Pakai Israel Pathen, hiche themmona hi kei chung ham kachapa Jonathan chung ham a um ahijongleh Urim akisan teng hinphong doh tei teiyin; chujongle themmona chu namite Israel chunga um ahivangleh Thummim akisan teng hinphong doh tan,” ati. Hichea hin Jonathan le Saul akimandoh tan, mipi vang chu aongthol tauve.
Hichun Saul in jong, “Kei le kachapa Jonathan kikah jenga jong vang san kit nalaiyun,” atin asan’uva ahileh Jonathan akimantai.

Chutah chun Saul in Jonathan jah a aseiyin, “Ipi mong mong nabol hitam neiseipeh tei teiyin?” tia adoh changmela ahileh; Jonathan jong chun aseipeh paiyin, “Keiman kakhut’a kanachoi tenggol mongin khoiju them khat kasu nat’in kaleh nai; keima kahinai, thi jeng ing kate,” atitan ahi.
Hichun Saul jong chun aseipaiyin, “Jonathan, nangma nathi lou pou pouva ahileh Pathenin keima eithat jeng hen,” atitai.

Chuphat’in mipin jong Saul jah a aseiyuvin, “Israelte lah a hitobang galjona eisodoh peh theiyu Jonathan iti moh thi jeng ding ham? Thi lou ding ahi! Pakai ahing jinge, Jonathan samjang khat jeng cha jong tola lhamang thei louhel ding ahin, thilou ding ahi; ajeh chu tunia aman Pathen kithopina jala gal eijosah jeng theiyu ahi,” atiuve. Hi to bang hin mipin Jonathan chu alhatdoh tauvin, hijeh chun Jonathan jong athi khatapoi.
Chujouvin Saul jong Philistine nung adelna a konin anung chen atoukal kit tai; Philistine mite jong chu amaho gam langa akichetauvin ahi.

Saul in Israel chunga lengvai anapoh chun jetle veiya amelma agalte jouse asat’in, Moab mite adouvin, Ammon mite adouvin, Edom gam asat’in, Zobah lengte jong akidoupin, Philistine mite jong anadouve; akiheina lam lama miho chu amelse cheh in alhajin ahi.
Saul chun hangtah in gal anasat jin, Amalek mite jong anasat gamin, Israel mite chu amaho chomgam gam mite khut’a konin anahuhdoh soh keiye.
Saul chapate chu Jonathan le lshvi toh chule Mal’chishu’a ahiuve; achanu teni chu amin lhon hiche teni hi ahi : apeng masa aunu min chu Merab akitin, chule adongjo anaonu min chu Michal akiti.
Chujongle Saul jinu min jong Ahin’o-am ahin, amanu hi Ahim’a-az kitipa chanu ahiye. Chule Saul sepaite gal lamkaipa min chu Abner akitin, ama hi Saul pa-ngahpa Ner chapa ahi.
Kish kitipa chu Saul pa ahin, Abner pa Ner pa chu Abi’el ahi.

Saul hinlaisen Philistine te toh kidouna kisatna hahsa a um jing jengin ahi; hijeh chun Saul in jong pasal hat khat amudoh a, gal-hang mi khat tou amudoh pou poule hitobang mi chu amato kithodin apansah jeng jengjie.
Samuel chun Saul jah a aseiyin “Pakaiyin amite Israel chunga lengvaipoa pansah dinga nangma thaonua eihinsol ahi; hijeh chun tun nangman Pakai thusei jouse ngaiphan.
Thanei pentah Pakai chun hitin aseiye, “Israelte Egypt gama kona ahung kitoldoh laiyuva Amalek miten lampi dunga anabol nau chu keiman tua kalethuh ding ahi.

Tun nangma chen lang Amalek mite gasugam in, anei jouseu jong sumang hel’uvin, khen nei hih hel’uvin, pasal numei, naosen le nao noichep lai jong, bongchal jong kelngoi jong, sangongsao le sangan jeng jong that gamhel’uvin,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Saul in jong Tela’im kiti laiya chun mipi akoukhom soh keiyin asimtoh a ahileh, kenga galbol thei akenga lamjot cheh hung kikhomse se chu sang ja khat alhingin, Judah mi sang som ahiuve.
Chuin Saul jong ahungin Amalek mite khopi ahinjot’in, phaicham laiya chun achang pang tai.

Hichun Saul in jong Ken mite jah a “Cheuvin lang jamdoh loiyun, hiche Amalek mite lah a kon hin potdoh uvin kitolsuh loiyuvin, achutilouva ahile ken Amalek mite hitoh kasuhgam tha ding nahiuve; kasuh mang nomlouna chu Israel chate Egypt gama kona ahung potdoh laiyun nang hon khoto tah-in nabol nauve,” ati. Chuphat’in Ken mite jong Amalek mite lah a konin apotdoh tauvin ahi.
Chujouvin Saul chun Amalek mite akisat pin Havilah khoa pat Egypt gam niso lam Shur kho geiyin agajou peh tan ahi.
Saul in Amalek mite lengpa Agag kitipa ahingin amanin, mipi vang abonchan chemjam hemin athat gamsoh hel’e.

Saul le Israel miten Agag lengpa le kelngoi hoilai jouse, bongchal phalai jouse athao lai jouse toh, kelngoinou aphalai lai toh ahing hoiyuvin, amoh suhgam hel deh pouve; thil lah theilou ho leh pannabei chengse vang chu asumang hel tauve.
Pakai thusei Samuel henga ahung lhungin hitin ahung ti:

“Keiman Saul kalengchansah hi kakisih tai; ajeh chu ama akile heiyin keima eijuidan, kathupeh chengse jong aboldoh tapoi,” ati. Chutah chun Samuel jong alung hang tan, hijeh chun Pakai henga jan khovah hel’in ataove.

Samuel jong jingkah jingpi tahin athouvin Saul kimupi din achen ahileh, lampia mihon Samuel jah a anaseiyun, hitin atiuve, “Saul chu Carmel molsang lama ahunge, vetan, Saul chun ama le ama kihet jingna thil khat akisemin, akiheiyin achetai, chule achepai paiyin Gilgal lam alhahsuh tan ahi,” tin ahil tauve.
Chuin Samuel jong Saul henga ahungin ahileh, Saul chun Samuel jah a, “Nangma Pakai din nun nom jingin, ajeh chu keiman Pakai thupeh kamolsoi,” anati.
Ahinla Samuel chun aseipai jengin, “Ahile kanabeng te nia kelengoite pen jen jun hi ipi hiya, bongchalte butgin kajah jah hi ipiba ham?” tin a dong tai.

Saul in jong aseiyin, “Hiche ho hi mihon Amalek mitea kona ahinkaiyu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh mipi hin kelngoi hoilai jouse leh bongchal phalai jouse hi Pakai na-Pathen henga kilhaina gantha a tha dia akhenu ahiye: adangse vang kasugam hel tauve,” ati.
Chuin Samuel chun Saul jah aseiyin, “Kho ngaiyin, tujan a keijah a Pakaiyin thu asei chu ken naseipeh inge,” atileh: Saul jong chun, “Seiyin seiyin,” ati.
Chutah chun Samuel injong aseitai. “Nangma mitmua nang hi neocha kive nahin, nangma hi Israel phung hijatpi luchangpen nahi hi lou ham? Pakaiyin Israel chunga lengvaipo dia thao nanu ahime.
Hichea hin Pakaiyin galbol din nasolin, hitin aseimen, “Chen lang mi chonse, Amalek mite khu abonchan gasugam tan, kisat pin kidoupin, abeihel masang seuvin nga hih hel in, ati ahi.
Chutia asei ahin, ipi dinga nangman Pakai thusei nanit lou ham? I pi ding mong monga gal kisatna thilkeo thang ho chu kinopsahna naneiya Pakai mitmua thilse agilou jeng nabol hitam?” ahung ti.

Ahinla Saul chun Samuel jah a aseiyin, “Keiman Pakai thusei kanit nai, Pakaiyin eisolna bang bangin gal kakonin, Amalek lengpa Agag ahingin kahin kaiyin, adang Amalek mite abonchan kasugam soh hel nai.

Hichea hin mipin gal kisatna thilkeo thang ho kelngoi hihen bongchal hijongle suhmang dia umsa amang thah dingsa chu aphalai lai alhendoh uva Gilgal khoa Pakai na-Pathen henga kilhaina nei dinga akilah-u ahibouve,” ati.

@@Chuphat in Samuel in anoiya thuchih hi aseitai: “Pakai chu athusei akingaiya akipa banga Pumgo thilto le kilhaina kibol hoa kipah hinam! Vetan, Pakai thusei ngai ding hi Kilhaina sanga phajo ahin, Kangcha athusei ngaipeh kiti hi Kelngoichal thao sanga deijo ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh doumah lam bol kiti hi Kithoiya chonset tobang bang ahin, Louchal kiti jong hi Doi houva themmo chan tobang bang ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh nangman Pakai thusei napai tan. Aman nangma lengchan nahaisah ahitai.” ati.
Chuphat’in Saul chun Samuel jah a aseiyin, “Keima achonse kahitai: ijehinem itileh Pakai thupeh le nangma thusei kasukhel gamtan, mipi kagin jeh chun amaho thun kanachonjo tai.
Hitajongle tua hi nahenga katao ahi, kachonsetna ngaidamin lang, ken jong Pakai kahou theina din neinung pui kit tan,” atileh:

Samuel injong Saul jah a aseipeh in, “Keiman nang nanung pui thei taponge; ipijeh-inem itileh nangman Pakai thusei nadondan, Pakaiyin jong nang hi Israel chunga leng nahina a kona napaidoh ahitai,” atipeh-e.
Chuin Samuel chu chemang dinga akiheiya ahileh Saul’ in jong asangkhol chol mongin atuhchah den jengin, asangkhol chu a-ehlo tan ahi.
Ahivangin Samuel chun Saul jah a aseipeh paiyin, “Pakaiyin Israel lenggam hi nang khut’a kona tunia hi aloi lhah a nang sanga phajo nasopi khat apehdoh ahitai.
Chujongle Israel Loupina Pathen chun ajou jong asei louhel ding, alung jong akhel kit lou ding ahi: ajeh chu ama hi mihem ahipon, alung akhel ding ahipoi,” ati.

Chutah chun Saul in jong aseiyin, “Keima achonsea kahi hijongle kamite upaho angsung le Israel chate angsunga neimel khun lang, ken jong Pakai na-Pathen chu kahou thei tei teina din neinung puitei teiyin,” atinalaiye.
Chuphat’in Samuel jong Saul nung lama chun akinung heiyin ahileh, Saul chun Pakai chibai aboh pai pai tan ahi.

Samuel’in aseiyin, “Amalek mite lengpa Agag kitipa chu kahenga hinpuidoh tem ‘uvin,” atileh; Agag chu achamtah- in thanom seuvin ahungdoh paijenge. Agag hin, “Athilou ding kahi mong mong hitante,” tia anagel ahi.

Ahinla Samuel chun aseipai jengin, “Nangin nachemjam a pasal jouse natha numei jouse chahing louva nakoi bang banga nangma nu jong numei lah a chahing louva um ding ahi,” atin; Gilgala chun Pakai angsung laitah a Samuel’in jong Agag asat lhun asattel jeng jung jenge.
Chujouvin Samuel chu Ramah kho langa achetouvin, Saul jong Saul chenna kho Gib’e-ah langa ainlama achetou tai.
Samuel chun athi ni geiyin Saul chu amu kit tapoi; ahin Saul chung changa Samuel analung kham lheh jengin ahi. Pakaiyin jong Israel chunga Saul lenga anatousah chu akisih lheh jengin ahiye.

Pakaiyin Samuel jah a aseiyin, “Keiman Israel chunga lengvai apohna kona kiladoh ta a nangman Saul dia itih chan geiya nalung khampeh peh ding ham? Chusangin nasaki sunga thaotwi kithal dimin lang che jengin; keiman Bethlehem khoa mi Jesse kitipa henga chu kasol ding nahi; ijeh-inem itileh Jesse chapate lah a khu keiman kei dia leng chang ding khat gonsa kakoi ahitai,” ati.
Ahivangin Samuel chun aseiyin, “Saul in jadoh le eithalo ta ding iti kache thei ding ham?” ati. Chuin Pakaiyin aseipeh-in, “Bongla khat kikaiyin lang, ‘Pakai henga kilhaina bol dinga hung kahi,’ tin.

Chule hiche kilhaina gantha kibolna a hin Jesse jong koulut le chun, ipi nabol ding ti keiman navetsah ing ting nahil nange; hichea hi keiman kaminphah pen pen chu nangman kei dinga thao nanu jeng ding ahi,” ati.
Samuel chun Pakai thupeh bangin abol’in, Bethlehem khopia ahung tai. Kho upate chu kitihot pum pumin Samuel lamto din ahunguvin aseitauve, “Lung monna thudola hung nahi hinam?” tin adonguvin ahi.

Samuel jong chun aseipeh-in. “Lungmon thudola hung kahinai: Pakai henga kilhaina gan that dia hung kahi: nangho le nangho hung kisil thenguvin lang kilhaina phunga chun kei koma hunguvin,” ati. Hiti chun Samuel in Jesse le achapate asuthengin amaho chu kilhaina gan kithana a chun akoutai.
Jesse te chu ahung phat’uvin Samuel chun aven Eliab chu amuphat’in, “Pakai thao nusa chu hiche ka-angsunga dingpa hi hiteiyin te,” tin ageltai.
