Ahinla Pakaiyin Samuel jah a aseiyin, “Hichepa hi alimso amelput le asan dan hin vetdan, ajeh chu keiman ama jong kalah lou ahibouve; ipijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin mihem thilvet tobanga avetji ahipoi, mihemin vang apolam melput avet ahin, Pakaiyin alungthim sung joh avet ahi,” atipeh’e.
Chuin Jesse chun Abin’adab chu akoulut kit’in ama jong chu Samuel angsunga agahsol pai kit’e. Hichea jong hin Samuel in, “Hichepa jong Pakaiyin alhen ahipoi,” atikit tai.
Chuin Jesse’n jong Shammah chu asolpai kit’in ahi. Ahinla hichea jong hin Samuel’in. “Hichepa jong Pakaiyin alhengdeh poi,” ati.
Hiti hin Jesse’n achapa sagi jen chu Samuel angsunga asol lut soh keitai: ahivangin Samuel chun Jesse aseipeh-in, “Hiche ho hi Pakaiyin alhengpoi,” atipeh- e.

Chujongle Samuel chun Jesse adongin, “Nachapate aboncha hikoma umsoh kei hitauvam?” atia ahileh, Jesse’n jong “Alhumpen pa aum nalaiyin, hijongle vetan, ama khu kelngoi ching ahibouve,” ati. Hichun Samuel’ in Jesse jah a aseiyin, “Mi sol loiyin lang ama chu gaholdoh sah loiyin; ajeh chu ama hikom ahung lhun kahsea eiho tou louhela idin din jeng diu ahi,” atitai.

Hijeh chun Jesse’n jong mi asol loiyin achapa lhumpen chu agapui lut sah tai. Ama chu avouso ahoiyin, amit-ha jong ahoi lheh jengin, amelput ahoi lheh jenge. Hichun Pakaiyin Samuel jah a, “Kipatdoh- in lang amahi thao nun, ama hi ahiye,” ati.

Hijeh chun Samuel jong chun athaotwi sakithei chu alan asopite lah a ama chu thao anutai; hiche nikhoa pat chun David chunga Pakai Lhagao thanei tah in ahung pangin aum jing tan ahi. Samuel jong akipatdoh pai paiyin akho lam Ramah lang achetai.
Pakai Lhagaovin Saul ana kivoppi chu adalhan, Pakaiya konin lhagao gilou khat ahungin Saul chu abol genthei lheh jeng tai.
Chuphat’in Saul sohten ajah a aseiyuvin, “Vetemin, tua hi Pathena kona hung lhagao gilou khat’in nangma nabol genthei ahitai.

Hijeh chun kapuuvin thu neipeuvin lang nangma angsunga um nasohte hin semjang saithem mi khat gahol tauvinge; hitobanga Pathena hung kon lhagao gilou hin nabol genthei phat phat le ama chun semjang saiging ji ji leh nangma dam tan nate,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun Saul in jong, “Asaithem tah khat neigahol peh tauvin, ama chu kahenga hinpui lut’uvin,’ ati.

Hichun gollhang ho mi khat chun adonbut’in, “Ven, keiman Bethlehem khoa mi Jesse kitipa chapa, hitobang semjang saithem tah, gal hang tah mi, galmi mong mong, thuseiya jong themtah, lung khomto tah mihem, chule Pakaiyin aumpi jing mi khat kamun ahi,” ati.
Hichejeh chun Saul in jong mi asolloiyin Jesse henga chun, “Nachapa David kelngoi chingpa chu neihinsol peh tei teiyin,” agatisah-e.
Hichun Jesse’n jong changlhah pheng nga alan chule lengpitwi savun peng dimset khat toh agonpeh-in, achapa David chu Saul henga ahinsol tai.
Hiti hin David jong ahungin Saul lhacha akinbolin ahung lut tai. Saul in jong David chu alungset lheh jengin, hijeh chun David jong chu ama galvonpon apangtai.
Chuin Saul chun Jesse henga mi asolin hitin agatisah-e, “David hi keima natongin panden sah jeng tan, ajeh chu ama hi kamit vet’in kadei lheh jenge,” ati.

Itih hijeng jongle Pathen henga kona lhagao gilou chu Saul chunga ahung chuh tengleh David chun semjang chu akipat jeng jin akhut te nin asai sai jeng jie; hitah chuleh Saul jong akitha-ol jin ahung damdoh jin ahi, chule lhagao gilou chun adalha ji tan ahi.

Hichelai hin Philistine te jong Israelte toh kisat din akigouvin asepaiteu akhomsoh hel tauve; amaho chu Judah gamsunga Socoh kiti laiya akikhom ‘uvin, E’phes-dam’min gamsunga Socoh le Aze’kah kikah laiya chun ngah mun akisemtauve.
Chuphat’in Saul le Israel mite jong akikhom’uvin Elah phaiya ngahmun akisemuve ;chujongle Philistine te dou din galmuna pang dingin akigol’uvin ahi.
Molvuma chun Philistine mite a lang khat’ a adinguvin, hiche molvum ma ma chun alang khat’a Israelte apanguve; akikah laiyuva phaicham khatseh akikhangin ahi.
Hichun Philistine te ngahmuna konin mi khat, Gath khoa hung kon, gal-hat tah amin Goliath kiti khat hi ahungdoh in, ama hi asandan jong tong gup le khap khat alhinge.
Goliath kitipa hin alua sum-eng lukhuh akikhuh in, thih sangkhol’in akitomin, hiche thih sangkhol seh seh jong chu agihdan sumeng to kihal ahivangin shekel sang ngajen alhingin ahi.
A-ngal peng te nia jong chun sum-eng ngaltomna akitomin, chule alengkou teni jong chu sum-eng jol’in akiveiye.
Ateng lung jong talhang tejen ahin, chule atengpeh jeng jeng jong agih jat shekel jagup ahin, thih jeng ahi; apho poa pangpa chu amasanga achejin ahi.

Goliath kitipa hi ahung dingin Israel gal lamkaite heng lam ngan kholhang ahinsamin, “lpi nagel’uva nang ho hi galmuna panga galbol dia hung kon nahiu vam! Kei hi Philistine mia neibol louvu hiya, chule nang ho jong Saul lhachate nahiu hilou ham? Nang ho le nang hon mi khat hin kilhendoh-uvin lang ama chu kahenga hung konsuh hen.

Ama chu ahat a keito kisat jouva apana keima eitha jeng tah a ahileh keiho Philistine te hi nang ho soh a kapan jeng diu ahi; amavang ken ama chu kajoa, katha a ahileh nang ho keiho soh a napan uva keiho natonga naum diu ahitai” ati.
Hiti hin Goliath kitipa Philistine mipa chun aseitai. “Tunia hi keiman Israel lamkaite kasuh jum nahiuve; keima kisatpi thei ding mi khat neipeuvin,” tin asam sam jenge.
Saul le Israel pumpin hiche Philistine mipa thusei jouse hi ajah phat’uvin alungu athoisoh tan, akicha behseh jeng tauve.

David kitipa hi Judah gamsung Bethlehem khopia cheng Ephrath mi amin Jesse kitipa chapa ahin, Jesse hin chapa getjen ana neiye. Saul seilet lai hin Jesse kitipa vang hi atehse tan akum jong atam lheh jeng tai.

Hiche nikhoa hi Jesse chapate aupapen le abana te nin Saul nung ajui lhona galmuna hung lutpeh ahiuve; Jesse chapa mithum galmuna hung lut ho chu aminu, apeng masapen pa Eliab ahin, ama bana anaopa Abin’adab ahin, chule athum lhinna pa min Shammah ahi.
Achapate lah a David hi alhumpen ahitan, achapate lah a aupa cheh mi thum chun Saul nung ajuiyun,
David vang chu Saul heng le Bethlehem khoa apa kelngoi vah dingin nung che mache atho jingin ahi.
Nisom li sungin Philistine mipa Goliath hi aniseh le ahung jin adinna ngaiya a hung dingin jingkah a pat nilhah geiyin hitin abol jing jenge.
Jesse hin achapa David jah a aseiyin, “Hiche changlhah kansa hi na-ute din Ephah som khat tou pon, hikoma changlhah lhon som hitoh pon, aboncha hin ngahmun lama khun na-ute gathah vah tan;
chule bongnoiha thei som jong hi sepai asang sang lamkai ho din poh tha peh tan. Na-ute ito bang bang nauvam, gaven lang amahoa konin melchih thei thil khat beh kahenga hinpo lut tan.” tin asol tai.
Saul le Israel mite chule Jesse chate chu Elah phaiya chun Philistine te toh akisat sat jenguve.

David jong jingpi tah in athouvin, kelngoite chu aching ding mi angansen, buchun chengse chu akipoh in neh le chah ding kigong chutoh apon, Jesse’n ahil bang bangin achetai; ngahmun ahung va lut lut chun sepaite galmun lama chun akijot’uvin gal asam sam jenguve.
Hitobang chun Israel le Philistine te chu galsat din akigol cheh uvin, sepai le sepai akidinte jeng tauve.
Hichun David jong chun athilpoh athilkeo ho chu mi khat anganse loiyin gal lamkai ho henga alhaijel’in, achen asopite, aute chu salam agabol tai.

Hitia hi a-ute ho toh akihoupet tah uvin vetan, Gath khoa hung kon Philistine mi gal-hang amin Goliath kitipa chu Philistine gal lamkaite lah a konin ahung potdoh kit’in masanga asei ngai bang bangin thu ahung sei kit tan ahi. Athusei chu David in ajatai.
Goliath amudoh phat’uvin Israel mite chu abonchan amapa koma konin ajam mang soh hel’uvin, hagin ginin aging jenguvin ahi.

Chujongle Israel mite akidong touvin, “Hichea hung kondoh pa khu namu u hitam? Hichepa khu Israel sucheh ding mong monga hung kondoh ahitai; mi koi hijongle hichepa that joupen pen vang chu Israel lengpan haona jouse apeh a achanu toh akichensah ding, Israel mite lah a ama inkote apa insung mite jouse chu achamlhat sah jeng ding ahi,” akitiuve.

Hichun David jong chun akoma dingpa jah a, “Hiche Philistine mipa that’a chule Israel mite jumna paimang theipa chu ipi kibol peh ding ham? Ijeh-inem itileh hiche cheptan lou Philistine mipa khu koi itobang lom hiya aman hing jing Pathen sepaite hi ajumso ding ham?” atileh;
mipin David chu kitoh del’in adonbut’uvin, hitin aseiyuve, “Hichepa that pen pen chu akiseisa bang banga kibolpeh ding ahi,” atisoh keiyui.

Miho jah a David in hitobanga thu asei chu a-upa Eliab chun ajadoh tan, hijeh chun Eliab jong David chunga alung hang jah jengin aseitai, “Ipibola chu hikoma hungsuh khoh nahim? Kelngoi them khat kinei chu gamthip noiya koipen toh nahin dalhah tha ham? Thil ima namoh ngap chat chat a nalungthim phat lou chu ken kahetsa ahinai; hichea jong hi gal kisat ve dinga hi hung hitei veh ta chun ong,” tin aphoh tai.
Hichun David in jong aseipaiyin, ‘Tua chu ken ipi kabol tah ong? Athu mai maiya kasei nah lai hilou ong?” ati.
Ahivangin David chu ama henga konin akihei mangin michom khat aven asei ngai bang chun asei kit tan ahileh, mipin jong amasa a bang bangin adonbut kit’uve.
David thusei chengse chu ajah doh soh phat uvin mihon Saul henga avel’in agaseipeh tauve; hijeh chun Saul in jong David kou din mi ahinsol pai tai.
Hichun Saul jah a David chun aseitai, “Mihem koimacha jong hiche Philistinepa jeh khun lung lha hih hel hen; nasohpa hi kon ing ting ama khutoh gakisat nange,” ati.

Ahin Saul chun David jah a aseiyin, “Nangma hiche Philistine mipa khutoh kidou dinga kon a gakisatpi thei hoi nahipoi; ijeh-inem itileh nangma khangdong chabou nahi nalaiyin, amavang khu agollhan laiya pat’a galmi mong mong hung hipehsa ahitai,” atipeh e.
Chuphat’in David hin Saul henga aseipeh tan, “Nasohpa hin kapa kelngoite kachin ji ahin, ijemtia sakei bahkai ham, vompi ham ahunga kelngoi hon lah a kona kelngoinou khat tou akimatdoh teng jong leh
keiman anung kadel jin, kaga jep lhu jin akamsunga konin kelngoinou chu kagachu lhah peh jin ahi; hichea hi keima eihindela ahileh abahsamin kaman jin toljep nan kaneiyin, kathat ji tai.

Hitobang hin nasohpan sakei bahkai jong vompi jong kathat jou nai; hiche Philistine te mipa jong khu cheptan lou ahin, hiche gamsa ho to bang khat chubou hilou ham, aman hingjing Pathen sepaite ajumso so jeng kimu cheh ta khu,” ati.

Chujongle David chun aseiben, “Pakaiyin keima sakei bahkai tinhem laiya eihuhdoh a, vompi tinhem lah a jong eihuhdoh a ahileh, hiche Philistine mipa khut’a kona jong eihuhdoh tei tei ding ahi,” a tin ahi. Hichan asei phat chun Saul injong David jah a, “Chen kisatpi tan, Pakaiyin panpi mai hen!” atitai.
Chuin Saul chun agalvon amanchah jouse David agonpeh in, aluchanga sum-eng thih lukhuh khat akhuh peh in, thih sangkhol chol khat a-ahpeh-in ahi.

Hiti chun David jong chun agalvon chunga chemjam akikon ahileh, chatmo helin akimoh kanchah lo tai; ijeh-inem itileh David chu hiche ho manchah je them kha louhel anahi. Hichun David in jong Saul jah a aseitai, “Keima hiche manchah ho pum hin gal konthei ponge; ajeh chu amanchah je kathempoi” a tin, hiti chun David in amachah jouse asut lhatan ahi.

Chuin David chun atenggol akhut’in akichoiyin, vadung laiya song chang jolsel cheh chang nga agakilon, akelngoi chinna sakhao asong chang dip sunga kipoh-in, asongsena bomcha chu akhut’a akichoiyin Philistine mipa ajot lut paitai.
Philistine mipa jong chun ajon pheiyin David chu ahin nailut pai paiyin, amasanga chun apho poa pangpa ahunge.
Chuin Philistine mipa chun aven ahileh David chu amudoh tan anoise behseh jenge; ijeh-inem itileh David chu khangdong chabou ahinalaiyin, avouso ahoiyin, amelput jeng jong amoh hoisil sel nalaiye.
Hichun Philistine pan David jah a aseiyin, “Kei hi uicha kahiya nangin moljol nakichoiya kahenga nahung ham?” ati. Chujongle Philistine pa chun David chu adoithu jouse apanin agaosap tai.
Hiti hin Philistinepa chun David henga aseitai, “Kahenga hung pou pou tan, keiman kamaltela chunga leng vachate leh gamlah a gamsate vahna kanei ding nahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in David jong chun Philistine pa jah a aseipeh-in, “Nangma chemjam to tengcha toh chule tenglung toh thoa kahenga eithat dia hung nahin; keivang nangman nataitom tom jeng Israel sepaite Pathen, Pakai thanei chung nungpenpa min pana nathat dia hung kon kahi.

Tunia hi Pakaiyin nangma kei khut’a eipeh doh ding ahitan, ken jong nangma nasep lhung ting nalu katanboh ding ahi; chutengle Philistine mite sepai thilong hung kijam ding ho chu tuni ma ma a chunga leng vachate leh tola gamsate vahna kanei ding ahi; chutah le leiset pumpi hin Israelte lah a Pathen aum mong monge, ti heuvin tin,

chule hikoma Houbung pumpi jong hin Pakaiyin chemjam le tengchan mi ahuhhing poi, ti akihet thei diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche gal kisat ding hi Pakai sat ding ahin, aman nang ho hi keiho khut’a eipeh doh diu ahitai,” ati.
Philistinepa chu ahung kipatdoh a ahinjot’a David to kidinte dinga ahung phat chun David jong kinloi tah-in galmun langa Philistinepa kidinte pi din alhaijel jeng tai.

Chuin David chun asakhao sunga akhut asoh lut loiyin song chang khat akilah doh pai paiyin, songboma agah se jenga ahileh Philistinepa chu achalpang laitah asekhah peh-in, asong chang chu achalgua aleng lut paitan, ama jong amalam ngan tola aboh khup’in akijam jenge.
Hitobang tah chun David chun Philistinepa hi song chang khatseh seh-in khatvei bou asep’in, Philistinepa asep lhun a that tai; David chun akhut’a chemjam akichoilou ahin,

hijeh chun David chu alhaijel’in Philistinepa long chunga adingin, achemjam chu amanin apaisunga konin asatdoh-in Philistinepa ma ma chu asatlih nan ahi; chule ama chemjam chun aluchang atanpeh tai. Philistine te chun amaho dinga gal-hat penpa athi amudoh phat’uvin ajamtauve.

Chutah chun Israel mite leh Judah mite akipatdoh uvin Philistine te nung adelpeh uvin, Gath kho le Ekron kelkot phung dung geiyin agadellut peh tauve; hijeh chun Philistine mi amapua chu Sha-ara’im kitilaiya pat lampi dung lhung keiyin Gath khopi le Ekron khopi geiyin akijam lhung peh uvin ahi.
Chuin Israelte chu Philistine mite nung adel nauva konin ahung kinung le kit’uvin, Philistine te ngahmun sung agachom tauve.
David chun Philistinepa luchang chu alan, Jerusalem geiyin ahinpoi; agal manchah vang chu aponbuh sunga akikoiye.

David chu Philistinepa toh kisat dia akondoh amuphat’in Saul chun asepai lamkaipa Abner adongin, “Abner, hiche gollhangpa khu koipen chapa ham?” tia adoh leh; Abner jong chun aseiyin, “Vo lengpa nahinkho dam jing ahin, ken jong kahepoi,” ati.
Hichun lengpan jong aseiyin, “Hiche goldong cha hi koipen chapa ham, hin kholtoh temin,” tin aseipeh tai.
Philistinepa agathana a kona David ahung kite kit phat’in Abner chun apuiyin Saul angsunga ahinlhut tai, hichea chun David in akhut’in Philistinepa luchang ahinchoiyin ahunge.
Chuin Saul in jong adongin, “Koi cha nahim boipu?” atileh; David chun adonbut’in, “Keima hi Bethlehem khoa cheng nasohpa Jesse chapa kahi,” ati.
David chun Saul jah a thu asei jou jouvin Jonathan hinkho chu David hinkho toh akijopmat abangtan, hijeh chun Jonathan in David chu ama hinkho angailut bang bangin angailutai.
Saul jong chun hiche nikho chun David chu akipuiyin apa heng ainkote henga akilesah tapoi.
Jonathan in David chu ama hinkho bang banga angailut jeh chun kitepna khat asempitan ahi.
Chujongle Jonathan chun ama kisil janglai achung kai aponsil chol chu ahoh lhan David apen, agalvon jong alelhah peh in, achemjam jong, athalpijong chule akonggah geiyin David apetai.

David chu Saul solna jousea avaikonna chana alolhing lhing jenge; hijeh chun Saul in jong David chu sepaite chunga alamkaiyin atungtai. Hitia abol chu mipi jouse mitmun jong chule Saul sohte mitmun jong apha lheh jengin ahi.

David in Philistinepa atha a miho inlama ahung kile kit’u chun Israel khopi jousea konin numeiho ahung potdoh uvin, la asauvin alam’uvin Saul lengpa lamto din ahung kitol un, khutbeh ahin benguvin kipa la asauvin, tumging thei manchah toh athouvin ahi.
Hichea chun numeihon kipa nop asah pet tah’uvin la asauvin khat le khat akihouvun, “Saul in mi asang sang athat’in, David in sang som somin athat’e,” atiuve.

Hiche aseiyu hin Saul lung asulung hang tan, hatah in alung hang behseh jeng tan ahi; chujongle Saul chun aseiyin, “Numeiho hin David in sang som athan aseiyuvin, keiman asang sang mai maiya kathan aseitauve; chuti ahile David hin ipi alahbe ding um tam, kei lenggam hibou umah ahitai,” atitai.
Hiche nikhoa pat chun Saul in David chu ave-lhi jing jeng tan ahi.

Ajing nikhon Pathena konin lhagao gilou khat Saul chunga ahung chun, hijeh chun David in semjang asai pet’in Saul chu amamot mot’in apaotan, masanga a um ngai ngaiyin a um kit’in niseh le achutitan ahi. Saul chun atengcha akidop jingjengin,
“David chu bang to kakhobeh khat leh,” tin agelin Saul chun tengcha agah khon ahi. Ahivangin David chu niveijen ajamdoh tai.
Pakaiyin Saul adalhah a David apanpi phat’in Saul chun David akicha lheh jengtan ahi.
Hijeh chun Saul in jong David chu akoma konin adeldohin sepai sang khat lamkaiyin apansah tai; ahivangin David chu mipi mitmun agalkon jin damselin ahung vailhung jin ahi.
Pakaiyin apanpi jeh chun David chun atoh lam lam alo lhing jing jenge.
David chu atoh lam lama alolhin jing jeng phat chun Saul in aging behseh jengtai.
Ahinla Israel mite jouse leh Judah miten David chu alungset cheh uvin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh David chu amaho mitmua galkonjia hung vailhung jing jeng ahi.

Saul chun David jah a aseiyin, “Ven kachanu apeng masa jo Merab chu hiche hi ahi, keiman naji dinga kapeh ding nahi; nangman hang tah in gal neisatpeh in lang Pakai din gal sat jingin,” ati. Ijeh-inem itileh Saul lung gela chu, “Philistine ten hinthat nante, keiman achunga hin kakhut lha ponge,” anati ahi.
Hichea hin David chun aseiyin, “Keima ipi pi jong kahiya, chule Israel sunga kapa inkote jong ipibon hiuvam, chutia keima lengpa tupa kahi jeng ding chu?” ati.
Ahinla Saul chanu Merab kitinu chu David akipeh ding phat dontah in Meho’lath mi Adriel kitipa ji din apetauve.
Saul chanu Michal chun David adei chan, mihon jong hiche thu hi David jah a aseipeh uva ahileh aman jong pha asai.

Saul chun hitin agelin, “Kachanu hi David dinga kipalna ahitei teina din David toh kichen sah inge, chuti hen lang hileh Philistine ten David atham khah thei diu ahi,” anati. Hichejeh chun Saul chun anivei lhin nan David jah a asei kit’in, “Tunia vang nangma katupa nahitei ding ahitai,” ati.

Chujongle Saul chun asohte thu apen aseipeh-in, David jah a guhthimin seipeh uvin lang hitin seiyun, ‘Vetan, lengpan nachunga kipana aneiyin, asohte jousen jong nangbou nalungset’uve; hijeh chun tun lengpa tupa hitan, achanu kichenpin,’ tiuvin,” ati.

Saul sohten jong thu hijat chu David jah din aseipeh tauve. Ahivangin David chun adonbut’in, “Nang ho ngaitoa lengpa chanu kichenpia atupa hi ding hi thil neocha nagel’u hiya ong? Kei mi vaicha minthanna neilou kahi namuna sa sauva,” atin ahi.
Chuphat’in Saul lhachaho chun ajah a aseiyuvin, “Hitobang bang hin David chun thu aseibouve,” atiuvin ahi.

Chujouvin Saul’ in jong ahil kit’in, “Nang hon David jah a hitia nasei diu ahi, ‘Lengpan naji man ding imadang angeh poi, lengpa hin amelmate chunga phu alah theina din Philistine te pasal jakhat chep nagatan a napeh ding bou adeiye,’ tin seipeh’uvin,” ati.
Saul lhacha hon hiche hi David jah a aseipeh phat’uvin athusei jouseu chun hitobanga lengpa tupa ahithei jeng ding jeh chun David alung lhai lheh jengin ahi. Aphat jong akipel hih lai nai.

Hijeh chun David jong akipatdoh paiyin achen asepaite akipuiyin, Philistine te mi ja ni agathat in, lengpa tupa ahitheina din amitha ho chep ahintan soh keiyin abonchan ahinpon, lhingset’in lengpa apetauve. Chuphat’in Saul in achanu Michal chu David ji din apetai.
Ahivangin David chu Pakaiyin apanpin chule Israel pumpin jong alungset chehuve, ti Saul chun amelchih keovin,
hijeh chun Saul hin David hi ahagin cheh cheh tan ahi. Hitobang hin Saul chu tang louhel’in David gal’in apang tai.

Philistine te lah a milen milal jouse ma gal ahung kon kon jiuvin, gala ahung kon jouseuvin David chun Saul sepai dang ho sangin lolhinna aneibe cheh cheh jenge; hichejeh chun jong David chu aminthang lheh tai.
Saul chun achapa Jonathan le asohte jah a David atha diuvin aseipeh tai. Ahinla Saul chapa Jonathan kitipa hi David to kilungset to lheh jeng anahi.
Hijeh chun Jonathan injong David jah a agaseipeh in, “Kapa Saul khun nangma tha din nahol e, hijeh chun jing jingkah teng leh nang le nang phate chan kiging themin, munthip lai khat’a gakisel mangin;

chule keima potdoh ing ting nangma umna loulaiya khun kapa koma gading ing ting, kapa henga nangma chung chang thu kagasei ding ahi; hichea hi ikhat khat kahetdoh auma ahileh nahung seipeh nange,” ati.

Hiti hin Jonathan hin apa Saul koma chun David chu agasei pha lheh jengin ajah a hitin aseiye, “Hiche nalhachapa David chunga khun lengpan chonval bol’in lang chonse hih hel’in; ipijeh-inem itileh ama hi nang douna thilse bola chonse mi ahipoi, ajeh chu ama natoh thilbol jouse hi nang dia thilpha jeng ahibouve;

ijeh-inem -itileh aman ahinkho hi apehdoh jenga kiphala Philistinepa chu anatha ahin, hichea hi Pakaiyin jong Israel dinga galjo minthang tah aboldoh peh ahiye. Nang jengin jong hiche namua kipah lheh nahi. Chuti ahileh ajeh beihela nangman ibola David hi natha a mi themmona neilouhel chu athisan nasoa chonset nabol ding ham?” atitai.
Chuphat’in Jonathan thusei chun Saul jong anungtan, Saul chu akihahsel tai, “Hing jing Pakai mina kasei ahi, David chu kithat louhel ding ahi,” ati.

Hichun Jonathan in jong David agakoudoh pai paiyin hicheng thilsoh ho chu aseipeh in avetsah tai. Chujongle Jonathan chun David chu Saul henga ahinpui lut’in ama jong masanga bang chun Saul koma aum kit tai.
Hiche lai chun gal ahung khoh kit tan, David jong akon kit’in Philistine te toh akisat tai; David chun Philistine te hathan athat gam tan ahileh, Philistine ten David chu ajamsan tauve.

Saul chun akhut’a tengcha akidop’in ainsunga atouna ngaiya atouva ahileh, Pakaiya konin lhagao gilou khat Saul chunga ahung lhung kit tan ahi; hijeh chun David jong chun Saul ngaidin semjang asaipeh kit’e.

Ahivangin Saul chun David chu tengcha a khoa bang chutoh kilbeh jeng din ahol kit tai; ahivangin David in Saul chu alhem lhan, hijeh chun Saul chun bangkeo bou akho khai. David vang chu alhai mangin ajamdoh tai.

Saul chun jan laiyin David in lama sottol le miho asolin, jingkah khovah teng leh David chu tha ding atin, agachinsah tai. Hichea hin David jinu Michal’in David jah a aseipeh paiyin, “Tujan laiya hi nangma nakihinso louva ahileh jing tengleh min natha diu ahitai,” atipeh-e.
Hijeh chun Michal’in David chu bangkot laiya akum lhah sah tai; David jong ajamdoh pai paiyin alhaidoh tan ahi.
Chuin Michal chun indoi teraphim chu alan jalkhuna chun alupsah-in, lukhap akhap peh-in kelmul in asam asempeh-in, teraphim chu mi bangin ponsil tampi asilpeh tai.
Saul chun David koudoh dinga sottol le ho ahinsol phat’in Michal chun, “Ana bouve,” anati.
Ahivangin Saul in sottol le ho chu asol kit’in David agavetsah-in chule hi tin ahil chah tai, “Ajalkhun pum pumin kahenga hinpuidoh jenguvin, katha ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh a chu sottol le ho chu ahung lut’uva ahileh vetan, indoi teraphim chu jalkhuna anakijamin, lukhap akhap’in kelmul chu asamin akisemin ahi.

Chutah chun Saul jong chun Michal jah a, “Ibola nangin hitobanga tah a neijou lhep a keima melmapa chu nasol manga najamdoh sah hi tam?” atileh; Michal jong chun Saul adonbut’in. “Aman min kajah a’neisol doh loiyin, achuti loule katha ding nahi,’ eitia chu,” a tin ahi.
Hiti hin David chu alhaidoh tan. Ramah khoa Samuel henga ahungin, Saul in abolna jouse abonchan Samuel jah a aseisoh keitai. Chuin David le Samuel chu achelhon in Nai’oth khoa acheng lhontai.
Min Saul jah a agaseipeh in, “Vetan, David chu Ramah gama Nai’oth khoa aume,” agati peh-e.

Chuphat’in Saul chun David man din soltol le ho asolpai kit tai; ahin sottol le ho chu acheuva ahileh themgao loiyin gaothu anasei uvin Samuel chu alah uva alamkaiyin anapange, amaho hi amu mu uvin Saul sottol le ho chunga Pathen Lhagao ahung chupaiyin, hijeh chun amahon jong gaothu asei tauve.

Athilsoh um chan hi mihon Saul henga aseipeh kit phat’uvin Saul chun sottol le adang asol pai kit’e; ahinla amaho jeng jong chun gaothu asei pai kit’uve. Chuin athumvei lhin nan Saul chun mi sottol le phabep asol kit ‘in ahileh, amaho jong chun gaothu asei thou thou kit’uvin ahi.

Chutah chun Saul amatah Ramah lama achetai; chuin Secu kiti laiya twikul lenpa ahung gei phat chun mi adongin, “Samuel le David chu hoilama um lhon tam?” atileh, mi khat chun, “Vetan, Ramah gama Nai’oth khoa aum lhon nai,” ati.
Hichun Saul jong achepai kit’in Ramah gama Nai’oth kho ajontai; ahin ama chunga jong Pathen lhagao ahung chun, Ramah gama Nai’oth ahung lhun kahsen achepum pumin gaothu aseipeh jenge.

Hiti chun Saul jeng jong hin aponsil jouse ahoh lhan Samuel angsunga gaothu asei sei jengin, chuche nikho nilhum keile chuche jan jankhovah hel’in asagoh keovin akijamin ahi. Hijeh chun, “Saul jong themgao ho lah a pang hitai mo?” tin akiseiye.

Nai’oth kho, Ramah gama konin David chu ahung jamdoh-in, ahung peh-e. Jonathan angsunga ahung seitai, “Keiman ipi mong mong kabola, chule kathem mona ipipen tah ham? Napa maiya kathepmona ipi mong mong hiya aman tha dinga eihola kahinkho suhmang ding agot ham?” tin adonge.

Hichun Jonathan in jong aseiyin, “Hithei louhel ding ahi. Nangma nathi louhel ding ahibouve. Vetan, kapa hin thillen hihen thil neocha hijongle keijah a sei masalouvin imacha abolji poi; ajeh chu kapan kei jah a asei louna ding ajeh aumpoi. Hijeh a chu hitia hi umlou thei ahipoi,” ati.

Ahivangin David chun adonbut’in, “Napan eini kilungset, nangma mitmua neidei lheh jeng hi ahet chenset jeng ahin; hijeh a chu aman, ‘David tha ding Jonathan lung na behseh get inte, hetda le aphai,’ tia ageljoh ahibouve. Dih tah a seidin Pakai hing jing mina nangma maiya kasei ahiye, kathina ding kal khatseh bou aumtai,” ati.
Hichun Jonathan in David jah a aseiyin, “Ipi pi hijeng jongleh nangin nasei sei chu kabolpeh ding nahi,” atitai.

Hijeh chun David in jong Jonathan jah a aseiyin, “Vetemin, jing nikho khu lha thah nikho ahin, kei hi kipel louhela lengpa to toukhoma an nekhom ding kahi ; hijongle keima neisolin lang nithum lhin ni nilhah geiya gakisel din loujaova gache tange.

Ijemtia napan keima eiholmoa ahileh, nangin anaseipeh-in lang, ‘David chun kei henga khoh tah-in anaseiyin akho lang Bethlehem khopi galhaivah ing tin athume; ajeh chu akhouva chu ainsung pumpiuva kumseh le kilhaina khat aboljiu ahi,’ anatin.
Hichea chu aman ‘Aphai’ atia ahileh nalhacha kei dinga hi thilpha hijeng intin, alung han a ahivang leh, ama chu thilsen ajo ahitai, tin phate chan hejengin.

Chuti ahijeh chun nalhacha keima hi khohsah mong mongin neibolin lang hitan, ajeh chu nangin jong kitepna thengsela neikiteppi ahinai. Amavang ijemtia keima themmona aum mong monga ahijongleh nangma tah in neithat doh jeng tan, ikhoh khoh a napa henga neipui lut khoh ding ham?” ati.

Chutah chun Jonathan jong chun aseipai jengin, “Seipeh louva kaum louhel ding ahi, Nachunga kapan thilse bol dinga agonsa mong mong ahin, ading det ahitai, ti kahet pou pouva ahileh iti nangma seipeh louva kaum thei ding ham?” ati.
Ahivangin David chun Jonathan jah a aseiyin, “Napan nasa tah in naphoh hen nahahsel taleh koipenin keima eihung seipeh thei ding ham?” tin adong nalaiye.
Ahinla Jonathan in David jah a aseipeh-in, “Chuti ahileh hungin loujaova potdoh hite,” atileh; amani anom gel lhonin loujaova achedoh lhon tai.

Chujongle Jonathan chun David jah a aseiyin, “Pakai, Israel Pathen chu ahettohsah pa hijeng hen! Keiman jing teng tuphat don hi leh kapa jah a kaseiya, ahiloule nithum lhin ni leh kaseiya chu ijemtia aman David chunga lung damna aneiya ahileh, vetan, athu umchan iti keiman mi sola nangma seipeh louva akaum thei ding ham?

Chujongle ijemtia kapan nangma suhset tei ding agot’a ahijongleh, Pakaiyin Jonathan kitipa hi eibolsejo hen lang, akhoh cheh jon jong eibol hen, nangma nahindoh tei teina dinga keiman nahenga kaseidoh hih a kasolmang lou pou pouva ahileh. Pakaiyin kapa anapanpi bangin nangma napan tei tei hen.
Kei hi mihinga neigel nah laiya ahileh kathi louna din Pakai ngailutna loupi tah chun nei ngailun;
aitih geiya kitimat louhel dingin keima insung hitoh kikhen hel ding ngaito hih beh-in. Pakaiyin David dinga melmate aboncha leiset chunga asuhgam teng jongleh,
Jonathan min kiti vang hi David insunga konin subei hih hel’in. Chule David dinga melmate chunga Pakaiyin phu lajeng hen,” ati.
Hitobang hin Jonathan in David chu alungsetna laitah chun avel’in akihahsel sah kit tan ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Jonathan chun David hi ama tahsa bang banga angailut mong mong ahi.
Jonathan chun David jah a aseiyin, “Jing nikho khu lha thah ni ahin; hijeh chun natouna aon tah ding jeh hin nakiholmo tei teiyin te.

Nithum lhin ni vang leh khoh tah a nakiholmo tah bah ding ahitai; hijeh chun athu hi ahung kiseiya naum loudol akikhol teng, nakiselna mun ma ma a chen lang, songtum alhuh a kisesang panga khun gakisel tan.
Keiman doi khat nei tobanga hiche song lhuh panga chu thalpi chang thum jen kahin kap ding ahi.

Chule vetemin, keiman gollhang khat kahinsola, ‘Chen lang thalpi chang ho khu galatan,’ kati ding ahin; chujongle gollhangpa jah a chu, ‘Vetem o, thalpi chang ho chu nangma pang langa aumuve, abonin hinlan,’ katia ahileh, nang jong nahungdoh jeng ding ahitai; ajeh chu Pakai hing jing ahin, nangma din hoidohna a um jingnai, kichat aumtapoi, tina ahitai.
Amavang gollhangpajah a chu, ‘Vetan, thalpi chang ho khu nangma kalpeh a achutai,’ katia ahileh; nangma nachepai ding ahitai; Pakaiyin nangma nasol mang joh pha asah ahi.
Hitin hiche ikitepna ikihouna thudola vang, vetan, Pakai chu nang le kei kah a aitih chan geiya hettohsah a pang jing ding ahi,” ati.
David jong loujaova chun amale ama akiseltai; chuin lha ahung thah phat’in lengpa chun bukong aumin an ne din atoutai.
Masanga atou ngai bang bangin lengpa chu bang koma kido atouna chun atouvin, Jonathan chu ama maikoh don tah a atouve; Abner chu Saul koma atouvin, David mun atouna vang a-ongtan ahi.
Hin hiche ni chun Saul in imacha aseipoi; ajeh chu, Saul ngaitoa, “David chunga thil khat soh a hiya, athenglou aboh khat ham hintin, aboh mong mong hijah hitante,” tia agel ahiye.

Ahin anikho ni lhin nin, lha thah ni jing chun David mun a touna chu aong kit leu tai. Hijeh chun Saul’ in jong achapa Jonathan adongin, “lpi dinga Jesse chapa chu jan hia jong tunia jong an nea hung lou ham?” tin aseitai.
Jonathan in Saul chu adonbut’in, “David chu Bethlehem lama che ding akigon keijah a khoh tah-in anathume;

hichea chun aseiyin, ‘Neisol tei teiyin, khopia khun ka inkoten kilhaina khat abol’uvin, hichea chu keijong kapan tei teina din kasopi, ka-upan khoh tah-in eihile. Hijeh chun nangma kachunga nalung lhai dinga ahileh neisolin lang kasopite toh neikimuto sah tei teiyin,’ a tin; hichea achejeh a chu lengpa ankong phunga hung lha thei lou ahitai,” ati.

Chutah chun Jonathan chunga Saul alung hang jah jengin ajah a aseitai, “Numei chavai, doumah mah a kisanu chapa, nangma kijumsona ding le nanu mitmo tah langna din nangin Jesse chapa chu nakihou theipin napanpi ti hi keiman kahet louva nabol ham?

Ajeh chu hiche Jesse chapa hi leiset chunga ahinlaisen nangma nahin nalenggam ahin khatjoh sang kitung det ponte. Hichejeh chun mi solloiyin ama chu gaholdoh sah loiyin, kaheng hin lhut loiyin katha tei tei ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Jonathan in jong apa Saul chu adonbut’in, “Ibola David kithat ding ham? I pi pen tah abol khat ham?” atileh;
Saul chu alung hang behseh jengin atengchan Jonathan chu akhon kholih jeng din agoi; chuphat’in apan David chu tha tei tei dinga agot mong mong ahitai, ti Jonathan in ahedoh tai.
Hijeh chun lhathah kut ni ni lhun nin Jonathan chu ankong phunga konin akipatdoh-in, alung hang behseh jengin an nelouvin aumtai; a pan David ahot jeh chun David din alung kham behseh jengin ahi.
Jingkah chun David toh akitepna bang bangin Jonathan jong apotdoh-in loulai langa achetai, hichea hin gollhang neocha khat akipuiye.
Hichun Jonathan in agollhangpa jah a aseiyin, “Lhaiyin lang thalpi chang kakapsa ho khu gaholdoh temin,” a tin; gollhangpa chu alhai phat’in akal langpeh a thalpi chang khat akap kit’e.
Gollhang pa chu Jonathan in thalpi chang akap lutna agei phat’in Jonathan in gollhangpa chu anung kouvin; aseitai, ‘Thalpi chang chu nakal langpeh a uma hilou ham?” ati.

Jonathan in gollhangpa chu anung kouloiyin, “Man gangin, hung lhai loiyin, kinomsot hih-in,” ati. Hijeh chun Jonathan lhacha gollhangpa chun thalpi chang jouse chu ahinchom khom loiyin apu henga ahung thai lutjel tai.
Ipi kibolna ahilam gollhangpan imacha ahedoh pon, David le Jonathan bou chun athilbol u ahet lhon ahiye.
Chuin Jonathan jong chun agal manchah jouse chu gollhangpa apohsah-in, “Abonchan khopisunga polut tan,” ati.

Gollhangpa apotdoh doh chun songtum kiselna pang langa kon chun David ahung kipatdoh pai paiyin, thumvei jen tola amai asulut’in akuntai; chutah chun amani akikoi chah den jeng lhonin akikajah jeng lhonin, David chun achamtah a alhakang kahsen akika lhon tai.

Hichun Jonathan in David jah a aseiyin, “Lung mong tah-in chetan, ini lhona Pakai min pan a ikihahsel lhon bang bangin, hichea iseiya, ‘Pakai chu nang le kei kah-a ahetoh-in pang jing jeng hen lang, nangma chilhah le keima chilhah kah a ahetoh pa hijing jeng hen,’ iti bang bangin umta hite,” ati. Hiti chun David jong akipatdoh loiyin achemang tai; Jonathan vang chu khopi sunga ahung lut’in ahi.

David chu ahungin Nob khoa Ahimelech kiti thempupa heng ahung lhung tai; ahin Ahimelech chu kitihot pum pumin ahungin David ahung lamtoi, chujongle David chu adongin, “Ibola nachangseh a nahunga mihem khat cha tojong hung kilhon lou nahim?” ati.

Hichun David’in jong Ahimelech thempupajah a aseidoh paiyin, “Lengpan kin khoh tah a eingansen, kajah a aseiyin, Keiman nang kasolna thudol, kalhahna chung chang hi koimachan jong ahet theilou ding ahi,’ a tin; hijeh a chu ken jong muntina gollhang chapang to kihoumatna kaneiya hung kahi.
Tua hi nangman ipi pi naneiyam? Changlhah pheng nga beh neipen, ahilouva ahijongle nanei nei chu neipejengin” ati.

Chuphat’in thempupan jong David chu adonbut’in, “Keiman changlhah mai mai kaneipon, Pathena tosa changlhah theng vang aume; hiche changlhah hi numeito kitimat loulai gollhang ho neh thei bou ahiye,” atileh;

David jong chun thempupa chu ahouvin, “Tahbeh beh a sei din, kei rna gal kon dia kache teng leh numei henga kidalse mong mong kahi; gollhang ho thil jouse hi atheng ahicheh nai; khol chemai mai ahipet jongleh atheng ahinai; chuti ahileh tunia jong ichan geiya atheng hi ding ham, theng cheh ding ahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun thempupan David chu changlhah thensosa chu apetai; ijehinem itileh hichepet a chu changlhah dang anaum lou ahin, akilah doh ni ni leh changlhah athah akikang lumsa khat’a kheldoh jeng dinga kikoi, Pakai angsunga akilahdoh teng khel ding salema um thensosa changlhah chubou anaum ah ahi.
Hiche nikho chun Nob khoa chun Saul sohte mi khat ana um khan, Pakai masanga akho ngai denin ahi; amapa chu amin Do’eg akitin, Edom mi ahi, chule Saul gancha ching ho lah a alamkaipao ahiye.

Hichun David’in Ahimelech jah a chun, “Tupet a nangman tengcha khat beh nakoi lou ham? Ajeh chu keima lengpan eisolna hi thukin tah ahin, hijeh chun kachemjam ahin kagal manchah ahin, khat cha jong kahin kipoh tapoi,” ati.

Chuphat’in thempupan jong aseiyin, “Elah phaiya nangman nathapa Goliath kitipa Philistinepa chemjam chu aum nai, vetan hikoma hin thempu von kikoina nunga khun ponin akijel’in akikoiye; nangman kilah ing natileh kilah tan! ajeh chu thil dang imacha aumpoi,” ati. Hichun David jong chun, “Hiche tobang chu thil dang umlou ahi, neipen neipen,” ati.
Hiche nikho chun David jong Saul henga kona ahung jamdoh chu jampai pai dingin akipatdoh in a jam kit tai, chule achen Gath lengpa Achish heng alhung tan ahi.

@@Ahin Achish lengpa chu asohten ajah a aseiyuvin, “Hiche mipa hi gamsunga leng changsa David chu hilou haimo? Miho lam’uva ama chung chang thudola hi la anasah-uva. ‘Saul in mi asang sangin athat’in, David’n vang sang som somin athat’e,’ tia alachoipau chu hilou ham?” atitauve.
Hiche athusei hou hi David lung sunga achang jen jengin, Gath lengpa Achish chu akicha behseh jengin ahi.

Hijeh chun David in jong aumchan akhel loiyin, amasanguva amaho khut’a umah ahiphat’in aki ngolsah-in, kelkot phung dunga kotpi chung dung jousea ima ma ajihpol belbul’in, chule akhalhang dunga achilche akaisah deh duh jengin ahi.
Hichun Achish lengpan jong asohte jah a aseiyin, “Vetan, hichepa hi mi ngol ahibouve, ti namusau sauva ipi dinga kahenga nahin kailut’u ham?

Keiman mi ngol kanei louva nabolu hiya hiche tobang mi hi nahin puilut’uva kamasanga angol chon vetsah ding neigot’u ham? Hitobang mihem hi keima insunga hunglut theilom mong hinam?” a tin a-eojah tai.
Hiche phat chun David jong a potdoh pai paiyin Adullam songkoa ajamlut tai; chuin asopite leh apa inkote jousen aumchan thudol ajah phat’uvin David henga ahung kitolsuh tauve.

Chujongle gimna nei jouse ahin, batle tham neiho ahiuvin, lung lhai louna neiho ahiuvin abonchan David henga akikhomsoh keitauve. Hijeh chun amajong hicheho lah a hin gal lamkaiyin apangtai. Abonchan David panpia mihem mong mong ja li tobang alhingtauve.

Hichea kon hin David achepai paiyin, Moab gama Mizpeh kho ajontai; chujongle Moab lengpa henga chun aman agaseiyin, “Pathenin kei dinga itobang thilgon anei ding ham, ti kahetdoh kahsen kanu le kapa hi nangma koma chensah tei teiyin.” tin athumin ahi.
Hiti hin David chun anu le apa Moab lengpa koma adalhan, amani jong Moab lengpa henga chun David kulpi sunga apan kahsen aum lhontai.
Hichun Gad themgaopan David jah a aseipeh-in, “Hiche kulpia hin pangden den hih-in, potdoh jon lang Judah gamsung langa chetan,” ati. Hijeh chun David jong apotdoh loiyin Hereth gammang lama achetai.

David le apanpi aloite chu aum nau akihedohtai, ti Saul chun ajatai; hichepet hin Saul chu Gib’e-ah khopia tamarisk thingphung sang noiya atouvin, akhut’in tengcha akichoiyin, chule asohte akimvela adinguvin ahi.

Chuin Saul chun akoma ding asohte jah a aseiyin, “Vo Benjamin chate, ngaiyuvin; Jesse chapa chun nang ho nabonchauva hi loumun le lengpilei mun napeh soh kei diu hiya, nabonchauva hi sepai asang sang lamkai le aja ja lamkaiya napansah mong diu hinam.

Ibola nang hon kei douna thu naseiyu hi tam? Kachapan Jesse chapa toh kitepna anei lhona ahi chun koimachan seipeh din neigo pouvin, tulaiya eibolna bang hin kachapa tildoh a konin kasohpa David chun that din eina gon eina changlhi le len jong koimachan kahenga seipeh din neigo pouve.” ati.
Chutah chun Saul lhachate koma dinga Edom mi Do’eg kitipa chun adonbut in, “Nob khoa Jesse chapa ahung chu keiman kamun, Ahimelech kiti Ahitub chapa henga ahunge;
Ahimelech chun David din Pakai adohpeh in chule neh le chah jong a pen, Philistine mipa Goliath chemjam jong apetai,” ati.
Hichun Saul lengpan jong Ahitub chapa Ahimelech le apa inkote, Nob khoa thempua pang jouse gaman lha din mi asolin, hijeh chun amaho jong abonchan lengpa henga ahung soh keitauve.
Chuphat’in Saul jong chun aseiyin, “Phatechan ki ngaiyin vo Ahitub chapa,” atileh; aman jong adonbut’in, “Henge kapu,” ati.

Hichea hin Saul chun adongin, “Ipi dinga nang nin keima neidou lhon hi tam, nang le Jesse chapan; nangin ama chu changlhah le chemjam napen, ama dingin Pathen nadohpeh len, hijeh chun ama akipanin kei eidouvin tulaiya aumchan bang bangin keima tha din eichang le len ahi, iti thu hitam?” ati.

Chutah chun Ahimelech kitipan jong lengpa chu adonbut pai jengin, “Nasohte lah a koipen tah hi David banga kitah um kham, David chu lengpa dinga atupa jong ahin, nangma tahsa hoitup’a pang sepai lamkai jong ahin, nangma insunga hi ama chubou akijabol pen ahimen?

Ken ama dinga Pathen henga thudoh kabolpehna hi tuni seh seh a bou nabol ham? Ahinai sai poi! Lengpan nasoh hi kahin kapa insung mite aboncha ahiuvin neithepmo sah nomna lam lama neithemmo sah jenguvin; ajeh chu nasohpan thilse imacha atam hihen alhom hileh kahet aumpoi,” atitai.
Hichetah chun lengpan jong, “Ahimelech nathi tei tei ding ahi, nang jong napa inkote jong naboncha nathi diu ahiye,” tin ahohsal tai.

Chujongle lengpan akoma ding ama ngah a pang sepaipa jah a chun, “Kiheiyin hiche Pakai thempuho hi thatgam jengin, ijeh-inem itileh amaho jong hi David to kikhutjop cheh ahiuve; ajeh chu David ajamtai, ti ahesoh keiyuvin kahenga ahung seidoh pouve,” atin thu apetai. Ahivangin asepaipa chun thempuho sat jengna din akhut alhang ngam tapon ahi.

Chuphat’in lengpan jong Do’eg kitipa jah a chun, “Nangma kiheiyin lang thempuho chunga chun chujengin,” atipeh a ahileh; Edom mi Do’eg kitipa chu akiheiyin thempuho chunga achun, hiche nikhoseh seh chun thempuvon tupat ponnema kikhong ompho kivon cheh thempu som get le nga athat tai.
Chujongle Nob khopi, thempuho chenna chu chemjamin asat gamin, numei pasal, chapang le nao noichep laisanjong, bongchal jouse le sangante, kelngoiho gei geiyin asat gamhel tan ahi.
Ahin Ahitub chapa Ahimelech chapate lah a amin Abi’athar kitipa chu ajamdoh manin, David nung adeltai.
Abi’athar hin David jah a chun Saul in Pakai thempu jouse athagam thu aseipeh tai.
Hichun David in jong Abi’athar jah a, “Edom mi Do’eg kitipa kamu nia pat’ a chu Saul jah a aseitei tei ding kahetsa ahitai. Keiman napa insung mite aboncha kathilo sah ahitan ahi.
Keima koma umin nakichat louhel ding ahiye; ijehinem itileh keima tha dinga eiholpan nang jong tha dinga nahol ahi; kei koma umle chun nahoidoh theijoh ding ahi,” tin aseipeh tan ahi.
Mihon David henga thu ahung lhut’uvin hitin aseiyuve, “Vetan, Philistine miten Keilah kho asat’uvin changphol dunga chang jouse jong akichom gamtauve,” tin ahung hil’uve.

Hichejeh chun David’injong Pakai adongin, “Keima kakona hiche Philistine te khu kagasat ding ham?” atileh; Pakaiyin David jah a ahinseiyin, “Chen lang Philistine te khu gasat gamin lang Keilah kho gahuhdoh tan,” tin asoltai.

Ahivangin David panpi mihon David jah a aseiyuvin, “Vetan, hiche Judah gamsung jenga bon eiho kicha geovin iumuvin, iatileh Keilah khoa icheuva hiche Philistine sepaite khujatpi khutoh ikisat thei diu ham?” atiuve.

Hijeh chun David’in jong Pakai adong kit’in, Pakaiyin ahindonbut kit leuvin, “Kipatdoh in lang Keilah kho langa kitolsuh jengin, ajeh chu keiman Philistine te nangma khut’a kapeh ding ahi,” ati kit leuve.

Hijeh chun David le asepaite chu Keilah kho langa acheuvin Philistine mite chutoh agakisat’uvin, miho tamtah athat gamuvin, agancha abongu atama tam ahinkai manguvin ahi. Hiti chun David’in Keilah kho mite jong ana huhdoh in ahiye.
Ahimelech chapa Abi’athar chu David henga ahung jama Keilah kho langa ahung chun akhut’a thempuvon ompho khat ahinchoi lut’in ahi.

David chu Keilah khoa ahung lhung tai, tin mi khat’in Saul jah a aseipeh tai. Hichun Saul’in jong aseipaiyin, ‘Tua Pakaiyin David chu keima khut’a apehdoh ahitai; ajeh chu akelkot jouse golvai kikam khum kholen sung khat’ a David chu ama cham chama hung vah lut ah ahitai,” ati.
Hijeh chun Saul’in galkon din amite abonchan akoukhomsoh keiyin, Keilah khoa chesuh a David le David sepaite ga umkhum jeng dingin asomtai.
Ahivangin Saul chun ama dounan thilse ahin ngaitoi ti David chun anahe kit tan, hijeh chun David’in thempupa Abi’athar jah a aseiyin, “Thempuvon ompho chu hikoma hinchoi temin,” ati.
Chutah chun David ataovin, “O Pakai, Israel Pathen, keima jeh a Saul chu hung kona hiche Keilah khopi hi ahung suhset ding ahi, tin nasohpa hin kajatan ahi.

Hiche Keilah kho mite hin keima ama khut’a eipehdoh jenguva pha hi tam? Ahiloule nasohpan kajah bang banga Saul chu hung konsuh ding ham? Vo Pakai, Israel Pathenin, nahenga katao ahi, nasohpa keijah a neiseipeh tei teiyin,” atileh; Pakaiyin jong aseiyin, “Saul chu hung konsuh ding ahinai.” atitai.
Chuphat’in David jong chun, “Ahile Keilah khosung mite hin kei le kasepaite hi Saul khut’a eipeh doh jeng diu hi tam?” tia adoh leh; Pakaiyin jong, “Napehdoh diu ahinai” tin aseitai.

Hichun David le asepaite mihem jagup jen tobangpi chu akipatdoh uvin Keilah kho adalhauvin, achena phah chan a achetauve. Keilah khoa konin David le aloite chu ajamdoh tauve, tia mi khat’in Saul jah a aseipeh phat’in, Saul jong chun agalkon ding avotang tai.

David vang chu gammang lah a kulpi phung le Ziph gammang lah a thinglhang gamsunga chun apansa den tai. Ahin Saul chun nisim niseh leh David chu ahol holjin, ahivangin Pathenin David chu Saul khut’a apedoh deh poi.
Saul chu ama that dinga ahung kondoh jeng phat’in David jong akicha lheh jeng tan ahi. Hiche laiya hi David hi Ziph gammang lah Horesh kiti laiya anaum ahiye.
Hichun Saul chapa Jonathan chu Horesh kiti laiya chun David henga achen, Pathen dingin David bantha agakido sah kit’in agatil khouve.

Hichea hin Jonathan chun David jah a aseiyin, “Kicha hih hel’in, ijeh-inem itileh kapa Saul chun akhut’a namai khah louhel ding ahi; nangma joh hi Israelte leng nahung hi ding, keima nang ban tah a kahi ding ahi; kapa Saul jong khun hiche hi ahenai,” agati.
Chuin anigel lhonin Pakai angsunga kitepna khat asem kit lhonin ahi; David chu Horesh muna aumdenin, Jonathan vang ainlama ache tai.
Chujouvin Ziph gam mite chu Gib’e-ah khoa Saul henga achetouvun hitin agaseiyui, “Jeshi’mon lhanglama Hachi’lah thinglhang sung, Horesh kulpi dunga khu keiho lah a David kisel jing jeng hi lou ham?
Hijeh chun tuhin Vo lengpa, nalunga nadei jing chu hungsuh loiyin, nahung konsuh a ahileh keihon jong kakhop tah-in panpiu ving ting David chu nangma khut’a pedoh nau vinge,” agatiuve.
Chuphat’in Saul’in jong aseipai jengin, “Pakaiyin phatthei naboh uhen ong; ajeh chu nang hon hibang tah hin neivoujang natpiuve.
Cheloiyun lang, phatechan gapho chenset jenguvin; aumna mun age-na mun gahechen set’uvin lang gavechil chet tauvin; ajeh chu ama hi mi kilep themtah ahi, ti min keijah-a aseitai.

Hichejeh chun ama kiselna achang pan na mun jouse gave chilsoh keiyuvin, ima jouse hetoh soh keiyin kahenga hung nung kit’uvin. Chutengle kei jong nang ho toh kilhona icheuva agamsunga chu David aumpou pouva ahileh keiman Judah sepai sang khat lah a kisel jongle kaholdoh tei tei ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun amaho jong akipatdoh uvin Ziph gam langa chun Saul sangin anache masatauve. David le asepaite chu hichepet’a hi Jeshi’mon lhang lama Arabah gamsung Ma’on kiti gammang noiya kisel ahiuve.

Saul le asepaite chu David hol din ahung tauve. Mihon David jah a agaseipeh uvin ahileh, hichejeh chun David jong Ma’on gammang noiya songpi phunga chun achesuh tai. Achesuh hi Saul’in jong ajadoh pai kit tan, Ma’on gammang noilama David nung adelsuh tan ahi.

Saul le asepaite chu molpang lang khat’ a achesuh uvin, David le asepaite ma chu molpang lang khatma achesuh uve; Saul le asepaiten David le asepaite mat dinga agot’uva ahin nailam cheh cheh phat’uvin David le asepaite chun Saul koma kona jamdoh loidin kin loitah in ageltauve.
Hichun sottolle mi khat Saul henga ahungin hitin ahung seiye, “Kin loitah in hung loiyin; ajeh chu Philistine miten gamsung ahung chomgam diu ahitai,” ahung ti.
Hijeh chun David nung adelna a konin Saul ahung kinungle kit’in Philistine te toh kisat din akontai; hichejeh hin hichelai mun hi kitoldohna songpi akititai.
David chu hichea konin achetouvin Enge’di kulpi phung dunga acheng dentai.
Philistine te nung agajuina kona Saul ahung kile kit phat’in mihon ajah a thu ahung lhut’uvin hi tin aseiyuve, “Vetan, David chu Enge’di gammang lah a akisele,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Saul jong chun Israel mite lah a konin mihem lhentum cheh sang thum alhengdoh loiyin David le asepaite hoi din gamkel chenna songpi kol maiya chun achetauve.

Saul chu ahungin ahileh lampia kelngoi kul lah pi ahung toh khan, hiche lah a hin songko khat anaume; hiche songko sunga chun Saul jong kicholdo din alut tai. Hiche songko sunga adan sung nung lama chu David le aloite anatou ahiuve.

Hichun David loiten David jah aseiyuvin, “Vetemin, ‘Keiman namelmapa chu nakhut’a kapehdoh a nangman naphatsah lam lama nabol ding ahi,’ tia Pakaiyin anasei nikho chu tunia hi hung lhung ahitai,” atiuve. Hijeh chun David jong akipatdoh loiyin kangchan akithol thol’in Saul sangkhol len mong chep aga attan peh tai.
Khonung nungin Saul sangkhol mong chep agatan peh chu agela ahileh David chu alung anan akisih lhehjenge.

Hijeh chun David chun asepaite jah a aseiyin, “Pakai thao nusa ahi, ti kamusa sa ama douna kakhut kalap’a, Pakai thao nusa kapu chunga keiman hitobanga thil kabol kit louhelna din Pakaiyin eituh tang tei tei hen,” ati.
Hijeh chun David’in asepaite chu atuh tang nah nah-in athu nun phat’in Saul chu adel khum sah tapoi. Chuin Saul chu ahung thouvin songko chu adalhan alamjot ban akijotpai kit tai.

Anung chun David jong akipatdoh loiyin Saul nung ajuiyin songkoa kona apotdoh phat chun agah kouvin, “Vo lengpa kapu!” agah ti. Hichun Saul jong akinung heiyin a vet’ a ahileh anunga chun David chu tola amai asulut’in lengpa ja na anabolin ahi.
Chujongle David chun Saul jaha aseiyin, “Ipidinga nahenga mihon, ‘Vetan, David khun nangma suhset din nahol lei,’ tia asei jouseu chu natahsan ham?

Vetan, tuni hin hiche songko sunga Pakaiyin nangma hi kei khut’a eipehdohsa ahitai, ti nangman kichen tah in namutai; chujongle nang chu that tan, tia eisol ahitan, ahivangin keiman nang kahinghoi tai. ‘Kapu dou nan keiman kakhut lam ponge, ti kaseiyin ahi; ajeh chu ama hi Pakai thao nusa ahibouve,’ kati.

Ven hepa, kakhut’a kachoi nasangkhol mong chep katan lhah hi vetemin; keiman nasangkhol mong chep katanboh peh a nangma katha louva kona hi nangma joulhepna ding le adih louva bolna din kakhut hi kalam kha hih laiye, ti kichen tah a nahet ding ahitai. Nangin tha dinga neihol le le vangin keima nangma dou nan kachonse hih laiye.
Nangle kei kah a Pakai chu ahetoh hijing jeng hen lang, nachunga Pakaiyin keiphu lajo hen; amavang itih chan hijongle keima khut hi nang douna kalap louhel ding ahi.
Gollui thuchih khat’in aseiya, ‘Migilouva hi gitlouna hung peng ahi,’ tia asei banga, itih hijongle nang douna keiman kakhut kalap louhel ding ahi.
Israel lengpa chu koipen nunga hung hiya, koipen tah nung nahindel mong mong ham? Uicha thisa khat tou ham? Uili khat tou nungdel nahim?
Hijeh chun Pakai chu thutanin pang hen lang, kei le nang kah a thutan pa hijeng hen, athu hi vetoh hen lang keima dihna hi eihetpeh teng leh nangma khut’a konin eihuhdoh tei tei hen,” ati.

Saul jah a David chun thu hijatpi asei chai phat’in Saul jong chun ahinsei pai jengin, “Vo kachapa David, hiche thu kisei ogin kija hi nangma ogin mong mong ham?” a tin ahi. Chujongle Saul apeng jah jengin akaptai.
Saul chun David jah a aseiyin, “Kei sangin nangma gamchengin them nachangjo tai; ajeh chu keiman thilse jeng jeng kabolpeh jin, nangman thilpha pha jengin neile thuh jing jenge.
Chujongle tuni tah hin nangman phate chan naphongdoh tan, itobanga neibol phat hita a, Pakaiyin nangma khut te nia eikhum lut chan geiyin jong nangman tha louvin neikoiyin neihinghoi tai.
Ijeh-inem itileh hitobanga hi mihem khat chun amelmapa atokhah a ahileh damsela alhadoh mong mong ding hinam? Hijeh chun tunia kei dinga thilpha naboldoh hi Pakaiyin kipaman thilpha napetei tei hen.
Ajeh chu tun vetan, nangma hi leng chang tei tei ding nahi, ti keiman kahechen tai, chule Israel lenggam hi nangma thahat’a bou kitungdet ding ahi.
Hijeh chun Pakai min panin lang kakoma kihahsel’in, nangman keima chilhah jouse kathi nung leh nasuh mang lou ding hinam? Kapa insunga jong keima min hi nasuhmang lou mong ding hinam?” ati.
Hijeh chun David jong Saul koma akihahsel tai. Hichun Saul jong inlama achetan, David le asepaite vang chu akulpiuva akaltou kit tauve.
Samuel athin, Israel pumpi akikhomuvin Samuel chu a-op’uvin chule Ramah khoa ama insungma ma avuitauve. David jong akipatdoh’in Paran gammang langa achesuh tai.

Ma’on khoa chun mi khat achengin, ama chu Carmel khoa kiveina bol mi akiveina umah ahiye. Hiche mipa hi ahaova hao ahin, kelngoi jeng jeng sang thum avul’in, kelcha jong sang thum ma aneiye. Ama hin Carmel khoa kelmulvo aboljie.

Akisei mipa min hi Nabal akitin, ajinu min Abigail akiti. Ajinu hi chingtah le thil umdan hekhen themtah ahin, amel jong ahoiya hoi ahi; ajipa vang chu umje chonje helou ahin, agilou louvachon jeng ahi; ama hi Caleb phunga mi anahi.
Gammang lah a konin Nabal hin kelngoi mul avouji, ti David chun ajatan;
hijeh chun David in gollhang som khat asolin, hiche gollhang ho jah a chun David in hitin aseiye, “Carmel khoa cheuvin lang Nabal kitipa henga galut’uvin ama chu keima min hin salam gabol’uvin.
Hitia hi nang hon ama chu salam nabol diu ahi: Nang din chamna leng hen, na-insung mite din jong cham leng hen chule nathil nalo nanei jouse chunga jong lung mon um hen.

Nangman kelngoimul vou ding mi nakoiyin, ahi ti keima kajan, chujongle tunin nangma kelngoi ching ho hi keiho toh kaum khomuve; amaho hi keihon imachan jong kabolse pouvin, amahon jong imacha mansah aneipouve; aphat seh le Carmel kho jenga aum nauve.

Nangma mi gollhang ho dongle chun amahon naseipeh nauvin te. Hichejeh hin keiman kahinsol gollhang ho hi hin lungset’in lang hin, ajeh chu keiho hi kut nikhoa hung kahiuve. Lungset tah in nasohte hi ipi pi hijongle naneipen pen chu neipeuvin lang hin nachapa David kei gei hin,’ ati nagati diu ahi,” ati.
David sol gollhang ho chu ahung lhun phat’uvin David min chun thu hijatpi hi Nabal jah a aseitauve; chuin amahon adonbut ding angah-uvin ahileh;
Nabal hin David solchahte chu adonbut’in, “David kitipa hi koi hiya ong? Tulaiya soh tamtah aputeu henga kona jam mang nau hi.

Keiman kakelngoimul vouva pang ho ding kathapeh kelngoisa jouse leh katwi don ding chule kachanglhah neh ding jouse hi kalahpeh a kahet phah lou gama kona hung kon miho chu kapeh beh ding hiya ong?” atitai.
Chuphat’in David sepaite chu ahung kinungle kit’uvin athilsoh umchan hi abonchan David henga aseipeh tauve.

Chutah chun David jong chun asepaite jah a aseiyin, “Pasal jousen achemjam akonga kigah cheh tau hen!” atin; hijeh chun pasal jousen achemjam cheh a kiko soh kei tauve; David jengjong chun achemjam akikopai pai tan ahi. Sepai ja li tobang David nungjuiya galsat din akitol touvun, sepai ja ni tobang thilkeo ngah din aumden tauve.
Gollhang ho lah a mi khat chun Nabal jinu Abigail jah a aseipeh in, hitin ati, “Vetan, gammang lah a konin kapuu salam bol din David chun mi ahinsol’in, ahinla kapun amaho chu anaphohsal jah tan ahi.
Hijongle amiho khu keiho dinga aphat’a pha ahiuve; amaho toh loujaova kalhat khom laiseuvin imacha jong eisuhset peh pouvin, thil gancha imacha jong kamansah hih hel’uve.
Kelngoi kachin’uva amaho khutoh kaum khom laiseuvin, amaho hi keiho din asun ajanin pal bangin akisung jenguvin ahi.

Hijeh chun tun hiche hi kihet themin lang chule ipi nabola pha hi tam, ti kigel’in; ijeh-inem itileh kapu chunga thilse hung soh tei tei ding, ainsung pumpi chunga jong thilse hung lhung ding ahi, amala aphoh bel bul’in koimacha toh kihou thei jong ahipoi,” atipeh-e.

Chuphat’in Abigail jong akinoloiyin changlhah lhon ja ni akigot’in, lengpitwi savun pengja ni dimset agon, kelngoi ja nga jen sa hon minsan agon, changpoh kansa ate-na dim nga agon, lengpithei boh ja khat jen toh, theichang ga a kisem changlhah pheng ja ni toh agon abonchan sangante apohsah in akitol tai.
Abigail chun asepaite jah a aseiyin, “Kei sangin masauvin, ven, keijong nang ho nunga kahunge,” a tin; ajipa Nabal jah a vanga aseipeh poi.

Abigail chu sangan chunga atouva ahung kitola molsang lesun khat’a ahung valut’a ahileh, vetan, David le asepaite chu amanu heng lama ahung kitolsuh tauve; hichun Abigail jong chun amaho agalamton ahi.

Hichun David in jong aseipaitai, “Hiche Nabal kitipa nei agancha jouse keiman khat cha jong manthah sah louhela gammang noiya kachinpeh peh jeng chu pannabei seh a kabol dan ahitai; tun kathilpha bolpeh jouse Nabal’in thilsen eihinlepeh tan ahi.
Jing jingkah teng Nabal mi ahi, kiti tapou pasal khat’a khat jeng cha jong hinghoi louhel’a katha gam louva ahileh Pakaiyin keima David hi eithat jeng hen,” tin aseitai.
Abigail chun David amuphat’in alhai loiyin sangan chunga konin ahung chom lha loiyin, David masanga chun akunin tola amai asulut tai.

Abigail chu David kengphang bula aboh khup jengin aseitai, “Kapu thepmona chu keima chang jeng ing kate; lungset tah-in nasohnu hi nahenga thu neiseisah ta din lang, chule nasohnun kasei ding jouse nei ngaipeh ta din.

Hiche miphoh bel bul Nabal kitipa chu kapun imachan gel hih beh-in, ajeh chu amin bang banga ama khu um ahibouve; Nabal kiti hi ama min ahin, ama hi ngolna dimset ahibouvin ahi; ahin kapun nahinsol gollhang ho chu keiman kamulou ahiye.

Tujengin jong Pakai hing jing mina kasei ahin, kapu jong nahin lai hin Pakaiyin thisan soa themmo sah ding jousea jong nahoidohsa ahitan, chule nakhut tah a phu nalah ding jong aphal lousa ahitai; hijeh chun tun jong kapu hi suhset ding tha dinga nahola namelmate jouse chu Nabal tobang hisoh keiyu hen.
Chusangin tun hiche nasoh-in neh le chah ahinpoh hi kapu nungjuiya sepaite hi nehsah jou hite.

Nasohnu kathemmo najouse kasuh khel abonchan nei ngaidamin, tia katao ahi; ijeh-inem itileh kapu hi Pakaiyin nainchensah tei tei ding ahi; ajeh chu kapu hi Pakai dinga galsat nahibouve; nahinlai damsungsea nachunga thilse kimudoh louhel ding ahi.

Mihemte hung kipat’u hen lang nanung hindel hen, tha din nahol hol jong leu, kapu nangma hinkho hi mihing hinkhoa kisel jinga, Pakai na-Pathenin avet tup jing ding ahinai; nangma melmate hinkho vang chu Pakaiyin song bom sunga kona song chang kisep mang banga asemang mang ding ahi.
Chujongle nachung changa thudola Pakaiyin aseisa jouse chu kapu dinga nabolpeh soh keiya, Israel chunga lenga natun teng leh,

kapun lung gimna jong nanei louhel ding, lung natna jong nanei lou ding ahitai; hitobanga hi kapun nangma phu nakilah da a ajeh beiya jong thisan naso da a ahileh. Chujongle Pakaiyin kapu hi phatecha na-inchensah teng leh nasohnu kei jong neihin geldoh tei teiyin,” ati.
Chutah chun David jong chun Abigail jah a “Tunia keito kimuto dinga nangma hinsola Pakai Israel Pathen chu nunnom hen!

Nangma jong phatthei changin lang, hitobang tah a thil het khenje nathepna jeng jong hi phathei cheh cheh hen, nangman tuni hin kathemmona ding thisan kasoa kei le ken phu lahna kakhut kalapna dinga konin neihuhdoh tai!

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai Israel Pathen hing jing ahin, ama chun nangma kathana dinga kona keima eituh tang ahitai, nangma hitobanga hi kinloi tah a nahinsola keito eihung kimuto sah lou hileh, jing jingkah teng leh Nabal mi ahi, kiti jouse chu pasal khat’a khat cha jong kihoi louhel ding kithat gamhel ding ahiuve,” ati.

Hiti chun David chun Abigail khut’a konin athilpoh neh ding chah ding anneh chengse chu akisantai; hichun David in amanu jah a aseiyin, “Lung mongtah-in na-inlama chetou tan, ven keiman nang thu kalan, nathum bang bangin kanop peh tai,” atin ahi.

Abigail chu ahung kile kit phat’in Nabal henga ahung lhungin ahileh vetan, Nabal chun ainsunga kut anabol’in, lengpa golvah ni tobang bangin abolin ahi. Chujongle Nabal chun nom asa behseh jengin ju akhamin kho ahepha tapon ahi. Hijeh chun Abigail’ in jong jingkah khovah lhah masangsen imacha aseipeh tapoi.
Jingkah khovah lhah a Nabal jong ajukham ahung limdoh phat’in ajinun thilsoh umchan jouse chu aboncha aseipeh a ahileh alungsunga alung achat tapon, hijeh chun songtum bangin akitung dentai.
Nisom jou don tobangin Pakaiyin Nabal chu adengin ahileh athitai.

Nabal athitai, ti thu kithang ajah phat’in David chun aseiyin, “Nabal khut’a kona jumsona kamuna hiche Nabal chunga phu eilahpeh Pakai chu nunnom hen, aman asohpa keima hi thilse kabolna dinga konin jong eina tuh tangin ahi; Nabal thilse bol chu Pakaiyin ama chunga alelhut peh ahitai’ ati. Chuin David chun mi asolin Abigail chu aji dia gapuisah agotan ahi.
David sohte chu Abigail henga ahung phat’uvin Carmel khoa chun Abigail jah a aseitauve, “David in nangma hi ama ji din gapui tauvin, tia eihinsolu ahi,” atiuve.
Hichun Abigail akipatdoh pai paiyin akunin tola amai asulut’in aseitai, “Vetan, nasohnu hi kapu sohte kengphang silpeh dinga kiloma kahi hitante,” atin;
hiti chun Abigail chu kinloi tah-in akigon, akipatdoh pai paiyin sangan chung khat’ a akaldoh-in ama jenlea pangji asoh numei mi nga chu akipuiyin David sohte nung ajuiyin, David jin ahung pang tai.
David chun Jezreel khoa mi Ahin’o- am kitinu jong chu akipuiyin, ama jong ajin apang gellhon tai.
Saul chun achanu Michal kitinu, David jinu chu Gallim khoa mi La’ish kitipa chapa Palti chu apen ji aneisah tai.
Ziph gam mite ahunguvin Gib’eah khoa Saul jah a chun hitin ahung seiyuve, “Jeshi’mon niso lam, Hachi’lah thinglhang gamsunga khu David ama le ama kisel jing hilou ham?” ahung tiuve.
Hijeh chun Saul jong akipatdoh paiyin Ziph gammang lam ajonsuh-in, Israel mite lah a konin mihem lhentum cheh mihat jeng sang thum akipuiyin David hol dingin Ziph gammang langa achetai.

Saul chun Jeshi’mon niso lama lamlen pang Hachi’lah molvuma chun ngahmun akisemin ahi. David vang chu gammang lah a aumden denin, ahin Saul chu ama hol din gammang lah a ahung lut tai ti amudoh phat’in,
David chun mi ve-lhi ding mi asolin, Saul chu ahung mong mongtai, ti photoh din asoltai.

Chuin David jong akipatdoh-in Saul in ngahmun asemna laitah a chun ahungtan ahi; David chun aven ahile Saul lupna le Ner chapa Abner, sepai lamkaipa lupna chu amutai; Saul chu ngahmun lailung tah a alumin, sepaise se chu ngahmun kimvel’in akigol’uvin ahi.

Hichun David jong chu Hit mi Ahim’elech le Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab sopipa Abi’shai jah a aseiyin, “Saul ngahmun lailunga khu koipen hin neiki lhonpi diu ham?” atileh; Abi’shai chun adonbut’in, “Keiman nalhonpi nange,” ati.

Hijeh chun David le Abi’shai chu janlaiyin Saul sepaite lah a achesuh lhonin ahi; ngahmun lailunga chun Saul anaihmun, alukhap koma chun atengcha tola anakiphut’e; chule Abner le sepaite chu Saul kimvela ana-ihmuuvin ahi.

Hichun Abi’shai jong chun David jah a aseiyin, “Tunia hi Pathenin namelmapa nangma khut’a napehdoh ahitai; hijeh chun tuhin keiman ama hi khatvei sut’in sun ing ting leiset toh kilbeh jeng inge, nivei lhing kasut louhel ding ahiye,” atitai.
Ahivangin David chun Abi’shai jah a aseiyin, “That hih beh-in, ajeh chu koi hijongle Pakai thao nusa douna akhut lam tapou chu koimacha athemmo lou ding aumpoi,” tin aphoh-e.

Chujongle David chun aseiyin, “Pakai hing jing aum nai, Pakaiyin ama deng nante, ahilou jongle athina nikho hung lhung nante, ahikit louva ahileh galkona achena khat touva hung thidenin tin mangthah tante.
Ken vang Pakai thao nusa lengpa chunga kakhut kalap louhelna dingin Pakaiyin eituh tang bou hen; ahin alukhap’a kitung tengcha khu leh atwipai khu galan, che mang ta hite,” ati.

Hiti chun David in Saul lukhap koma um tengcha le twipai chu akilah in Abishai chutoh ache mang lhon tan ahi. Amani chu Saul loite mihem koimachan amulhon pon, ahea jong aumpoi; amanin jong koimacha asukhang lhon hih hel’e; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Saul le aloite chu alhim goideh ahiuvin, khomang meiya ihmua ahijeh-uva kho ahetphah gamlouvu ahitai.
David chu gal lang khat lama agalkaiyin gamla thim tah khat agei phat’in akihalat lheh jenguva ahiphat’in molvuma chun adinge;

hichun David in jong Saul sepaite agah kouvin, Ner chapa Abner jah a chun hi tin aseiye, “Vo Abner, neihou lou ding ham?” tin asamtai. Hichun Abnerin ahin houvin, “Nang koi nahiya lengpa nahin kou ham?” tin adonge.

Chuin David in jong Abner jah a chun, “Nang hi pasal nahilou ham? Israelte lah a hi nang tobanga mimo koi um kham? Ipi dinga nangman napu lengpa chu phatecha nahontup lou ham? Ajeh chu mipi lah a khat hi napu lengpa that din ahungin ahi.

Hiche thudola hin nangman phatechan na ngah tup joupoi. Pakai hing jing mina kasei ahi, nang hi athi dinga kilom mong mong nahitan ahi, ajeh chu nangman napu Pakaiyin thao anusa chu phaten navengtup poi; chule tun vetemin, lengpan alulhuna akoi atengcha le atwipai chu hoiya umah hi tam?” a tin ahi.
Saul chun David ogin ahi ahedoh pai jengin, “Vo kachapa David, thuseiya aging chu nangma nahim ong?” atia ahileh; David jong chun, “Hiche oginga thusei hi keima kahi kapu lengpa,” a tin ahi.
Chujongle David chun aseiyin, “Kapun ipi dinga ba nasohpa hi kanung nahindel deljeng nah lai ham? Ipi kabolset mong mong ham? Kakhut’a hi ipi themmona kaboldoh khah um tam?

Hichejeh chun tun kapu lengpan nasohpa keima thusei ding hi ngaiphan. Keima douna dinga natildoh ahi Pakai amatah ahivang leh ahenga kilhaina thilto peh a akisan thei hihen lang, mihemten natildoh ahivangleh Pakai angsunga amaho chu gaosap changu hen; ijeh-inem itileh amaho chun keima hi tulaiya eidel manguva Pakai goulo amite lah a chan kanei louna dinga hitia hi aseiyu ahi, “Chen lang pathen lim kisemthu ho pou gahoutan,” atiu ahi.

Hijeng jongleh tun keima thisan hi Pakai angsung ahouin kalpeh hichan gama hin kisoda hen, Israel lengpa hi keima that dinga ahung kona min molsang vum dunga lhanlha adel bangin eidel le jeng jong leh,” atin ahi.

Chutah chun Saul in jong aseipai jengin, “Athemmo kahitai; hung kile kit tan kachapa David, ajeh chu keiman nang nasuse ta hih hel inge; tuni geiyin nangma mitmun kei hinkho jong hi amanlu lheh jengin ahi; vetan, keima hi angol chon kahitan, hathem thema themmo kahitai,” ati.
David’in jong adonbut’in, “Vo lengpa, natengcha hikoma aum nai, gollhang ho khat chu hinsol touvin lang hung lahsah tan.

Pakaiyin ama adih dungjui cheh le akitahna dungjui cheh a miho hi kipaman apehji ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh tunin jong Pakaiyin nangma chu kei khut’a eipehsa nahitan, hijongle keiman Pakai thao nusa lengpa chunga kakhut kalap louhel ding ahi.

Ven, tunia keima mitmua nangma hinkho manlu tah kahisah bang chun keima hinkho jong Pakai mitmun manlu tah hijing hen lang, Pakaiyin thoh hahsa kathohna chengsea konin eihuhdoh tei tei hen,” tin aseiye.

Chuphat’in Saul jong chun David jah a aseiyin, “Kachapa David nun nomin! Nang hin thil tamtah nahinbol ding chule nalolhin cheh ding ahiye,” ati. Hichun David jong ajotna ding langa akichen, Saul jong akho lama ahung kile kit tai.

David chu alungthim sunga amale ama akihouvin, ‘Tua keima itijongle Saul khut’a nikhat le kathi tei tei ding ahitai; Philistine mite gamsunga kajamlut tilou, kei dinga thilpha adang imacha aumpoi; chutileh Saul’ in Israel gamsunga hin keima eihol chimtan tin, chutengle ama khut’a kona keima katoldoh theijoh ding ahi,” a tin;
hiti hin David chu akipatdoh pai paiyin achen, ama panpi mihem jagup jen chutoh akilhonin, Gath lengpa Ma’och chapa A’chish henga achetai.
David chu Gath khoa A’chish chutoh acheng khomin, David jong aji teni toh ahin, Jezreel khoa mi Ahin’o-am le Carmel khoa mi Abigail, Nabal jinu chutoh ahiuve.
Mi khat’in David chu Gath khoa ajamlut tai, tia Saul jah a aseipeh phat’in Saul in jong David chu anunghol kit tapon ahi.

David chun A’chish jah a aseiyin, “Kachunga nalung alhaiya namit vetna lungset kaum thei leh, hiche kholen ho lah a hin kachenna thei ding mun khat neipen; ajeh chu ipi dingpena nasohpa hi hiche lengpa khopi sunga nang toh kachen khom khom thei ding ham?” ati.
Hijeh chun hiche nikho hin A’chish kitipan jong Ziklag khopi chu David anapetai; hichejeh a chu tuni geiya Ziklag kho hi Judah lengte changden ahitauve.
Philistine te gamsunga David agachenna phat lutjat chu kum khat le lha li alhinge.

David le asepaite akontouvun Geshur mite le Girzi mite chule Amalek mite agachom uvin ahi; ajeh chu amaho hi masang laiya pat’a agamsunga chengte mong mong anahiuvin, Shur a pat Egypt gamsung geiya cheng lut peh ahiuve.

David’in agamsung chu asugam hel’in. pasal hihen numei hijongle hinghoi chomdeh louhel’in athat gamin, kelngoi chengse le bonchal ho chule sangan ho leh sangongsao ho vang chu akikaiyin, ponsil ho chutoh akilah-in abonchan ahinpon A’chish henga ahung nung lhun tan ahi.

“Koipen douna na nagatoh a tunia koipen nagachom hitam?” tia A’chish chun anadoh phat’in, David chun, “Judah gamsunga Negeb a cheng ho kachom ahi,” pou atin; ahilou jongleh Jerah’meel mite gamsung, “Negeb a chengte kachom ahibouve,” tin aseipeh jin ahi. Abang jongle “Ken mi Negeb a chengte kachom ahi.” jong tin aseiye.

David chun pasal jong numei jong hinghoi chom deh louhel ‘in, “Ahingin kihoi hen lang hileh amaho hin keiho chung chang thu seiyuvin tin, ‘David’in hiti tin eibol jenguve,’ ti get’uvinte,” tin agel jin Gath henga thu polut thei koima ahingin ahoipoi. Philistinete gamsunga achen laisea David chu hitobanga hi chon mong mong ahi.
Hijeh hin A’chish jong chun David hi atahsan lheh jengin, “David hi amale ama Israel mite hot lamtah a kisemdoh a ahitan, hijeh chun aitih chan geiyin keima lhachan pang nante,” tin anagel e.

Hichelai hin Philistine miten Israel toh kisat dingin asepai jouseu akhomuvin, galkon din akigotauve. Hijeh chun lengpa A’chish jong chun David jah a aseiyin, “Nangle namite jong keito ikilhon’uva Philistine sepaite lah a iche diu ahi, ti phatechan kihet themin,” tin aseipeh tai.

David jong chun, “Apha lheh jenge, nasohpa hin itobang thil kabol thei mong mong ham, ti nangman hedoh nan nate,” atipeh-e. Chuin A’chish jong chun, David jah a aseiyin, “Apha behseh jenge, nangma hi kahinkhoa katahsa vengtup’a kapansah ding nahi,” ati.
Samuel athi phat’in Israel pumpin thi a-op’uvin ama khopi ma ma Ramah khoa avuitauve. Saul chun agamsunga konin mi gaochang jouse le mitpheldoi them jouse adelmang tan ahi.
Philistine te akikou khom uvin gal ahung kon kit’uvin Shunem muna chun ngahmun asemun apansauve; hichun Saul’in jong Israel pumpi akhom in Gilbo’a kiti laiya chun ngahmun asemtauvin ahi.
Saul’in Philistine sepaite amudoh phat’in akicha behseh jengin alungthim alinglao lheh jeng tan ahi.
Hijeh a chu Saul’in Pakai adoh doh vangin Pakaiyin ahindonbut tapon, amang hihen Urim kisana kon hihen themgao hoa kon hijongleh adonbut tapoi.

Chuphat’in Saul jong chun asohte jah a aseiyin, “Numei gaochang mi khat gaholdoh temuvin keima ahenga cheng ting phun gasan tem inge,” ati. Hichun asohten jong ajah a aseiyuvin, “Vetan, Eudora khun gaochang mi khat aum nai,” atiuve.

Chuphat’in Saul chun aponsil avon jouse akhel’in achen mi ni jong akipuiyin ahi; amaho chu jan laiyin numei gaochangnu henga chun ahunguvin ahi. Chuin Saul chun aseiyin, “Gaovin lang kei dingin lha neikoupeh temin, keiman kaminphah phah chu hinkoudoh jeng temin,” tin ajoltai.

Numeinu chun Saul jah a aseiyin, “Saul in gamsunga kona gaochang jouse le mitpheldoi them jouse athagama adelmang athilbol hi nahet tei dinga lom ahi. Chuti ahileh ipi dinga nangman keima thi thina ding nagel’a kipalsah tei ding neigot ham?” tin adong masai.
Ahivangin Saul chun Pakai mina kasei ahi, hiche naboijeh a hi nachunga talen nakipe louhel ding ahi,” atipeh-e.
Chuphat’in numeinun jong adongin, “Koi lha pentah kakoudoh peh ding ham?” atileh; aman jong, “Samuel neikoudoh peh temin,” ati.
Numeinun Samuel amuphat’in ahung kinjah jengin hapen penin ahung penge; chujongle numeinu chun Saul jah a aseiyin, “Ipi dinga nangman neilhep lhah ham? Nangma Saul nahibou hime,” atin ahi.
Lengpan amanu jah a aseipeh-in, “Kicha hih hel’in; ipiba namum?” atileh; numeinun jong Saul jah a chun, “Keiman pathen tobang khat leiset’a hung kaltou kamui,” ati.

Saul’in adong kit’in, “A limso amelput itobang ham?” atia ahileh; numeinun, “Tehsepu khat ahung kaltouvin, ama khu sangkhol chol aki-ah-in akitomjol sel jenge;” ati. Hichun Samuel ahi, ti Saul chun ahetan, hijeh chun akunin tola amai asulut’in Samuel jabolna apei.

Chutah chun Samuel’in jong Saul jah a aseiyin. “Ipibola nangman neisuh lung gima neikoutou khoh khoh ham?” tia adoh leh; Saul chun adonbut’in, “Keima kagenthei behseh tai; Philistineten gal eihinbol khum kit tauvin, Pathenin eidalhatan, imacha jong eidonbut tapoi, themgao ho kama imacha eiseipeh pon, kamang jengin jong imacha asei tapoi; hichejeh a chu ipi kabol ding hitam, tia kadoh nom jeh a kahin koutou nahi,” ati.
Ahinla Samuel jongchun, “Pathenin nadalhah a nangma keima melma nahinunga ipibola nangin keima neidoh doh ham?
Keijah a anasei bang banga Pakaiyin nangma nabol ahitai; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin nanga kona lenggam chu nalapeh a naheng nakom David kitipa chu apehsa ahitan ahi.
Ajeh chu nangman Pakai thusei na ngaipon, chule alunghan na banga nasan Amalek mite chunga gal nabolpoi, hijeh a chu Pakaiyin tunia nang dinga hiche hi abol ding ahitai.

Hiche kalvala jong Pakaiyin Israelte hi nang jaona Philistine te khut’a apeh ding ahitai; jing teng le nang le nachapate jong keitoh mithi lah a ikiloikhom diu ahitan ahi, chule Pakaiyin Israel sepaite jong hi Philistine te khut’a apeh doh ding ahi,” ati.

Chutah chun Saul jong tola apum apeh-in alhun akisep ngamset jengin, Samuel thuseiho jeh chun akicha behseh jengin ahi; nilhum kei le jan khovah hel a an nelou twi donlouva aum jeh a jong tha aneilou mong ahitai.

Chuin numeinu chu Saul henga ahungin, Saul chu akicha beh seh jeng tai, ti amudoh phat’in ajah a aseitai, “Vetan, nasohnu keima hin kahinkho tohdoh ngamhel’in nangma thu ka ngaiyin, nangin kajah a nasei jouse chu nasei bang bangin nathun kanungtan ahi.

Hijeh chun tun jong nangman nasohnu keima thusei nei ngaipeh-in lang, na-angsunga neh ding changlhah kam khat beh luipeh inge; hiche beh chu ne le chun natha um domin tin nache na dinga lam najot jou dom ding ahi,” ati.

Ahivangin Saul chu anompon, chule aseitai, “Keiman an neponge,” ati. Ahivang chun asohte le numeinu chu akithouvin ajol jol jeng tauve; hijeh chun aman jong amaho sei angaiyin athu uvin anung tai. Hiti achun tola konin akithoudoh-in jalkhun chunga atoudoh tan ahi.
Numeinu hin aina bongnou thao chet khat anavul ahin, hiche hi agathat loiyin, changbong agalan ameh nang jet in, cholsolouvin changlhah akangtan ahi.
Chuin changlhah le bongsa chu Saul le asohte chu athuhpeh-in ahileh amahon anetauve. Aneh jou phat’in akipatdoh pai paiyuvin hiche jan chun ahungnau lampi langa ache kit tauvin ahi.
Philistine ten Aphek kiti laiya chun asepai jouseu akhomsoh keiyuvin ahi; Israel ten jong Jezreel gamsunga twinah phung khat’a hin ngahmun akisemuvin ahi.
Philistine te milen milalte chu jakhat cheng sang khat chenga akijot jot jeng nau anung lama chun David le asepaite jong chu A’chish chutoh kilhonin anukhah lamtah in apanguvin ahung kijot’uve.

Hichun Philistine te gal lamkaiten aseiyuvin, “Hiche Hebrew mite hin hikoma ipi ahung bolu ham?” atiu leh; A’chish chun adonbut’in Philistine te gal lamkaiho jah a aseiye, “Hichepa Israel lengpa Saul lhachapa chu hilouva nabolu ham, amahin Saul ahinda lhah a pat’a keito kivop jing kahi lhonin phat hitih chan sung hin keiman achunga athemmona imacha tuni gei hin kamudoh poi,” atin ahileh;

Philistine te gal lamkaiho chu A’chish chunga alung hanguvin, hijeh chun Philistine te gal lamkaihon A’chish a jah a chun “Hichepa hi nung sol loiyin, nangman nachensah nom nalaiya kinung chen jeng hen; ama hi eiho toh gal konsuh khom thei hih hel’inte; achuti loule galmun igei tengu leh ama jeng jong eiho gala hung pang ding ahibouve. Ajeh chu hikoma Philistine mite hijatpi luchang atana apoh lut teng leh apupa chutoh akicham kit tilouva aman thilpha adang ipi abol thei ding uma nabol ham?
Hiche David kitipa chung changa hi hilou ham mihon la abol’uva lamuva hitia asah sau chu: ‘Saul in mi asang sang athat’in, David in vang sang som somin athat’ e,” tia anaseiyu chu?” atiuve.

Chuphat’in A’chish chun David akouvin ajah a aseitai, “Pakai hing jing mina kasei ahi, nangma keidin nakitah lheh jengin, hijeh chun kei geldola nang jong keitoh gal ikon khom ding dih kasah ahi; ajeh chu keiman kahenga nahung lut nia pat tuni gei hin nachunga imacha thil dih lou kamudoh khapoi. Hijongleh milen milalten nangma hung pan ding pha asapouve.
Hijeh chun nung che kit’in lang lung mongtah in chetan, chutileh Philistine milen milalte nasuh lung hang loujoh ding ahiye,” tin aseitai.

Ahivangin David chun A’chish jah a aseiyin, “Keiman ipi kabolset uma ong? Nahenga kahung lut nia pat tuni geiya hi nangman kei chunga thilse itobang namudoh tah a, keima kapu lengpa kidoupi agal mite toh kisat dia kakonmo na ding uma ham?” tia adoh leh;

A’chish jong chun David adonbut’in aseitai, “Nangma hi kei mit vet’a Pathen vantil tobanga nolnabei nahi, ti keiman kahenai; hijongle la Philistine te gal lamkaihon, ‘Am a hi eiho toh gal konkhom theiponte,’ tia aseiyu ahitai.
Hijeh chun tun jingpi tah in thouvin lang napu sepaite nangma hin lhonpi chengse toh matah in kipatdoh-uvin khovah lhah lhah in potdoh jenguvin,” ati.
Hijeh chun David jong Philistine te gamsung lama kinungle kit dingin, jingpi tah in asepaite chutoh ahung kipatdoh-uvin ahung tauve. Philistine te vang chu Jezreel lama achetou tauvin ahi.

Hiti hin David le asepaite chu ahunguvin nithum lhin nin Ziklag kho ahung lhung tauve; ahin Amalek miten Negeb gam le Ziklag kho chu anachomuvin ahi. Ziklag kho chu anachom gamhel’uvin meiyin ahalvam tauve;
chule khosunga um numei jouse le alen aneo abonchauvin gal-hingin anakai manguvin ahi. Mihem vang anathat pouvin abonchan ahingin anakaiyuvin anung lamuva anakile kit tauvin ahi.
David le aloite chu khopi sung ahung lut phat’uvin vetan, khopi chu meiyin ana kihalvam hel’in ajiteu leh achateu numei pasal abonchan min gal-hingin akaimang soh tai.
Chutah chun David le asepaite apengjah jenguvin haka kan akap’uvin, athau angoideh a apen jou louhel kahseuvin akap tauve.
David ji teni Jezreel khoa Ahin’o-am kitinu leh Carmel khoa Nabal jinu Abigail jong chu min gal-hingin anakaitauve.

Hijeh chun David jong alung himo behseh jengtan ahi; ijeh-inem itileh asepaiten ama jeng jong songa selih hel ding agot kit’u ahiye; ipijeh-inem itileh mijouse alung gim behseh jengin achateu numei pasal kikaimang ho agel khoh behseh jeng tauve. Ahivangin David chu Pakai a-Pathen minin akihatsah nah nah nalaiye.
David chun Ahim’elech chapa Abi’athar thempupa jah a aseiyin, “Thempuvon ompho chu neihin choipeh temin,” atileh; Abi’athar jong chun thempuvon ompho chu David henga ahinchoiye.

Hichun David in Pakai dohna aneiyin, “Hiche Amalek mite hi anungu del leng kaphah pa jou ding hinam? atileh; Pakaiyin David chu ahindonbut’in, “Del’in del’in, itijongle naphah pa tei tei ding, namite nahuhdoh tei tei ding ahi,” tin aseipeh tai.
Hijeh chun David jong akipatdoh pai paiyin, ama panpi sepai jagup chutoh akilhonin acheuvin ahileh Besor vadung ahung geitauve. Hiche vadunga umden chengse chu adalha den tauve.
David vang chun adel tei tei jengin, ama ahin asepaite ja li toh achepai pai nalaiyui; sepai ja ni vang chu alel behseh jenguvin Besor vadung galkai jou louvin aumden tauve.
Acheuva ahileh gamlah a Egypt mi khat amandoh uvin ama chu David henga ahinkai lut tauve; David le aloiten Egypt mipa chu neh ding changlhah apeuvin aneh jou phat chun adon ding twi apeuvin adontai;

chujongle theichang ga a kisem changlhah lhon jong lengpitheiboh jong apeuvin anehsah tauve. Egypt mipa chun aneh a adonsoh phat’in atha ahatdoh paitan ahi; ajeh chu nithum janthum sunga an jong nelou twi jong donlouva anaum ahitai.

Chuin David in adongin, “Koi mi nahiya, hoiya kona hung nahim?” atileh; aman jong aseiyin, “Keima Egypt mi gollhang khat kahin. Amalek mite lah a mikhat soh a pang kahi; nithum masanga pat chun kadam mon, kanat phat’a kapun eidalhah ahitai.
Keihon Chereth mite gama Negeb dung kachomuvin, Judah gam sung lam jong kachomun, Caleb gama Negeb dung jong kachom uve; chujongle Ziklag khopi chu meiyin kahal lhatauve,” ati.

Chuphat’in David jong chun adongin, “Hiche Amalek sepaite henga chu neipuisuh thei ding ham?” atileh; aman jong, “Keima neitha lou ding hina, kapu henga neipeh doh kit lou ding hinam, amasan Pathen minin kihahsel tadin, chutengle keiman hiche Amalek sepaite henga chun napuisuh nange,” atitai.

Egypt mipa chun David chu apuisuh phat’in vetan, Amalek mite chu tollhang gamlen tah khat sunga anakithejal soh keiyuvin, an aneuvin, lengpitwi adon’uvin analam lam jenguve; ipijeh-inem itileh amaho hin Philistine gamsung le Judah gamsunga thil tamtah akichomdoh-u ahiye.

Chutah chun David in Amalek mite chu jingpi phelvah a pat asat panin, ajing nikho nilhah geiyin asat jengin, alah uva pasal khat’a khat cha jong ajamdoh tapoi, gollhang ja li seh seh sangongsang chunga atoudoh uvin ajamdoh bep uve.
Amalek miten alapeh jouse chu David in abonchan akinung lahsoh keiye; David chun aji teni jong akinung lah kit’in ahi.
