Thil le mihem imacha alhasam alhing lel aumpon, alen aneo hijongle, achateu pasal hihen numei hijong leh thil anachomdoh jouseu chu David in abonchan ahinnung poh soh keiye.
David chun kelngoi hon jouse leh bonghon jouse jong alahpeh soh keiyin, asepaiten aboncha chun amasanga ahinhoipeh peh uvin, “Hiche hi David in gala achomdoh ahi,” atiuve.

Chujouvin David chu ahung lama athachol behseh jeh uva Besor vadunga ahinda lhah David nung jui lel sepai ja ni adalhah ho henga ahung kit’in ahileh, amaho jong chu David ahung phat’in alamto din ahung doh-uvin David le alhonpi ho chu agalamtouve; David chun ahinphah phat’uvin amahon salam anabol cheh-uve.

Hichun David to kilhona anache miho lah a migilou pannabei, mikhoh ho se sen aseiyuvin, “Hiche ho hi eiho to galkon khom ngap lou thil kichomdoh imacha pepou vinge, ama ama jinu cheh le achateu vang kipuiyu hen lang chetau hen,” tin aseiyuvin ahi.

Ahivangin David chun ajadan, “Nang ho hitobangpia hi nachon louhel diu ahi kasopite, Pakaiyin eiho eipeh-u thil chu chuta nabol thei lou dingu ahi; Pakaiyin eiho eihoi dam’uve, eiho douna gal hung konte chu eiho khut’a eipeh-u ahitai.
Hitia naseiyu leh kon nang ho thu a ngai thei ding ham? Galkonpa chan jat jat chu thil ngah pa jong chang tei ding ahi; amaho jong hi nang ho to kibanga chang diu ahi,” ati.
Hiche nikhoa pat chun David chun hiti hin chondan anasemin, tuni geiyin Israel sunga chondanin akimangtai.

David chu Ziklag kho ahung lhun phat’in gala achomdoh thilkeo phabep chu agol apai, Judah mi upate athot’in hitin aseiye, “Pakai dinga adougaltea kona kichomdoh gala kila thilkeo phabep kahin thot’uve,” ati;
athilkeo athot ho chu anoiya khomite ding hi ahi: Bethel kho mite, Negeb gam sung Ramoth khoa mite ding, Jattir khoa mite ding,

Racal kho mite ding, Jerah’meel mite kho mite ding le akhopi jouseuva mite ding, Ken mite khopi dunga chengte ding jong ahin,
Hormah khopia mite ding, Borash’an kho mite ding, A’thach kho mite ding,
Hebron kho mite ding, David le asepaite kilonna muntina athotsoh keiyuvin ahi.
Philistine ten Israel dou nan gal ahinbol kit tauve: Israel mite chu Philistine te masanga a jam cheh uvin, Gilbo’a Philistine ten athat gamuvin akijam chap jenguve.
Philistine ten Saul le achapate jong adel’uvin aphapa tauve: hiti hin Philistine miten Saul chapate Jonathan jong Abin’adab jong chule Mal’chishu’a jong athat tauve.
Saul din gal akhoh behseh jeng tan, akhon khon nan thalpi kap themhon Saul chu aholdoh uvin, hijeh chun Saul jong thalpi themhon melse tah le nasa tah-in amavouvin ahi.

Hichun Saul in jong agalvonpopa jah a chun, “Nachemjam satdoh-in lang neisun lih jengin, achuti louva ahileh hiche cheptanlou mite khu hunguva eimoh sut lih diu, kichepna einei diu ahi,” ati. Ahivangin agalvonpopan abol ngampoi, ajeh chu chutia bol ding chu agelleh akicha behseh jenge. Hichejeh chun Saul in jong achemjam akisadoh pai paiyin ahemlam chu adosah- in achunga aop-pha jenga ahileh athitai.
Agalvonpopa chun Saul thi amuphat’in aman jong achemjam asatdoh pai kit’in ahema akibah lut’in Saul chutoh athitha tai.
Hiti hin Saul jong athin, achapate mi thum jong athin, agalvonpopa jong a thin, asepaite abonchan nikhat sungin athigam tauve.

Gal lang khat phaichama cheng Israel mite leh Jordan vadung gallanga chengten galmuna konin Israel sepaite ajam gamtauvin, Saul le achapate jong athitauve, ti amudoh phat’uvin akhopi jouseu adalhauvin ajam gamtauve; chuin Philistine te ahunguvin akhopi dung jouseu alo’uvin chen nan aneitauvin ahi.
Ajing nikhon Philistine te chu galmuna mi thiho hedoh a koitup ding agouvin ahunguva ahileh Gilbo’a molvuma Saul le achapate thum anathiu chu amudoh tauve.
Amahon Saul chu alu atanpeh-uvin, agalvon ahoh lhauvin, Philistine mite gamsung pumpia sottolle mi asoluvin, amiteu le amilimdoi phung jouseuva Saul le achate thi thu thu seiphong din asoltauve.
Philistine miten Saul galvon chu amilimdoiyu Ash’taroth kiti houin sunga akoitauve; chujongle atahsa chu Beth-shan inbanga akhaiyuvin ahi.
Ahin Ja’besh-gil’ead khoa chengten Saul chung changa Philistine mite chaloh athilbolu ajahdoh phat’uvin

gal-hang pasal jouse akipatdoh uvin jan khovah hel’in akitol’uvin Saul le achapate tahsa jouse chu Beth-shan inbanga akhai nauva konin agala lhauvin, Jebesh khoa ahinpo lut’uvin hikoma chun meiyin ahalvam tauve.
Chuin agu achang jouseu achom khom kit’uvin Jabesh khoa Tamarisk thing phung noiya avuiyun, ni sagi sungin an angol’uvin ahi.
